atoms.detail: Manual bone burial -- no location requirement. Gilded altar (350% bonus) needs Construction 75, not assumed available this early; flagged as a later-route upgrade, not this band's default.

hints.note: Bone supply depends on earlier combat-band drop rates.
Construction 75 unlocks a much faster offering rate -- revisit this band once available.

steps.detail: God Wars Dungeon — access to the four god bosses and their unique drops.

mapMarkers.label: GWD entrance hole (surface, north of Trollheim)

steps.detail: Pick a method: Farming allotments / Bagged plants / Supercompost/ultracompost production.

hints.note: Allotment runs are a RECURRING background loop, not a one-shot action — XREF: bg:bg-farm-allotment-setup.

methods.location: allotment patch circuit (Falador, Catherby, Ardougne, etc.)
methods.notes: Plant potato/onion/cabbage seeds in allotment patches and treat with compost; this section of the page is a stub pointing to a separate seed/patch-location page, not fetched here.

methods.location: player-owned house garden (e.g. Rimmington)
methods.notes: Build then immediately remove noted bagged plants in a house garden space for active, no-wait xp; costs coins per plant instead of grow time.

methods.location: compost bin (e.g. player-owned house garden)
methods.notes: Fill a compost bin with produce (watermelon/pineapple are cited as easiest) for 8.5 xp per supercompost bucket, or 10 xp with volcanic ash for ultracompost.

atoms.label: Bank: withdraw allotment-run loadout
atoms.detail: Seed dibber, rake, spade, potato/onion/cabbage seeds (?? per patch), compost (?? -- see bg-farm-allotment-setup for the background supply loop).

atoms.label: Plant allotment seeds until Farming 17
atoms.detail: Lumbridge farm patches (potato/onion/cabbage rotation). RECURRING background loop per U7 -- interleaves with banking, not serialized.

hints.note: XREF bg-farm-allotment-setup -- this band rides the same recurring cycle, not a one-shot action.

atoms.label: Harvest allotment crops
atoms.detail: Harvest each patch once mature; replant immediately to keep the loop running.

atoms.label: Bank: deposit allotment produce
atoms.detail: Bank surplus produce; keep a few for Cooking/quest use if flagged elsewhere.

methods.location: Barbarian Village, south of Edgeville

atoms.detail: Same Edgeville Dungeon entrance/area as the Strength 40-60 band (tsb) -- reuse the loadout/walk pattern.

atoms.label: Kill Hill Giants until Attack 60
atoms.detail: Same monster/site as the Strength band; always drops big bones. Alt (atk60-site, optional): reuse existing steps.jsonl row ctr-06-stronghold-crawlers per U8, same caveat as the Strength band -- its until=40/40/40 undershoots attack:60.

atoms.label: Bank: deposit Hill Giant loot
atoms.detail: Deposit big bones, coins, and any weapon/armour drops.

checkpoints.label: Hill Giant / Flesh Crawler routing (pick one)

steps.detail: Must own a cat and beat a level-91 Possessed Priest plus one randomly-assigned level 75-81 elemental guardian (Apmeken/Crondis/Scabaras magic, or Het melee - determined by which canopic jar you're given). Give the Wanderer a tinderbox+waterskin(4), enter the pyramid (no teleporting out once inside - aggressive lvl-84 mummies + poison scarabs, use minimap-click nav to dodge traps, jump the pit at 20%+ run energy). Solve a golden-bird door puzzle to trigger flashback 1. Drop your cat to answer the Sphinx's riddle (answer: 9) or lose the cat, then see the High Priest. Flashback 2: re-enter pyramid, take the correct canopic jar from the west room, kill the guardian that spawns, take the jar out (crossing the pit twice), then return and drop the jar back before leaving. Prep for the ceremony: give the Embalmer linen+salt+sap, give the Carpenter willow logs for a holy symbol. Flashback 3: use the holy symbol on a sarcophagus in the east room, kill the level-91 Possessed Priest, talk High Priest. Flashback 4: talk High Priest again in the temple to finish. Post-quest: equipping the catspeak amulet and asking your cat about "being confused" unlocks bonus lore cutscenes. High spine value: opens Sophanem/Menaphos region access.

req_items.name: Cat (or overgrown cat, hellcat, or kitten)
Bag of salt
req_items.note: or an empty bucket to make one in Sophanem

hints.note: Quest reward XP — counts toward your skills, replacing that much training.

atoms.label: Bank: withdraw the Icthlarin's Little Helper loadout
atoms.detail: Withdraw a cat/kitten, tinderbox, willow log, bag of salt (or empty bucket), bucket of sap, a full waterskin(4), linen, and your chosen desert-entry method.

atoms.label: Talk to the Wanderer about your cat
atoms.detail: She is north-east of Sophanem, near the Agility Pyramid, and objects to your cat.

hints.value: Why? What's your problem with it? / Ok I'll get your supplies.

atoms.label: Give the Wanderer a tinderbox and waterskin(4)
atoms.detail: Hand over the requested supplies.

hints.value: Yes. I have them all here.

atoms.label: Enter the pyramid
atoms.detail: Touch the door of the pyramid; you black out and wake up inside for the first flashback.

atoms.label: Navigate the trapped corridor via the minimap
atoms.detail: Click the minimap rather than the main viewport to auto-avoid the aggressive level-84 mummies and poison scarabs.

atoms.label: Jump the pit (first crossing)
atoms.detail: Requires at least 20% run energy; higher Agility raises the success chance.

hints.note: Success chance scales with Agility level; exact rate not sourced.

atoms.label: Solve the golden bird puzzle
atoms.detail: West of the pit: click the golden bird to reset it until it lands on the pictured solution, then click the indicated tiles.

atoms.label: Answer the Sphinx's riddle
atoms.detail: Drop your cat first, then ask the Sphinx for help. Riddle answer: 9. Wrong answers make the cat disappear.

atoms.label: Talk to the High Priest
atoms.detail: He is south-west of the Sphinx.

atoms.label: Re-enter the pyramid for the second flashback
atoms.detail: Open the door and jump the pit again to trigger it.

atoms.label: Take the canopic jar from the western room
atoms.detail: Open the western door directly south and take back the correct canopic jar -- only the right one can be picked up.

atoms.label: Defeat the guardian apparition
atoms.detail: A level 75-81 apparition (Apmeken/Crondis/Scabaras/Het, matched to the jar taken) appears and must be killed before the jar can be kept.

hints.note: Which of the four guardians appears is fixed per-account by the jar taken, not random per attempt; combat style needed varies (magic vs melee).

atoms.label: Return the jar and re-solve the door puzzle
atoms.detail: Leave the room, jump the pit both ways, solve the western door puzzle again, and drop the jar back where it was found.

atoms.label: Exit the pyramid
atoms.detail: Jump the pit once more and leave via the entrance ladder.

atoms.label: Agree to help prepare the ceremony
atoms.detail: Talk to the High Priest back in Sophanem.

atoms.label: Give the Embalmer linen, salt and sap
atoms.detail: House south of the church, south of Sophanem.

atoms.label: Buy linen from Raetul if missing
atoms.detail: Raetul runs the Spinning Wheel shop north-east of the Embalmer's house; 30 coins per linen. Ask the Embalmer where to find linen first, or Raetul won't sell it.

atoms.label: Give the Carpenter your willow logs
atoms.detail: East of the Embalmer's house. He returns a holy symbol.

atoms.label: Re-enter the pyramid for the third flashback
atoms.detail: Right-click open the door and jump the pit again.

atoms.label: Use the holy symbol on a sarcophagus
atoms.detail: East door room; use the holy/unholy symbol on any sarcophagus, then leave the room.

atoms.label: Defeat the Possessed Priest
atoms.detail: Jump back across the pit, re-enter the eastern room, and kill the level-91 Possessed Priest.

atoms.label: Talk to the High Priest
atoms.detail: Report after defeating the Possessed Priest.

atoms.label: Exit the pyramid
atoms.detail: Leave via the entrance ladder.

atoms.label: Talk to the High Priest in the temple to finish
atoms.detail: Completes Icthlarin's Little Helper.

steps.detail: No requirements. Collect the 4 coloured beads (kill imps -- F2P spots near Falador's south entrance or Karamja volcano top; members near Ardougne Monastery/Chasm of Fire/Charcoal furnace), then hand them to Wizard Mizgog atop the Wizards' Tower for the amulet of accuracy.

hints.note: Quest reward XP — counts toward your skills, replacing that much training.

atoms.label: Talk to Wizard Mizgog to start Imp Catcher
atoms.detail: Top floor of the Wizards' Tower. He explains Wizard Grayzag's imps stole his 4 coloured magic beads (black, red, white, yellow).

atoms.label: Kill imps until all 4 coloured beads drop
atoms.detail: Beads are random imp drops, never a Grand Exchange purchase (gather/produce-never-GE hard rule -- the quick guide's own GE bullet is not modelled). Imp clusters: south entrance of Falador, top of the Karamja volcano, east of the Ardougne Monastery, the Chasm of Fire entrance, or the Charcoal furnace area.

hints.note: Per-colour drop rate not sourced from the fetched pages.

atoms.label: Give Wizard Mizgog all four beads to finish
atoms.detail: Return to the top of the Wizards' Tower with all four beads in your inventory.

hints.value: Give me a quest please. / Yes.

steps.detail: Research 3 independent historical leads for the outpost's curator Jorral, in any order: dig up a buried chest near Castle Wars with a silver merchant's key, trade a ghost in Port Phasmatys a sapphire amulet for a scroll, and pass a lengthy trivia quiz with the warrior Dron in Rellekka. Report all 3 findings back to Jorral, then relay them to King Lathas.

req_items.name: Way to enter Port Phasmatys
req_items.note: Ghosts Ahoy completed, or 2 ecto-tokens, or charter ship gold

hints.note: Quest reward XP — counts toward your skills, replacing that much training.

atoms.label: Reach the outpost north-west of Ardougne
atoms.detail: Walk there or use a necklace of passage to teleport directly.

atoms.label: Talk to Jorral to start the quest
atoms.detail: He assigns 3 independent historical leads, completable in any order.

hints.value: Ok, I'll make a stand for history!

atoms.label: Talk to the Silver merchant in the East Ardougne market
atoms.detail: Ask about the outpost to learn where to dig.

atoms.label: Dig for the buried chest north of Castle Wars
atoms.detail: Requires a spade.

atoms.label: Open the chest with the enchanted key to get a journal
atoms.detail: Reveals Erin's lead.

hints.value: The enchanted key's acquisition point is never stated in the fetched Quick guide text -- modelled as a pre-existing consumed item.

atoms.label: Equip the Ghostspeak amulet
atoms.detail: Needed to understand Droalak.

atoms.label: Talk to Droalak outside the Port Phasmatys general store
atoms.detail: Starts the ghost's lead.

atoms.label: Give Melina a strung sapphire amulet
atoms.detail: She is in the building east of the general store, directly south of the pub.

atoms.label: Talk to Droalak again to receive the scroll
atoms.detail: Completes Droalak's lead.

atoms.label: Talk to Blanin east of the longhall in Rellekka
atoms.detail: Introduces Dron's lead.

atoms.label: Answer Dron's trivia quiz
atoms.detail: He tests knowledge gathered from Blanin and around town: iron mace (weapon), rats (breakfast), kittens (lunch), bunnies (tea), red spider blood (favourite drink), 36 years 8 months 21 days (his age), Fifth and Fourth ages (his study), north-east side of town (house location), Blanin (brother's name), Fluffy (pet cat's name), 12 (5 plus 7).

hints.value: Why, you're the famous warrior Dron!
12, but what does that have to do with anything?

atoms.label: Report back to Jorral at the outpost with the scroll and journal
atoms.detail: All 3 leads must be complete first.

atoms.label: Talk to King Lathas on the first floor of Ardougne Castle
atoms.detail: Relays the findings to the King.

atoms.label: Talk to Jorral back at the outpost
atoms.detail: Completes Making History.

checkpoints.label: Report back to Jorral and King Lathas

steps.detail: No requirements. A whodunit inside a manor reached by boat south of Lumbridge Swamp: empty a rainwater barrel for the manor key, then solve three room puzzles for coloured gem keys (slash a painting for the ruby key, play D-E-A-D on a piano for the emerald key, enter a gem sequence Sapphire-Diamond-Zenyte-Emerald-Onyx-Ruby in a fireplace for the sapphire key). Use all three keys on the final blue door, dodge the hidden killer's knife throws by aiming a mirror at their wardrobe, then fight and unmask Abigale as the killer.

hints.note: Quest reward XP — counts toward your skills, replacing that much training.

atoms.label: Talk to Abigale to start Misthalin Mystery
atoms.detail: South-east corner of Lumbridge Swamp, near the fishing spots. Agree to help.

hints.value: What has happened here? / What do you want me to do?

atoms.label: Take the boat to the manor
atoms.detail: Board the boat further south of the swamp.

atoms.label: Take a bucket from the fountain
atoms.detail: West of the manor, if not already carrying one.

atoms.label: Empty the rainwater barrel and take the manor key
atoms.detail: Use the bucket on the barrel of rainwater west of the manor, then take the key from the bottom of the emptied barrel.

atoms.label: Unlock and enter the manor
atoms.detail: Use the manor key on the manor doors.

atoms.label: Take the knife from the table
atoms.detail: Just inside the entry hall, if not already carrying one.

atoms.label: Read the note by the pink-knob door
atoms.detail: Attempting the pink-knob door north fails; the note beside it is the real clue.

atoms.label: Slash the gloomy-valley painting for the ruby key
atoms.detail: South-west room from the entry hall: use the knife on the painting of a gloomy valley (east wall), then search the slashed canvas.

atoms.label: Take a tinderbox from the shelves
atoms.detail: South-east room from the entry hall, if not already carrying one.

atoms.label: Light the four unlit candles
atoms.detail: All four are in the south-eastern room.

atoms.label: Light the fused barrel and flee the room
atoms.detail: Use the tinderbox on the barrel with the fuse, then exit to trigger the explosion.

atoms.label: Climb through the damaged wall
atoms.detail: Re-enter the south-eastern room and climb over the wall broken by the explosion.

atoms.label: Observe the tree across from Lacey
atoms.detail: Head north then west; the response option content doesn't matter.

atoms.label: Read the second note
atoms.detail: On the ground near the tree.

atoms.label: Play D-E-A-D on the piano for the emerald key
atoms.detail: North-eastern corner of the manor; play the notes, then search the piano.

atoms.label: Return to the mansion through the damaged wall
atoms.detail: Climb back over the wall into the main house.

atoms.label: Open the green-knob door
atoms.detail: North of the entrance, west of the pink-knob door.

atoms.label: Read the note by the godsword room
atoms.detail: Attempting the door west (with the Bandos godsword inside) fails; the note beside it is the clue.

atoms.label: Open the unlit fireplace with the knife
atoms.detail: Room north of the damaged-wall room.

atoms.label: Enter the gem sequence for the sapphire key
atoms.detail: Sapphire, Diamond, Zenyte, Emerald, Onyx, Ruby -- in that order -- then search the fireplace again.

atoms.label: Open the blue-knob door
atoms.detail: Westernmost door in the room where the painting was slashed.

hints.note: Which key opens which door is never stated explicitly by the source -- all three keys are modelled as consumed by this final door rather than guessing a colour-to-door mapping.

atoms.label: Push the mirror toward the killer's wardrobe
atoms.detail: Watch for a brief black shadow around a wardrobe, then push the mirror to face it before a knife is thrown. Repeat until the cutscene triggers.

atoms.label: Take the killer's knife after the cutscene
atoms.detail: Dropped once the killer is revealed.

atoms.label: Wield the killer's knife
Attack Abigale with the killer's knife
atoms.detail: Reveals the true killer.

atoms.label: Attempt to exit the room
Talk to Mandy outside the manor to finish
atoms.detail: Completes Misthalin Mystery.

steps.detail: Short novice fetch quest: run past thieves (two level-14, one level-26) in a stone-circle den west of the monastery to recover a stolen child's blanket, then help Brother Cedric prep a birthday party by giving him a jug of water and some logs/a plank before returning to Brother Omad.

req_items.name: Regular logs or a regular plank

hints.note: Quest reward XP — counts toward your skills, replacing that much training.

atoms.label: Talk to Brother Omad to start Monk's Friend
atoms.detail: Ardougne Monastery, south of East Ardougne. He can't sleep -- his son's blanket was stolen and the birthday party isn't ready.

hints.value: Why can't you sleep, what's wrong? / Yes

atoms.label: Enter the stone circle west of the monastery
atoms.detail: Slightly south-west of the Clock Tower; go down the ladder in the middle of the circle.

atoms.label: Follow the path south and pick up the child's blanket
atoms.detail: The thieves' den beneath the stone circle.

atoms.label: Return the blanket to Brother Omad
atoms.detail: Talk to him twice; he mentions his brother Cedric.

hints.value: Who's Brother Cedric? / Where should I look?

atoms.label: Walk to Brother Cedric
atoms.detail: North of the monastery, directly south of the Ardougne Zoo, near the well.

atoms.label: Give Brother Cedric a jug of water
Give Brother Cedric the logs or plank
Return to Brother Omad to finish Monk's Friend
atoms.detail: Completes the quest; he'll now throw parties for you on request.

steps.detail: No requirements (Kandarin-region quest, included in this bundle's spine). Old man Sinclair is dead; find flypaper and a dagger inside the mansion, use flour+flypaper on silver items from two thread-colour-matched suspects' bedrooms to dust prints and match one to the dagger. Ask Gossip outside and the Seers' Village pub poison salesman who bought poison, confront the matched suspect about their motive, then search the item they claim to have used the poison on to confirm before reporting to a guard.

hints.note: Quest reward XP — counts toward your skills, replacing that much training.

atoms.label: Talk to a guard to start Murder Mystery
atoms.detail: Any guard around the Sinclair Mansion, north of Seers' Village and Camelot. Agree to investigate.

atoms.label: Search the shed sacks for flypaper
atoms.detail: North-west of the mansion; take 4 flypapers.

atoms.label: Take the pungent pot and criminal's dagger
atoms.detail: Both are inside the mansion.

atoms.label: Investigate the smashed window for a criminal's thread
atoms.detail: Eastern side of the mansion. Thread colour is randomised per playthrough and determines which two suspects to search next.

hints.note: Colour (red/green/blue) is randomised per playthrough; see the cited walkthrough's colour table rather than a fixed pairing.

atoms.label: Search the two matching suspects' barrels
atoms.detail: Red thread -> Bob and Carol's rooms. Green thread -> Anna and David's rooms. Blue thread -> Elizabeth and Frank's rooms. Search both barrels for a silver item each.

hints.note: Which pair of suspects is searched depends on the thread colour rolled in mdm-04.

atoms.label: Fill the pot with flour
atoms.detail: Kitchen barrel of flour.

atoms.label: Dust the silver items and dagger for prints
atoms.detail: Use flour and flypaper on each silver item and the dagger to lift a print from each.

atoms.label: Compare prints until you find a match
atoms.detail: Test each suspect's print against the dagger's print (Anna, Bob, Frank, David, Carol, Elizabeth). Remember whoever matches.

hints.note: Which of the 6 named suspects matches is randomised per playthrough -- never fabricated to a fixed name.

atoms.label: Ask Gossip who he thinks is responsible
atoms.detail: Outside the front gate of the mansion.

hints.value: Who do you think was responsible?

atoms.label: Ask the poison salesman who bought poison
atoms.detail: Seers' Village pub. Select the Murder Mystery quest option, not Fremennik Trials.

hints.value: Who did you sell Poison to at the house?

atoms.label: Ask the matched suspect why they bought poison
atoms.detail: They claim an item they used it on -- confirm by searching that item next.

hints.value: Why'd you buy poison the other day?

atoms.label: Search the claimed poisoned item
atoms.detail: Anna -> compost heap. Bob -> beehive in the cow pen. Frank -> Family Crest east of the front door. David -> spiders' nest upstairs. Carol -> kitchen drain west of the front door. Elizabeth -> the fountain.

hints.note: Which item is searched depends on which suspect matched in mdm-08.

atoms.label: Accuse the killer to finish Murder Mystery
atoms.detail: Drop the silver necklace first if you searched Anna's barrel and want to keep it -- it can't be reclaimed after this step.

hints.note: Only relevant if Anna's barrel was the one searched.

steps.detail: Talk to Orlando Smith to start, then click the plaque in front of each of 14 creature displays (North room: Lizard/Battle tortoise/Dragon/Wyvern; East room: Snail/Snake/Sea slug/Monkey; South room: Kalphite Queen/Terrorbird; West room: Penguin/Mole/Camel/Leech) and answer 3 multiple-choice questions correctly per display -- answers come from that display's own Natural historian's lecture or the wiki page text itself, and a good approach is simply guessing since only 3-of-several need to be right. Once all 3 for a display are answered correctly its questions are replaced by the creature's common+scientific name. Return to Orlando after all 14 displays are done for the xp reward.

hints.note: Quest reward XP — counts toward your skills, replacing that much training.

atoms.label: Talk to Orlando Smith to start the natural history quiz
atoms.detail: He is on the basement floor, centre of the Varrock Museum. Starts the 14-display quiz (28 kudos total).

atoms.label: Answer 3 questions correctly at each north-room display (4 displays)
atoms.detail: Click each display's plaque and answer 3 of its questions correctly. North room displays: Lizard, Battle tortoise, Dragon, Wyvern. Each display draws from a larger question pool per attempt (own-words summary; consult the cited page for the full per-display answer key rather than assuming a fixed 3-question order).

hints.note: Which 3 of each display's question pool are asked varies per attempt.

atoms.label: Answer 3 questions correctly at each east-room display (4 displays)
atoms.detail: Click each display's plaque and answer 3 of its questions correctly. East room displays: Snail, Snake, Sea slug, Monkey. Each display draws from a larger question pool per attempt (own-words summary; consult the cited page for the full per-display answer key rather than assuming a fixed 3-question order).

hints.note: Which 3 of each display's question pool are asked varies per attempt.

atoms.label: Answer 3 questions correctly at each south-room display (2 displays)
atoms.detail: Click each display's plaque and answer 3 of its questions correctly. South room displays: Kalphite Queen, Terrorbird. Each display draws from a larger question pool per attempt (own-words summary; consult the cited page for the full per-display answer key rather than assuming a fixed 3-question order).

hints.note: Which 3 of each display's question pool are asked varies per attempt.

atoms.label: Answer 3 questions correctly at each west-room display (4 displays)
atoms.detail: Click each display's plaque and answer 3 of its questions correctly. West room displays: Penguin, Mole, Camel, Leech. Each display draws from a larger question pool per attempt (own-words summary; consult the cited page for the full per-display answer key rather than assuming a fixed 3-question order).

hints.note: Which 3 of each display's question pool are asked varies per attempt.

atoms.label: Talk to Orlando Smith to finish the quiz
atoms.detail: Once all 14 displays are complete (28 kudos), report back for 1000 Hunter and 1000 Slayer experience. If this is your first Slayer xp, the first assignment's enchanted gem must be bought for 1 coin instead of given free.

steps.detail: Edmond's daughter Elena vanished into plague-locked West Ardougne. His wife Alrena makes a gas mask from dwellberries; soften the mud behind the house with 4 buckets of water then dig under the wall with the spade, use rope on the blocked pipe grill to get through. Inside, show Jethick Elena's picture, learn from the Rehnison family she was taken to the barred plague house. Cure Bravek's hangover (mix chocolate dust + bucket of milk + snape grass) to get a warrant past the Mourners guarding that house, find and free Elena, then return to Edmond via the manhole. One of the Ardougne-diary prereq quests alongside Sheep Shearer and Clock Tower.

req_items.name: Hangover cure
req_items.note: or chocolate dust + bucket of milk + snape grass to make one

hints.note: Quest reward XP — counts toward your skills, replacing that much training.

atoms.label: Bank: withdraw the Plague City loadout
atoms.detail: Dwellberries, a rope, 1-4 buckets of water (or refill en route), a hangover cure or its ingredients (chocolate dust, bucket of milk, snape grass), and a spade if not spawned nearby.

atoms.label: Talk to Edmond to start Plague City
atoms.detail: North-western house of East Ardougne, behind the wall. His daughter Elena vanished three weeks ago after crossing into plague-stricken West Ardougne to heal the sick.

atoms.label: Talk to Alrena about a gas mask
atoms.detail: Edmond's wife, inside or near the house. She'll make a mask if given dwellberries.

atoms.label: Give Alrena the dwellberries for a gas mask
atoms.detail: Spare masks are also in the house cupboard.

atoms.label: Take the picture of Elena
atoms.detail: Inside Alrena and Edmond's house.

atoms.label: Talk to Edmond about digging under the wall
atoms.detail: He explains the plan to soften the ground with water, then dig through.

atoms.label: Soften the mud patch with water
atoms.detail: Behind Edmond's house, between the cabbages and potatoes; refill buckets at the sink inside.

atoms.label: Dig through the softened ground
atoms.detail: You and Edmond fall underground together.

atoms.label: Free the blocked pipe grill with a rope
atoms.detail: Walk south underground to find the grill; pulling by hand fails first.

atoms.label: Talk to Edmond to pull the grill off together
Equip the gas mask and climb into West Ardougne
Show Jethick the picture of Elena
atoms.detail: East, in the same plaza. He gives a book borrowed from the Rehnisons.

atoms.label: Walk to the Rehnison house
atoms.detail: North, the grey-plank building set against the wall.

atoms.label: Talk to the Rehnisons about Elena
atoms.detail: Mention the borrowed book to be let in; talk to Martha or Ted downstairs, then Milli upstairs.

atoms.label: Walk to the marked plague house
atoms.detail: South past the town square, near the southern wall -- the house with a black X on its doors and a central stairwell down.

atoms.label: Ask the Mourners about the kidnapped girl
atoms.detail: They refuse entry without Bravek's permission; you must select the ask-again dialogue option to progress.

atoms.label: Convince the clerk to let you see Bravek
atoms.detail: Large building north side, north of the manhole. State the urgency of a kidnapping.

hints.value: This is urgent though! Someone's been kidnapped!

atoms.label: Make the hangover cure
atoms.detail: Add chocolate dust to the bucket of milk, then add snape grass. Do not left-click the chocolate bar or the chocolatey milk or you'll eat/drink it by mistake.

atoms.label: Give Bravek the hangover cure
atoms.detail: He's badly hung over and can barely talk until cured; he'll give a warrant granting entry to the plague house.

atoms.label: Show the Mourners the warrant
atoms.detail: They stand aside, letting you sneak into the plague house.

atoms.label: Search the barrel for a small key
atoms.detail: West of the staircase inside the plague house.

atoms.label: Unlock the door downstairs
Talk to Elena to free her
Return to Edmond's garden
atoms.detail: Climb down the central manhole and up the mud pile back to the surface.

atoms.label: Talk to Edmond to finish Plague City

steps.detail: Pick a method: Iron ore drop-mining (triangle spots) / Tick-manipulated iron (3-tick) / Skip via quest xp rewards.

methods.location: Any of the 16 three-rock iron triangle sites, e.g. Al Kharid Mine or Legends' Guild Mine
methods.notes: Page states ~45,000-55,000 xp/hr for iron below level 60 as one combined figure, not broken out per band; Varrock armour 2+ adds a 10% chance of a double ore.

methods.location: Legends' Guild Mine or Isle of Souls mine (4-rock clusters)
methods.notes: Faster than plain drop-mining but click-intensive; page recommends it mainly as practice for later granite tick manipulation.

methods.location: Doric's Quest, The Dig Site, Plague City, The Giant Dwarf, The Lost Tribe, Another Slice of H.A.M.
methods.notes: Same six-quest package as the prior band; its 27,525 xp lump carries a player through level 30 on the way to level 37.

atoms.label: Equip: best available pickaxe
atoms.detail: No food needed for this AFK-adjacent method; no-bank checkpoint (ore is dropped, not carried).

atoms.label: Go to Al Kharid Mine
atoms.detail: One of 16 wiki-listed iron-triangle spots (three iron rocks in reach without moving); tile ??.

atoms.label: Mine iron ore until Mining 30
atoms.detail: Mine the triangle, drop each ore, repeat -- banking iron ore is not worth the time per the wiki's own advice at this level range.

hints.note: Dropping ore beats banking for xp/hr below level 60 per the wiki's own guidance.

steps.instruction: Mine volcanic ash at Fossil Island
steps.detail: Mine volcanic ash from the ash piles on Fossil Island. Used to make ultracompost. Loop during farm-run downtime.

mapMarkers.label: Fossil Island Volcano (ash-pile mining site, per infobox map marker)

hints.value: 1 ash/pile at lvl22, +1 per 15 levels to 6 at lvl97
hints.note: Volcanic_ash s3: yield scales with Mining level, 1 ash at 22, +1 every 15 levels (37=2,52=3,67=4,82=5,97=6). Mining enhancers (Varrock armour, mining cape, mining gloves) do NOT affect yield (Mod Ash, cited on-page). 'At high Mining levels, possible to obtain over 6,500 ash per hour.'
Step's own detail says 'Loop during farm-run downtime' -- consistent with U7 semi-atomic farm-run pattern.

steps.detail: Sneak a gas mask (via pigeon + bird feed distraction) past the mourner watchtower into West Ardougne to retrieve Elena's distillator, fetch touch paper from the Rimmington chemist, hand plague-sample vials to 3 of the chemist's henchmen around a campfire and collect the processed samples back, then smuggle the sample and paper through the guarded Varrock fence disguised in a priest gown to deliver them to Guidor, and finally report to King Lathas in Ardougne Castle.

req_items.name: gas mask
req_items.note: free from a cupboard in Edmond and Alrena's house, East Ardougne

hints.note: Quest reward XP — counts toward your skills, replacing that much training.

atoms.label: Speak to Elena to begin the quest
atoms.detail: Talk to Elena in her East Ardougne house, directly west of the shortcut log, to start the quest and agree to retrieve her distillator.

hints.value: 1I'll try to retrieve it for you.

atoms.label: Speak to Jerico
atoms.detail: Speak to Jerico in the house just south of the northern Ardougne bank (the house with pigeon cages in the backyard).

atoms.label: Search Jerico's cupboard for bird feed
atoms.detail: Search the cupboard to obtain bird feed; click continue or it won't be added to your inventory.

atoms.label: Take a pigeon cage from the backyard
atoms.detail: Grab a pigeon cage from Jerico's backyard.

atoms.label: Walk to the West Ardougne watchtower
atoms.detail: Go south-west of Ardougne Castle to speak with Omart, then north to the small watchtower in front of the West Ardougne gates and stand in the corner where the two spiked fences meet.

atoms.label: Distract the watchtower guard with bird feed
atoms.detail: Use bird feed on the watchtower fence to lure the guard's attention.

atoms.label: Open the pigeon cage
atoms.detail: Click open on the pigeon cage in your inventory while the guard is distracted.

atoms.label: Equip the gas mask
atoms.detail: Equip your gas mask before crossing into West Ardougne.

atoms.label: Cross into West Ardougne with Omart
atoms.detail: Run south from the watchtower and speak to Omart; after a short delay you arrive in West Ardougne.

atoms.label: Squeeze into the Mourner HQ backyard
atoms.detail: Head around the Mourner Headquarters to the north-eastern area with the vat and mangle, then squeeze through the fence into the backyard.

atoms.label: Pick up the rotten apple
atoms.detail: Pick up the rotten apple in the backyard.

atoms.label: Use the rotten apple on the cauldron
atoms.detail: Use the rotten apple on the cauldron, then squeeze back through the fence.

atoms.label: Walk to Nurse Sarah's house
atoms.detail: Go to Nurse Sarah's house, south-west of the West Ardougne church.

atoms.label: Search the cupboard for a medical gown
atoms.detail: Search the cupboard in the northern part of the house for a medical gown.

atoms.label: Equip the medical gown
atoms.detail: Equip the medical gown, go back to the Mourner Headquarters and open the door.

atoms.label: Kill a mourner upstairs
atoms.detail: Go upstairs inside the headquarters and kill a mourner; a key is placed in your inventory automatically.

atoms.label: Unlock the caged room
atoms.detail: Use the key on the gate to get into the caged room.

atoms.label: Search the crate for the distillator
atoms.detail: Search the crate third from the left on the northern wall to find Elena's distillator.

atoms.label: Return the distillator to Elena
atoms.detail: With 3 empty inventory spaces, return to Elena and give her the distillator (via Ardougne Teleport, Skills necklace to the Fishing Guild, over the wall by Kilron, or via the Plague City sewers).

atoms.label: Walk to the Rimmington chemist
atoms.detail: Go to the chemist in south-western Rimmington (ship from Captain Barnaby at the Ardougne Dock for 30gp, or teleport).

atoms.label: Get the touch paper from the chemist
atoms.detail: Speak to the Chemist about your quest; he gives you the touch paper.

atoms.label: Give Chancy the liquid honey
atoms.detail: Find Chancy, Da Vinci and Hops around a fire outside the Chemist's house and give Chancy the vial of liquid honey.

hints.value: 2You give him the vial of liquid honey...

atoms.label: Give Da Vinci the ethenea
atoms.detail: Give Da Vinci the vial of ethenea. Giving any henchman the wrong vial forces you to redo the round with all three in Varrock before retrying.

hints.value: 1You give him the vial of ethenea...

atoms.label: Give Hops the sulphuric broline
atoms.detail: Give Hops the vial of sulphuric broline.

hints.value: 3You give him the vial of sulphuric broline...

atoms.label: Walk to the fenced area south-east of Varrock bank
atoms.detail: Teleport or travel to Varrock and head to the fenced area south-east of the bank; the guard searches you but lets the plague sample and touch paper through.

atoms.label: Get a free priest gown from Asyff (optional)
atoms.detail: (Optional) Speak to Asyff, the Fancy Dress Shop owner, in the building south-east for a free priest gown top and bottom, or buy one from him.

atoms.label: Equip the priest gown
atoms.detail: Equip the priest gown top and bottom.

atoms.label: Walk to the Dancing Donkey Inn
atoms.detail: Head to the Dancing Donkey Inn to reclaim the vials.

atoms.label: Reclaim the vial from Hops
atoms.detail: Talk to Hops to get the processed vial back; make sure you have free inventory space. Do not pass back through the Varrock gate or the vials are confiscated and you must get new samples from Elena.

atoms.label: Reclaim the vial from Da Vinci
atoms.detail: Talk to Da Vinci to get the processed vial back.

atoms.label: Reclaim the vial from Chancy
atoms.detail: Talk to Chancy to get the processed vial back.

atoms.label: Walk to Guidor's house
atoms.detail: With the priest gown equipped, head to Guidor's house in the south-east of the fenced area.

atoms.label: Deliver the sample to Guidor
atoms.detail: Speak to Guidor and tell him Elena has sent a sample that needs to be processed.

hints.value: 1I've come to ask your assistance in stopping a plague.

atoms.label: Report back to Elena
atoms.detail: Return to Ardougne and speak to Elena.

atoms.label: Walk to King Lathas' floor in Ardougne Castle
atoms.detail: Go to the first floor of Ardougne Castle.

atoms.label: Report to King Lathas to finish
atoms.detail: Speak to King Lathas to complete the quest.

checkpoints.label: Sneak the gas mask past the watchtower
Infiltrate Mourner HQ for the distillator
Fetch touch paper from the Rimmington chemist
Deliver plague-sample vials to the chemist's henchmen
Reclaim the vials at the Dancing Donkey Inn
Deliver evidence to Guidor and report to King Lathas

steps.instruction: Complete Rag and Bone Man I
steps.detail: No requirements. Kill 8 low-level creatures for their bones (giant rat, unicorn, bear, ram, goblin, big frog, monkey, giant bat -- all reachable on a walk from Varrock through Lumbridge Swamp to Karamja), buy vinegar from Fortunato in Draynor to soak them, then boil each in a pot over a fire at the Odd Old Man's hut. Buying 27 extra vinegar jugs now (35 total) saves a trip if planning Rag and Bone Man II next; direct prerequisite for that sequel quest.

refs.title: Rag and Bone Man I/Quick guide

hints.note: Quest reward XP — counts toward your skills, replacing that much training.

atoms.label: Talk to the Odd Old Man to start Rag and Bone Man I
atoms.detail: Silvarea, north-east of Varrock by the Limestone Mine, north of the Digsite. He mentions boiling bones in vinegar.

refs.title: Rag and Bone Man I/Quick guide

atoms.label: Kill 8 named creatures for their bones
atoms.detail: One bone type per monster: giant rat bone, unicorn bone, bear ribs, ram skull, goblin skull, big frog leg, monkey paw, giant bat wing. The cited walkthrough's own zone table lists several spawn locations per monster along a rough south-from-Silvarea-through-Lumbridge-Swamp-to-Karamja route.

hints.note: Per-monster bone drop rate not sourced from the fetched pages.

refs.title: Rag and Bone Man I/Quick guide

atoms.label: Buy 8 jugs of vinegar from Fortunato
atoms.detail: Draynor Village marketplace, a named non-GE vendor; 1 coin each per the quest's own item list.

refs.title: Rag and Bone Man I/Quick guide

atoms.label: Combine vinegar with pots
atoms.detail: Use each jug of vinegar with a pot to make 8 pots of vinegar. (Buy 27 extra jugs -- 35 total -- now if planning to also do Rag and Bone Man II.)

refs.title: Rag and Bone Man I/Quick guide

atoms.label: Soak each bone in vinegar
atoms.detail: Use each of the 8 gathered bones with a pot of vinegar.

refs.title: Rag and Bone Man I/Quick guide

atoms.label: Bank: withdraw a tinderbox and 8 logs
atoms.detail: Any log type works, or bring an axe to cut them en route instead.

refs.title: Rag and Bone Man I/Quick guide

atoms.label: Boil each bone-in-vinegar on the pot-boiler
atoms.detail: Per bone: place a set of logs on the pot-boiler next to the Odd Old Man, use the bone-in-vinegar with the pot-boiler, light the logs, then wait roughly 12 seconds for the fire to burn out before removing the pot (world-hopping after lighting also works, finishing on relog).

hints.note: Hopping worlds after lighting the logs lets the boil finish while you're away instead of waiting the ~12s out.

refs.title: Rag and Bone Man I/Quick guide

atoms.label: Return the boiled bones to finish Rag and Bone Man I
atoms.detail: Completes the quest.

refs.title: Rag and Bone Man I/Quick guide

steps.detail: Requires beating level-69 Draugen and an unarmed/unarmoured fight vs Koschei the deathless (first 3 forms; 4th form is safe to "die" to, even on HCIM). Order: lose a drinking contest to Manni, get Hunters' Talisman from Sigli, talk Olaf, obtain a lyre (craft from swaying-tree branch via Lalli's stew quest-within-quest, or farm Lanzig's 1/17 drop). Spin golden wool in Seers' Village if crafting the lyre, buy low-alcohol keg from Poison Salesman. Back in Rellekka: use beer on council workman for strange object, enchant lyre with raw fish at a strange altar near the bridge, hunt the Draugen via talisman, light strange object and use on longhall pipe, play enchanted lyre on stage, then win the rematch drinking contest vs Manni with the low-alcohol keg swap. Sigmund/Swensen trial is a long NPC-chase-and-recall-order chain culminating in paying Askeladden 5,000 coins then repeating the NPC list in reverse order. Thorvald trial: bank everything (no weapons/armour/runes allowed), craft a dramen/celastrus staff underground, fight Koschei's first 3 forms unarmed. Peer the Seer trial: bank all bankable items, solve a riddle (each line gives one letter of a 4-letter word) then a multi-step item-transformation puzzle (bucket/jug/vase/disks/red herring) to unlock a trapdoor exit. Finish by reporting to Brundt. High spine value: gates Fremennik Isles (Neitiznot/Jatizso/Miscellania/Etceteria) sea access.

req_items.name: Raw shark, raw manta ray, or raw sea turtle
Lyre
req_items.note: drop from Lanzig/Borrokar/Lensa/Freidir, or craft with Fletching 25 + Woodcutting 40 + Crafting 40

hints.value: agility +2812, attack +2812, crafting +2812, defence +2812, fishing +2812, fletching +2812, hitpoints +2812, strength +2812, thieving +2812, woodcutting +2812
hints.note: Quest reward XP — counts toward your skills, replacing that much training.

atoms.label: Talk to Brundt the Chieftain (start The Fremennik Trials)
atoms.detail: Rellekka longhall. Explains 7 of 12 council members must vote for you; trials can be done in any order.

atoms.label: Talk to Manni the Reveller (accept the drinking challenge)
atoms.detail: Bar next to the longhall. Take the keg of beer and beer tankard off the bar.

atoms.label: Talk to Manni again (lose the drinking contest)
atoms.detail: You always lose; Manni barely gets drunk.

atoms.label: Buy a low alcohol keg of beer (Poison Salesman, Seers' Village)
atoms.detail: Seers' Village bar. Skip if the beer tankard was already grabbed.

atoms.label: Give the council workman a beer (get the strange object)
atoms.detail: Council workman at the Rellekka end of the footbridge.

atoms.label: Light the strange object with a tinderbox
Hide the lit strange object in the pipe (east wall of the longhall)
atoms.detail: Distraction primed; grab a fresh keg of beer from the longhall table before it goes off (skip if one is already banked).

atoms.label: Swap the kegs (use the low alcohol keg on the normal keg of beer)
atoms.detail: Explosion distracts the Fremennik, letting you switch the contents.

atoms.label: Talk to Manni (drink the swapped keg, receive his vote)
Talk to Olaf the Bard (learn a lyre is needed)
atoms.detail: East of the Rellekka bar. Must be spoken to first if collecting the lyre as a monster drop.

atoms.label: Gather potato, cabbage and onion from the Rellekka vegetable patch
atoms.detail: Grab all three before leaving Rellekka's gates.

atoms.label: Cut a branch from the swaying tree (east of Rellekka)
atoms.detail: Requires an axe (blessed axes do not work) and 40 Woodcutting.

atoms.label: Cut the branch into an unfinished lyre
atoms.detail: Knife on the swaying branch; 40 Crafting to make the unfinished lyre.

atoms.label: Talk to Lalli (ask for golden wool)
atoms.detail: South-east of the swaying tree, near the golden sheep/tree. He already gave his wool to Askeladden.

atoms.label: Talk to Askeladden (get the pet rock)
atoms.detail: Child at the Rellekka longhall entrance.

atoms.label: Use the vegetables and pet rock on Lalli's stew
atoms.detail: Stew pot just outside Lalli's cave home.

atoms.label: Talk to Lalli (offer the stew, receive golden fleece)
atoms.detail: Take extra fleece now via the drop trick if crafting spare lyres -- Lalli charges 1,000gp/fleece once the trial is done.

atoms.label: Spin the golden fleece into golden wool
atoms.detail: Seers' Village spinning wheel (the Rellekka spinning wheel is locked until the quest is finished).

atoms.label: String the unfinished lyre with golden wool
Kill a council worker (Lanzig/Borrokar/Lensa/Freidir) until a lyre drops
atoms.detail: Eastern Rellekka buildings; each has a 1/17 chance, quick respawns, safespottable near the central fires.

hints.note: Alternative to crafting a lyre -- skips the vegetable/wool chain entirely.

atoms.label: Buy a raw shark (Rufus' Meat Emporium, Canifis)
atoms.detail: Gather-not-GE alternative to fishing it yourself (Fishing 76); Frankie's Fishing Emporium (Port Piscarilius) also sells raw shark. One fish needed per lyre to enchant.

atoms.label: Use the raw fish on the strange altar (enchant the lyre)
atoms.detail: Small peninsula south-west of Rellekka. Fossegrimen the spirit enchants the lyre. Drop any spare enchanted lyres before entering the stage or they un-enchant.

atoms.label: Play the lyre on stage and talk to Olaf (receive his vote)
atoms.detail: Enter through the door the Longhall Bouncer guards.

atoms.label: Talk to Sigli the Huntsman (get the hunters' talisman)
atoms.detail: Near the Rellekka entrance gate.

atoms.label: Locate and defeat the Draugen (level 69)
atoms.detail: Use the talisman like a Runecraft talisman to get directional chat clues; the Draugen roams the Fremennik Province and crosses bridges. 48 Agility unlocks a log-balance shortcut. Weak to air spells (50%) despite high magic defence; Ranged is least effective.

hints.note: Random roaming location; camp near the bridge east of the strange altar as a slow fallback.

atoms.label: Talk to Sigli (return the charged talisman, receive his vote)
Talk to Sigmund the Merchant (learn he wants an exotic flower)
atoms.detail: Rellekka marketplace. A reverse fetch-quest chain of 12 NPCs follows -- do not lose any item or restart from Askeladden's note.

atoms.label: Talk to the Sailor (learn he wants a romantic ballad)
atoms.detail: Second pier from the left.

atoms.label: Talk to Olaf the Bard (learn he wants new boots)
Talk to Yrsa (learn she needs taxes lowered first)
atoms.detail: Clothing store west of Sigmund.

atoms.label: Talk to Brundt (learn he needs Sigli to show him hunting spots)
Talk to Sigli (learn he wants a custom bowstring)
atoms.detail: South of the longhall.

atoms.label: Talk to Skulgrimen (learn she wants a rare fish)
atoms.detail: Helmet store north of the longhall.

atoms.label: Talk to the fisherman (learn he wants a map of the best fish spots)
atoms.detail: Northern end of the dock west of the helmet shop.

atoms.label: Talk to Swensen the Navigator (learn he wants a weather forecast)
atoms.detail: Building south of the marketplace.

atoms.label: Talk to Peer the Seer (learn he wants Thorvald as bodyguard)
atoms.detail: North-west of Swensen.

atoms.label: Talk to Thorvald the Warrior (learn he wants a longhall seat)
atoms.detail: Helmet store.

atoms.label: Talk to Manni the Reveller (learn he wants a cocktail)
Talk to Thora the Barkeep (learn she wants a signed note from Askeladden)
Pay Askeladden for the signed note
atoms.detail: South of the longhall.

atoms.label: Deliver every item back down the chain, ending with the flower to Sigmund
atoms.detail: Reverse order: note to Thora, cocktail to Manni, seat token to Thorvald, bodyguard contract to Peer, forecast to Swensen, chart to the fisherman, fish to Skulgrimen, bowstring to Sigli, hunting map to Brundt, tax slip to Yrsa, boots to Olaf, ballad to the sailor, then the flower to Sigmund.

hints.note: One continuous reverse-delivery round; no combat, purely sequential hand-offs.

atoms.label: Talk to Swensen the Navigator (learn about the portal maze)
atoms.detail: House south-west of the longhall; enter the maze via the ladder inside.

atoms.label: Navigate the portal maze (spell SWENSEN: S,W,E,N,S,E,N)
atoms.detail: Each room has 4 portals (N/S/E/W); lit-torch rooms hold the correct portal, dark dead-end rooms send you back to the start via a rope climb.

hints.note: Keep the minimap oriented north-up while tracking room order.

atoms.label: Talk to Swensen (receive his vote)
Talk to Thorvald the Warrior (learn about the Koschei fight)
atoms.detail: Helmet store. No weapons/armour/fletching materials/runes allowed; only food, Prayer, god books and jewellery.

atoms.label: Talk to Peer the Seer (bank forbidden items before the fight)
atoms.detail: Optional but recommended; drop wanted items first if you want to keep them for the fight instead of banking them.

atoms.label: Defeat Koschei the deathless (forms 1-3)
atoms.detail: Unarmed/unarmoured; rings of recoil, god books and prayer potions are the main tools. Form 3 has a 10-minute time limit before despawn.

hints.note: Form 1 can be trapped over a hole while HP regenerates; no safespot exists once armed with nothing.

atoms.label: Defeat Koschei's 4th form (optional, safe death on failure)
atoms.detail: 255 HP, hits 1 damage every tick, drains prayer instantly. Losing just ends the fight (safe death, even for HCIM) and still passes the trial.

hints.note: Each ring breaks after 40 damage soaked; 7 needed to tank the full 255 HP fight.

atoms.label: Talk to Thorvald (receive his vote)
atoms.detail: Grants a Fremennik blade if the 4th form was also defeated.

atoms.label: Talk to Peer the Seer (deposit ALL items, start the trial)
atoms.detail: Do this trial last -- every equipped and inventory item is banked, saving a walk to/from the bank for the other trials.

atoms.label: Solve Peer's four-letter riddle to enter the house
atoms.detail: Answer is one of: time, life, mage, fire, wind, mind, tree -- the specific clue quatrain varies per playthrough.

hints.note: Seven possible riddle/answer pairs are documented on the quest page; read the given clue each time rather than memorizing one answer.

atoms.label: Solve the water-balance chest puzzle (jug/bucket/vase/frozen key)
atoms.detail: Fill/pour the bucket and jug between the tap and drain to measure exactly 4/5 bucket for the chest (vase); burn the red herring on the range for sticky goop, apply it to the wooden disk for a second red disk, use both disks on the mural for the vase lid, seal the vase, freeze it on the frozen table, then cook the frozen key to thaw it.

hints.note: Bucket/jug ratio sequence for exactly 4/5 -- search every room object first (old red disk, wooden disk, red herring, empty jug, empty bucket).

atoms.label: Exit via the correct east ladder (receive Peer's vote)
atoms.detail: Use the east ladder nearest the frozen table -- the other exit repeats earlier puzzle parts.

atoms.label: Talk to Brundt the Chieftain (submit all 7 votes, finish the quest)

checkpoints.label: Manni the Reveller: drinking contest swap
Sigli the Huntsman: hunt the Draugen
Thorvald the Warrior: Koschei the deathless
Peer the Seer: item-free puzzle house

steps.detail: Intermediate quest requiring defeat of a level 112 Khazard warlord (safespottable). Talk to King Bolren (teleports you to the north-west corner of the maze), give Commander Montai 6 logs on the battlefield's south-west edge, then agree to help further. Talk to all 3 tracker gnomes around the Khazard Stronghold to get 4-digit ballista coordinates from riddles, then fire the south-west ballista with that code. Climb into the stronghold over the crumbled wall, ignore or kill the level 48 Khazard commanders, take an orb of protection from the upstairs chest, exit, and report to Elkoy to be sent to the village centre. Track down and kill the level 112 Khazard warlord north-west of the battlefield (safespottable near the West Ardougne wall) for the other two orbs, then return all 3 orbs to King Bolren to finish. Required for: Monkey Madness I, The Path of Glouphrie, Medium Western Provinces Diary, Medium Varrock Diary.

req_items.name: Normal logs
req_items.note: alternatively cut from goblin drops in the maze with an axe, or take from a stored canoe

hints.note: Quest reward XP — counts toward your skills, replacing that much training.

atoms.label: Talk to King Bolren (start Tree Gnome Village)
atoms.detail: Centre of the Tree Gnome Village maze, south-east of East Ardougne. Three orbs of protection have been stolen by Khazard troops.

atoms.label: Gather 6 normal logs (or kill goblins for them)
atoms.detail: Chop with an axe, kill maze goblins for spawns, or retrieve stored logs from the canoe station near the north entrance.

atoms.label: Talk to Commander Montai (give the 6 logs)
atoms.detail: North of the maze at the battlefield; wears red clothing.

atoms.label: Talk to Commander Montai again (learn 3 trackers are missing)
Talk to the first tracker gnome (get a coordinate)
atoms.detail: Behind/beside the biggest north-west building.

atoms.label: Talk to the second tracker gnome (Khazard Prison Cell, get a coordinate)
atoms.detail: North-east building.

atoms.label: Talk to the third tracker gnome (decode the riddled coordinate)
atoms.detail: Roaming outside the south-west stronghold corner; driven mad, gives a riddle instead of a number.

hints.note: Riddled number 1-4, e.g. 'less than my hands'=1, 'more than my head less than my fingers'=2.

atoms.label: Fire the ballista using the third tracker's coordinate
atoms.detail: South-west corner of the battlefield (not the catapult next to Montai); retry if you miss.

atoms.label: Talk to Commander Montai (proceed to the stronghold)
Fight through the stronghold to the chest (2 level-48 Khazard commanders, optional)
atoms.detail: Low HP (22 each); both fights can be skipped by simply running past them to the chest.

hints.note: Optional fight; skip both and head straight to the ladder/chest if you prefer.

atoms.label: Search the chest for the first orb of protection
Talk to King Bolren (report; learn the Warlord has the other two orbs)
atoms.detail: Return via Elkoy at the north-west maze entrance.

atoms.label: Kill the Khazard warlord (level 112, drops the last 2 orbs)
atoms.detail: North past the stronghold, near the West Ardougne wall; 170 HP. Unaggressive until spoken to.

hints.note: Ranged/Magic can wedge him against the wall near the large dead tree; melee flinch also works at the large skull to the south.

atoms.label: Talk to King Bolren (hand over all 3 orbs, finish quest)

checkpoints.label: Getting started: repair defences, find trackers

steps.detail: Very short early quest, beats level-34 Count Draynor (safespottable, high healing - garlic weakens him and is strongly recommended). Talk Morgan, grab garlic from his upstairs cupboard. Travel to the Blue Moon Inn in Varrock, buy a beer, talk Dr Harlow twice for a stake, buy a hammer from the general store just north of the inn. Head to Draynor Manor basement (east stairs, not the west room), open the coffin and kill Count Draynor with combat gear (hammer/stake just need to be in inventory, not actively used). Free F2P quest, low reqs, no known deeper dependency chain.

req_items.name: Hammer
req_items.note: costs 1 coin at the general store north of the Blue Moon Inn

hints.note: Quest reward XP — counts toward your skills, replacing that much training.

atoms.label: Talk to Morgan (start Vampyre Slayer)
atoms.detail: His house just north of Ned's in Draynor Village. Search the upstairs cupboard for garlic if not already carried.

atoms.label: Go to the Blue Moon Inn (Varrock)
Talk to Dr Harlow (he wants a drink first)
Buy a beer from the bartender
Give Dr Harlow the beer (receive the stake and advice)
atoms.detail: He advises the stake, a hammer to drive it in, and that vampyres dislike garlic.

atoms.label: Buy a hammer (Varrock General Store)
Go to Draynor Manor
Kill Count Draynor (level 34, in the coffin room)
atoms.detail: Open the coffin in the centre of the east basement room to start the fight. Garlic deals 10 dmg + debuffs his stats on first hit; without a hammer you cannot finish the kill. He heals to full and resets if the fight drags on too long.

hints.note: South-western corner between the staircase and skeleton; Magic recommended if flinching, since he regenerates ~6x normal rate.

atoms.label: Automatically stake Count Draynor (quest completes on the kill)

checkpoints.label: The vampyre threat: Morgan + Dr Harlow

steps.detail: Intermediate quest requiring the ability to withstand/evade level 86 Fire Giants and a level 84 Moss Guardian with no equipment (Glarial's Tomb bans gear). Talk to Almera, raft to the island, talk to Hudon then Hadley, find a Book on Baxtorian in an upstairs bookcase and read it. Enter the Tree Gnome Village maze/dungeon (worth starting Tree Gnome Village here too), find a key in a crate, unlock the west gate, and get Glarial's pebble from Golrie (keep it banked for Roving Elves later). Bank everything except the pebble, food, and a teleport method, use the pebble on Glarial's Tombstone east of the Waterfall to enter, and retrieve Glarial's amulet and urn from the tomb. Return with rope + 6 air/water/earth runes + amulet + urn: cross the raft/rope route into the waterfall dungeon, unlock the door past the Fire Giants, place one of each rune on 3 pillars, wear the amulet at Glarial's statue to raise the ground, then pour the urn into the chalice to finish. Required for: Desert Treasure I, Legends' Quest, Medium Kandarin Diary, Roving Elves, The Path of Glouphrie.

hints.note: Quest reward XP — counts toward your skills, replacing that much training.

atoms.label: Talk to Almera (start Waterfall Quest)
atoms.detail: House north-east of Baxtorian Falls; worried about her son Hudon across the river.

atoms.label: Board the log raft (crash onto the small island)
Talk to Hudon (finish all dialogue)
atoms.detail: He refuses to leave; complete every dialogue line or the book won't spawn downstream.

atoms.label: Swim south (wash ashore near the fisherman's building)
Search the southernmost bookcase (get the book on Baxtorian)
atoms.detail: Eastern wall, upstairs.

atoms.label: Read the book on Baxtorian
atoms.detail: Reveals Glarial's pebble is hidden under Tree Gnome Village. Must be read or the key won't appear later.

atoms.label: Go to the Tree Gnome Village maze
Find the key in the east room of the maze basement
atoms.detail: Slightly different-coloured crate next to the two stacked crates, south-east corner.

atoms.label: Unlock the door and talk to Golrie (receive Glarial's pebble)
atoms.detail: West room. Use the drop trick here for spare pebbles if planning Roving Elves later.

atoms.label: Go to Glarial's Tomb (south-east of Baxtorian Falls)
atoms.detail: Bank any prohibited items first (weapons, armour, capes, runes, arrows, logs) -- strict item restrictions inside.

atoms.label: Use Glarial's pebble on the tombstone (enter the tomb)
Search the western chest for Glarial's amulet (past the moss guardians)
atoms.detail: Attack a lower-level skeleton/zombie first to avoid aggroing the level-84 moss guardians in this single-combat area.

atoms.label: Search the southern coffin for Glarial's urn
atoms.detail: You cannot act while searching the coffin, but can still be attacked. Drop trick for spares recommended at low levels.

atoms.label: Return to Almera's house and board the raft again
Use rope on the grey rock (small patch of land downstream)
atoms.detail: Do not swim or touch the tree without the rope prepared first.

atoms.label: Use rope on the dead tree and climb it
Kill a Fire Giant (level 86, optional Kandarin Diary task)
atoms.detail: Single-combat cavern; attacking a shadow spider instead prevents Fire Giants from engaging if skipping this.

atoms.label: Search the crates in the eastern passage for a key

atoms.label: Place air, water and earth runes on each of the 6 pillars
atoms.detail: Follow the order carefully -- misplaced runes wash you out or deal up to 20 damage.

atoms.label: Use Glarial's amulet on the Statue of Glarial
atoms.detail: Warning: any item dropped in the pillar chamber becomes unretrievable after this.

Take the reward from the chalice (5 free inventory slots required)

checkpoints.label: Searching for treasure: Almera + Hudon + the book
The Chalice of Eternity: pillar puzzle + reward

steps.detail: Hetty the witch wants help brewing a potion. Gather four ingredients: kill a rat in the archery shop west of Hetty for a rat's tail, buy an eye of newt from Betty (3gp), kill a giant rat at the chapel south of Port Sarim for raw rat meat and burn it on Hetty's fireplace, and pick an onion from the field north of Rimmington. Bring all four to Hetty and drink from her cauldron to finish.

hints.note: Quest reward XP — counts toward your skills, replacing that much training.

atoms.label: Talk to Hetty (start Witch's Potion)
atoms.detail: South-east Rimmington. She needs a rat's tail, burnt meat, an eye of newt, and an onion.

atoms.label: Kill a level 1 rat for a rat's tail
atoms.detail: Archery shop west of Hetty's house. Rat's tail only drops once the quest is started; giant rats never drop it.

atoms.label: Burn a piece of meat (cook on Hetty's fireplace or purposely overcook)
atoms.detail: Kill a giant rat near the chapel graveyard or a cow south of Falador for raw meat; a player-lit fire also works.

atoms.label: Buy an eye of newt (Port Sarim magic shop)
Gather an onion
atoms.detail: Field north of Rimmington/east of Melzar's Maze, or Fred the Farmer's Lumbridge backyard.

atoms.label: Talk to Hetty (hand in all 4 ingredients, drink from the cauldron)

steps.detail: Novice quest gating a shortcut through White Wolf Mountain. Talk to either dwarf guarding the mountain's tunnel entrances (starting on the west side is faster on foot). Grab garlic from a house south-west of the Seers' Village bank if needed, take a spade to McGrubor's Wood and dig up 3 red vine worms from the vine just west of fairy ring ALS. Head to Hemenster, buy a fishing rod from Grandpa Jack if you don't have one, enter with the fishing pass, put garlic in the north pipes (finish the dialogue), pay Bonzo 5 coins and start fishing once the Sinister Stranger clears the pipes. After winning the contest, bring the trophy back to the dwarf to finish. Required for: Recipe for Disaster (Freeing the Mountain Dwarf), Forgettable Tale..., Between a Rock..., Land of the Goblins.

steps.detail: Talk to the Squire in the White Knights' Castle courtyard about his lost ceremonial sword. Talk to Reldo in the Varrock Palace library about the Imcando dwarves (skip if Thurgo was already met via The Giant Dwarf). Find Thurgo south of Port Sarim near the anvil (north of fairy ring AIQ) and give him a redberry pie, talk to him again, then return to the Squire. Climb to the White Knights' Castle 1st floor, go west and up the east staircase, and search the cupboard in Sir Vyvin's bedroom for a portrait while he isn't looking. Bring the portrait (and iron bars) to Thurgo. Enter the Asgarnian Ice Dungeon via the trapdoor east of Thurgo, follow the path west/north/east, and mine blurite ore along the southern wall of the icy area (mine a second if doing the Falador easy diary). Give Thurgo the iron bars and blurite ore to forge the replacement sword, then deliver the sword to the Squire to finish.

req_items.name: Redberry pie
req_items.note: must be a whole pie, not half

req_items.name: Iron bars
req_items.note: base amount to forge the Squire's replacement sword

req_items.name: Iron bars (extra)
req_items.note: only needed if you want your own personal blurite sword (4 total)

req_items.name: Blurite ore
req_items.note: mined in-quest at the Asgarnian Ice Dungeon

req_items.name: Blurite ore (extra)
req_items.note: only needed for a spare sword and/or the Falador easy diary task

req_items.name: Pickaxe
req_items.note: a free pickaxe spawns in Rimmington

hints.note: Quest reward XP — counts toward your skills, replacing that much training.

atoms.label: Talk to the Squire (start The Knight's Sword)
atoms.detail: Courtyard of the White Knights' Castle, Falador. He lost Sir Vyvin's ceremonial sword.

atoms.label: Talk to Reldo (learn of Thurgo the Imcando dwarf)
atoms.detail: Varrock Palace library, ground floor. Skip if The Giant Dwarf is already complete.

atoms.label: Cook a redberry pie
atoms.detail: Pie dish from the Varrock Palace kitchen, redberries just west of the South-east Varrock mine. 10 Cooking.

atoms.label: Go to Thurgo's hut (Mudskipper Point, south of Port Sarim)
Give Thurgo the redberry pie (ask about a special sword)
Search Sir Vyvin's cupboard for the portrait
atoms.detail: Upper floor of the White Knights' Castle; wait for Sir Vyvin to leave the room or hop worlds.

hints.note: He blocks the search if inside and facing you.

atoms.label: Give Thurgo the portrait
Mine 1-3 blurite ore (Asgarnian Ice Dungeon)
atoms.detail: All enemies aggressive -- run past pirates north then east to the icy room; safespot in front of the wyvern-section entrance. 10 Mining. Mine 2-3 for Falador Diary/an extra sword.

atoms.label: Give Thurgo the iron bars and blurite ore (craft the sword)
atoms.detail: Ask for a replacement after dropping the first if you want your own blurite sword.

atoms.label: Give the Squire the blurite sword (finish quest)

checkpoints.label: Acquiring the picture: Sir Vyvin's portrait

steps.detail: Short intro quest that unlocks the Giants' Foundry minigame; only real requirement is 15 Smithing. Repair 3 broken machines inside the giant-sized workshop (polishing wheel, grindstone, trip hammer) using found parts, then forge one sword start to finish: pick the 3 correctly-shaped mould pieces (forte/blade/tip), pour molten metal from the crucible, cool/heat the preform on the waterfall and lava pool, and alternate trip-hammer -> grindstone -> polishing-wheel passes while watching the heat gauge (working outside the right heat band lowers sword quality).

hints.note: Quest reward XP — counts toward your skills, replacing that much training.

atoms.label: Bank: withdraw Sleeping Giants loadout
atoms.detail: Withdraw: 3 oak logs, 1 wool (ball of wool does not work), 10 nails, a hammer or Imcando hammer, a chisel, and 1 bucket of water or ice gloves. 20 free inventory spaces for the crate-search step.

atoms.label: Strike the odd Hill Giant (Kovac) to start Sleeping Giants
atoms.detail: Giants' Plateau, east of Al Kharid, by a giant anvil. He has a 'Strike' option instead of 'Attack'.

atoms.label: Repair the trip hammer (1 oak log, 5 nails)
Repair the grindstone (chisel)
Repair the polishing wheel (2 oak logs, 5 nails, 1 wool)
Talk to Kovac (accept the practice-sword commission)
Drop items, search the crate for bronze/iron pieces
atoms.detail: Instanced room -- pick up any dropped items before talking to Kovac or they're lost. Needs 20 empty inventory spaces for up to 20 seconds.

atoms.label: Use the metal pieces on the crucible until full
Talk to Kovac, set the forte/blade/tip mould to match the commission
Talk to Kovac, pour the crucible into the mould jig (get the preform)
atoms.detail: No weapon/shield equipped when cooling with the bucket of water; ice gloves skip the bucket step.

atoms.label: Refine the preform: heat, hammer, cool, grind, cool, polish
atoms.detail: Heat on the lava pool to red, hit with the Trip Hammer while staying red, cool at the waterfall to near-green, use the Grindstone to green, cool again to high-green, then use the Polishing Wheel to finish. Any quality sword satisfies Kovac.

atoms.label: Talk to Kovac (deliver the sword, learn of Obor, finish quest)

steps.detail: Pick a method: Oak trees / Quest experience.

methods.location: Draynor Village, Seers' Village, Varrock, Falador, or Hosidius, near a bank
methods.notes: The page keeps recommending oak past level 30 too, saying oak edges out willow on xp rate all the way to level 35.

methods.location: Monk's Friend, Enlightened Journey, Icthlarin's Little Helper, Recipe for Disaster (Skrach Uglogwee)
methods.notes: The same quest batch that carries level 1-15 continues to cover this band up to level 26 before oak chopping is needed to close the gap to 30.

atoms.label: Equip best available hatchet
atoms.detail: Equip (or withdraw+equip) the best hatchet your Attack/Woodcutting level allows.

atoms.label: Go to the Draynor Village oak trees
atoms.detail: Draynor Village, tile (3088,3255) per the route's own map pin; bank is adjacent.

atoms.label: Chop oak logs until Woodcutting 30
atoms.detail: Bank oak logs -- this run's stock is the non-GE source for the very next band (train-firemaking-30 burns these).

hints.note: Bank extra oak logs beyond what's needed here -- xref: pays off at train-firemaking-30, next in route order.

steps.detail: Pick a method: Oak logs (chop at Draynor) / Coloured firelighter logs / Pyre logs, 1-tick creation.

methods.location: Draynor Village oak trees
methods.notes: Continuity method matching the row's own label; oak logs are not a distinct entry in the current Firemaking training page's fastest-xp table (it groups 1-30 under coloured firelighter logs), so citing the row's pre-existing refs rather than inventing a fresh citation.

methods.location: Varrock west bank (chop your own logs; apply a firelighter -- never GE)
methods.notes: Page's own table lists coloured firelighter logs as guaranteed-to-light and the fastest xp/hr through level 30.

methods.location: Bank with sacred oil and logs in inventory
methods.notes: Tick-manipulated pyre-log creation gives the fastest xp up to level 30; gated behind Shades of Mort'ton completion.

atoms.label: Bank: withdraw tinderbox + banked oak logs
atoms.detail: Withdraw a tinderbox and the oak logs banked in the immediately preceding band (train-woodcutting-30) -- own-chopped, never bought.

atoms.label: Burn oak logs until Firemaking 30
atoms.detail: Light logs one at a time (per-log burning stays inside this loop's detail, U4). Any open ground works.

steps.detail: Help Dr Fenkenstrain build a monster: read two books for a memorial-opening amulet, dig up a head in the vampyre-infested Haunted Woods, kill an Experiment in the Experiment Cave for body parts, sew the parts together, get a shed key from the Gardener Ghost, extend a garden brush for a conductor mould, smelt a silver bar into a conductor at a furnace, repair the castle's lightning conductor to power the monster, then pickpocket Fenkenstrain for the ring of charos once the monster is animated.

req_items.name: 50 coins
req_items.note: or 1 law rune + 1 air rune, for Telekinetic Grab

hints.note: Quest reward XP — counts toward your skills, replacing that much training.

atoms.label: Read the Canifis signpost (start Creature of Fenkenstrain)
atoms.detail: Advertises a 'Braindead Butler' job; talk to Dr Fenkenstrain directly if the signpost claims requirements aren't met.

atoms.label: Take the pickled brain from the pub table (or buy it from Roavar)
atoms.detail: Pub south of the signpost. Roavar offers to sell it for 50 coins if not taken free; Telekinetic Grab (33 Magic) also avoids paying.

atoms.label: Talk to Dr Fenkenstrain (job interview: 'braindead', 'grave-digging')
atoms.detail: Inside Fenkenstrain's Castle. He needs a brain, head, torso, arms and legs to build a body.

atoms.label: Search both castle bookcases for the marble and obsidian amulets, combine them
atoms.detail: West bookcase ('The Joy of Grave Digging') gives marble amulet, east bookcase ('Handy Maggot Avoidance Techniques') gives obsidian amulet; use them on each other.

atoms.label: Dig Ed Lestwit's grave for a decapitated head
atoms.detail: South-east of fairy ring ALQ. Read the grave first to confirm it, then dig with a spade.

atoms.label: Use the pickled brain on the decapitated head
Use the star amulet on the eastern memorial (enter the cave)
atoms.detail: Tombstones east of the castle, west of the Farming patches. Unaggressive level 25/51 Experiments inside.

atoms.label: Kill a level 51 Experiment for the cavern key
atoms.detail: South-west crevice; safespottable with ranged/magic or flinchable with melee from the entrance.

hints.note: Kill extra level-25 Experiments here for Experiment bones if that quest is in progress.

atoms.label: Dig the three northern graves for legs, arms and a torso
atoms.detail: Through the north-west passage past the gate, up the ladder.

atoms.label: Give Fenkenstrain all body parts and the sewing kit
atoms.detail: Requires a needle (costume needle does not work) and 5 thread, brought as owned items.

atoms.label: Talk to the Gardener Ghost (get the shed key)
atoms.detail: Requires an equipped ghostspeak amulet.

atoms.label: Search the shed cupboard for the garden brush
Combine 3 garden canes and bronze wire with the brush
atoms.detail: Garden canes are east of the shed. 20 Crafting.

atoms.label: Sweep the west-room fireplace for a conductor mould
atoms.detail: 1F west room. Aim for the centre of the fireplace, not the surround.

atoms.label: Make a lightning rod at a furnace (silver bar + mould)
atoms.detail: Port Phasmatys furnace (2 ecto-tokens, free after Ghosts Ahoy) is nearest; any furnace works with a return method to the castle.

atoms.label: Fix the lightning conductor on the castle roof
atoms.detail: Climb to the roof via the southernmost 1F room; lightning strikes and the creature comes alive.

atoms.label: Talk to Dr Fenkenstrain (get the tower key)
Climb to the tower and talk to Lord Rologarth
atoms.detail: Reveals the true story -- Fenkenstrain sold him and his subjects to the vampyres.

atoms.label: Pickpocket Dr Fenkenstrain for the ring of charos
atoms.detail: 25 Thieving.

atoms.label: Talk to Dr Fenkenstrain or Lord Rologarth (finish quest)

steps.detail: Find the chieftain's missing daughter for the isolated Mountain Camp tribe: pole-vault and mud-climb a wilderness route to a talking magic pool, broker peace between the camp and Rellekka (mine a sample of ancient rock, get safe passage), find a hardy food plant on White Wolf Mountain, then kill The Kendal (level 70, melee-only, safespottable) in a cave to recover the daughter's remains and give her a proper burial.

hints.note: Quest reward XP — counts toward your skills, replacing that much training.

atoms.label: Go to the Mountain Camp (east of Rellekka)
atoms.detail: Use rope on the boulder marked 'push boulder' north up the slope above the guard to climb down.

atoms.label: Talk to Hamal the Chieftain (start Mountain Daughter)
atoms.detail: Ask 'Why is everyone so hostile?' in the longhouse east of the entrance.

atoms.label: Gather mud from the pond roots (or bring swamp paste)
atoms.detail: South of Hamal's house, along the bubbling mud pond edge.

atoms.label: Pick up the pole at Jokul's place (if no staff carried)
atoms.detail: North of Hamal's house.

atoms.label: Cross to the island in the Shining pool (mud, tree, pole-vault, plank)
atoms.detail: Use mud on the tall tree to avoid slipping, climb and crawl the branch, pole-vault the rock clump, cross the flat stone with a plank.

atoms.label: Listen to the Shining pool bubbles (talk to Asleif's spirit)
atoms.detail: She asks for peace between the tribes and a new food source; both tasks can be started in parallel.

atoms.label: Find and talk to Svidi (outside Keldagrim, near the black unicorns)
atoms.detail: Choose 'Can't I persuade you to go in there somehow?' -- the other option makes him flee.

atoms.label: Talk to Brundt the Chieftain in Rellekka (get a safety promise)
atoms.detail: He wants the stolen ancient rock relic returned first.

atoms.label: Mine the ancient rock in the Mountain Camp's southern tent
atoms.detail: Right-click the rock with a pickaxe -- left-click does not work.

atoms.label: Give Brundt the rock (receive the safety guarantee)
Give Svidi the safety guarantee (peace talks begin)
Talk to Jokul (learn a White pearl fruit seed could feed the camp)
Pick a White pearl fruit on White Wolf Mountain's peak (wear gloves)
atoms.detail: Thorny bushes near the gnome glider; gloves required or 4 damage is taken and no fruit obtained. Eating the fruit auto-spits the seed.

atoms.label: Give Hamal the White pearl seed
Talk to Asleif again (learn about the Kendal)
atoms.detail: Requires both peace and food tasks complete; cross via tree/pole-vault/plank again.

atoms.label: Chop the dead trees blocking the cave entrance
atoms.detail: North side of the pool, path east; stand west of the first tree to avoid getting stuck on the stump.

atoms.label: Talk to the Kendal (accuse him, trigger the fight)
atoms.detail: Dialogue: 'no one special' -> 'a sacrifice?' -> call out the bearsuit -> demand her remains -> threaten to kill him.

atoms.label: Kill the Kendal (level 70, 50 HP)
atoms.detail: Protect from Melee blocks all damage; Ranged/Magic can safespot around the skeletons. A new Kendal spawns after each kill if repeating the safespot -- a cannon will re-aggro it.

atoms.label: Take Asleif's corpse (south-eastern pillar corner)
Gather 5 muddy rocks (mountain goat pen)
atoms.detail: Rocks respawn quickly -- fine to reuse the same one repeatedly.

atoms.label: Talk to Ragnar (receive Asleif's necklace)
atoms.detail: Just past the tall tree, up the path from the pen.

atoms.label: Cross to the island again and bury Asleif's corpse
atoms.detail: Tall tree, pole-vault, plank -- same crossing as before.

atoms.label: Use the muddy rocks on the burial mound (build the cairn, finish quest)

checkpoints.label: Making peace: Svidi + Brundt + ancient rock
The Kendal: dead trees + boss fight

steps.detail: Short desert quest. Read a letter near the broken golem, repair it with 4 soft clay, ask about the portal. Grab a black mushroom (grind for black dye) and a strange implement from the ruins basement (both reusable for Shadow of the Storm if doing that soon after). Talk to Elissa at the Digsite, read Varmen's notes in the Exam Centre bookcase, then talk to Curator Haig Halen at Varrock Museum about the Uzer statuette, pickpocket him for the display cabinet key, and take the statuette from an upstairs case. Return to Uzer, place the statuette in an empty alcove, rotate 4 statues to all face north to open the portal north; optionally chisel the throne for 2 each of sapphire/emerald/ruby. Make a phoenix quill pen (feather + black dye) and write the golem program on papyrus, then use the strange implement on the golem followed immediately by the program to finish. Region-opener with no known deeper dependency; sets up the desert quest line (Uzer).

hints.note: Quest reward XP — counts toward your skills, replacing that much training.

atoms.label: Buy papyrus from Ali Morrisane
Gather 4 soft clay (mine with a bracelet of clay, or clay + water)
atoms.detail: North-west of the ruins with a bracelet of clay + pickaxe, or use a jug of water from the Oasis south of Uzer on mined clay (world-hop to respawn the jug).

atoms.label: Steal a phoenix feather from the Desert Phoenix
atoms.detail: North-west of the ruins near the clay mine; 25 Thieving. Also completes a medium Desert Diary task.

atoms.label: Talk to the clay golem (start The Golem)
atoms.detail: Ruins of Uzer, east of Shantay Pass.

atoms.label: Use soft clay on the golem (repair it)
Ask the golem how to open the portal (learn of the 4 temple statuettes)
Take and read the letter outside the temple ruins
atoms.detail: Describes a discontinued expedition after the Digsite (Varrock) opened.

atoms.label: Pick a black mushroom just inside the temple entrance
