steps.detail: Pick a method: Cook trout and salmon caught at Barbarian Village fishing spots on a nearby fire or range / Continue with pike (20-25) then salmon (25-30) from the page's current low-tier fish table at a bank-adjacent fire or range / Cook tuna for levels 30-40 at the Hosidius Kitchen (or Myths' Guild/Mor Ul Rek range), from the page's Levels 30-99 fish table / 1-tick cook cooked karambwan from level 30 onward after completing Tai Bwo Wannai Trio, for the fastest cooking xp in the game.

methods.method: Cook trout and salmon caught at Barbarian Village fishing spots on a nearby fire or range
methods.location: Barbarian Village fishing spots
methods.notes: Matches the row's own detail; the current page's Levels 1-30 fish table lists trout 15-20 and salmon 25-30, so this covers the lower part of the band.

methods.method: Continue with pike (20-25) then salmon (25-30) from the page's current low-tier fish table at a bank-adjacent fire or range
methods.location: any bank-adjacent fire or range
methods.notes: Rounds out the table's remaining rows above trout, up to the table's own ceiling of 30.

methods.method: Cook tuna for levels 30-40 at the Hosidius Kitchen (or Myths' Guild/Mor Ul Rek range), from the page's Levels 30-99 fish table
methods.location: Hosidius Kitchen
methods.notes: Page gives an approximate xp/h range for tuna (85,000-100,000, with a 143,500 theoretical figure) rather than one clean number, so xp_hr is left unknown rather than picking a value from the range.

methods.method: 1-tick cook cooked karambwan from level 30 onward after completing Tai Bwo Wannai Trio, for the fastest cooking xp in the game
methods.location: Rogues' Den / Myths' Guild / Mor Ul Rek
methods.notes: Page's per-level 1-tick table starts at level 30 (464,000 xp/h 1-tick, 141,000 AFK); left as ?? since it is not an exact band-boundary figure.

atoms.label: Bank: withdraw fly-fishing loadout
atoms.detail: Fly fishing rod + feathers (trout/salmon), tinderbox + logs for the cooking fire.

atoms.label: Go to Barbarian Village fishing spot
atoms.detail: Fishing spot with an adjacent fire, per the coarse row's own mapMarker.

atoms.label: Fly-fish trout and salmon
atoms.detail: Own-caught, never bought -- feeds the produce loop below.

atoms.label: Cook trout and salmon on the Barbarian Village fire until Cooking 40
atoms.detail: Buy roughly 2.5x more raw fish than the successfully-cooked amount needed at low levels per the burn-rate table (own-caught here, not bought). Trout 70xp/success (15-20), pike 80xp (20-25), salmon 90xp (25-30); continue with tuna at Hosidius Kitchen for 30-40 per the page's own level split.

hints.note: Burn rate is fairly high at low Cooking levels per Pay-to-play_Cooking_training.s3's own note; exact per-level figures not in the fetched table.

atoms.label: Alt: Cook tuna at Hosidius Kitchen (levels 30-40)
atoms.detail: 85,000-100,000 xp/h per Pay-to-play_Cooking_training.s8's own table; own-caught tuna, not bought.

checkpoints.label: Barbarian Village trout/salmon (Hosidius tuna optional continuation)

steps.detail: Pick a method: Cook lobsters from level 40 onward, wearing cooking gauntlets to reduce the burn rate / Bake pies with the Bake Pie spell after completing Lunar Diplomacy, for fast semi-AFK xp with passive Magic xp as a side effect / Make jugs of wine from level 35 onward, mainly to push through to level 68 rather than as a primary method since a jug of bad wine can fail for 0 xp below 68.

hints.note: Burn-stop table lives on a separate page (Cooking/Burn level) per items-domain gotcha — not re-verified here, XREF: items:

methods.method: Cook lobsters from level 40 onward, wearing cooking gauntlets to reduce the burn rate
methods.location: Hosidius Kitchen (levels 40-61), then Rogues' Den (61-68)
methods.notes: Row's original ref pointed at s4 (the karambwan section), which does not mention lobster; corrected the citation to s8, which holds the Levels 30-99 fish table with lobster at 40-68. Page's xp/h is a range (120,000-165,000, with a 172,000 figure) rather than a clean single number.

methods.method: Bake pies with the Bake Pie spell after completing Lunar Diplomacy, for fast semi-AFK xp with passive Magic xp as a side effect
methods.location: any location with spell access and an astral rune supply
methods.notes: Page's per-pie xp/h table (e.g. garden pie at 34 = 260,000, fish pie at 47 = 309,000) doesn't land on the row's exact band edges, so left as ??.

methods.method: Make jugs of wine from level 35 onward, mainly to push through to level 68 rather than as a primary method since a jug of bad wine can fail for 0 xp below 68
methods.location: a bank near grapes and jugs of water, e.g. Catherby
methods.notes: Page states the pre-68 use case is mainly to level up quickly (fail chance scales with level), not for xp rate.

atoms.label: Bank: withdraw lobster-fishing loadout
atoms.detail: Lobster pot, cooking gauntlets equipped (Family Crest quest) to reduce the burn rate.

atoms.label: Cage-fish lobster at Catherby
atoms.detail: Own-caught at the Catherby fishing spots, never bought.

atoms.label: Cook lobster at Catherby until Cooking 58
atoms.detail: 120,000-165,000 xp/h per Pay-to-play_Cooking_training.s8's 40-68 table (this band trains 40-58, a sub-range of it). Stop burning at 74, or 68 with cooking gauntlets, per the coarse row's own hint.

hints.note: Carried from the coarse row's own hint; burn-stop table lives on a separate page (Cooking/Burn level) per the [items] domain gotcha, not re-verified here.

atoms.label: Bank: deposit cooked lobster
atoms.detail: Bank the cooked lobster as a food supply for later combat training.

steps.detail: Semi-consistent GP and gear. Entry-level bossing in Morytania.

mapMarkers.label: Barrows entrance (six burial mounds, east of Mort'ton)

hints.note: List order = fastest-to-slowest per the wiki's own ranking. Minigame Teleport to Shades of Mort'ton needs the Shades of Mort'ton quest but is free/no inventory slot, 20-min cooldown.

steps.detail: Pickpocket the Zealot's key, descend through the Abandoned Mine's cave levels, solve a lever/points puzzle to route a minecart carrying a light-giving glowing fungus, retrieve the fungus, open a water valve to access a lift, then fight Treus Dayth (level 95 but notably harder than the level suggests -- ranged/magic + Protect from Missiles recommended, not a safe death fight since the fungus is lost on death) before cutting a crystal outcrop to finish.

hints.note: Quest reward XP — counts toward your skills, replacing that much training.

atoms.label: Travel to the Abandoned Mine
atoms.detail: South-west Morytania, south of the swamp, west of Mort'ton/Burgh de Rott. Reach it via Nature Spirit access, a Mort'ton/Barrows teleport, or the Agility-25 low-fence shortcut from Burgh de Rott (needs partial In Aid of the Myreque).

atoms.label: Talk to the Saradominist zealot (start Haunted Mine)
atoms.detail: Wandering between the mine and the swamp. Pick any non-Zamorak response. He explains Treus Dayth, a Zamorakian mage bound to guard Salve-amulet crystals deep in the mine, and that he holds a key to a lower second entrance.

atoms.label: Pickpocket the zealot's key
atoms.detail: The key drops to the floor if your inventory is full.

atoms.label: Enter the Abandoned Mine
atoms.detail: Follow the cart track south past feral vampyres; climb over the mine cart (Agility 15) into the cart tunnel, or without 15 Agility use the southern entrance on the mountain's west side instead.

atoms.label: Navigate the upper cave levels to the level-3 ladder
atoms.detail: Dormant corpse-skeletons wake on approach, possessed pickaxes may attack when picked up, and self-moving carts damage on contact. Follow the cart track west, exit west, re-enter the southern entrance, ladder down, east then ladder down again, then time the north-south cart (wait for it to head south, follow, hide in the western alcove, then dash to the ladder when it returns north).

atoms.label: Pick a glowing fungus
atoms.detail: Stagnant pool west of the level-3 ladder. This is the only usable light source deeper in the mine -- never carry it outside the cave or drop it, both crumble it to ash.

atoms.label: Route the mine cart to the north-west ladder
atoms.detail: Place the fungus in the searchable cart north-west of the pool, then set the ten junction levers (A-E south-east of the control panel, F-J north around the corner; F/G/H are fixed/inaccessible) so the panel's route sends the cart to the top-right ladder. Press start; re-set levers and retry if it sinks or returns.

hints.note: Starting lever positions are randomised per player; the target route is fixed.

atoms.label: Retrieve the fungus at the north-west ladder
atoms.detail: Backtrack over the top of the mine, exit west, through the northern cave, down to the north-west corner ladder, and search the cart to reclaim the fungus that arrived.

atoms.label: Pick up a chisel (if not already carried)
atoms.detail: Crate spawn in the side cave east of the flooded tracks.

atoms.label: Open the water valve and take the lift down
atoms.detail: Around the large pipe near the flooded tracks: use the zealot's key on the valve to start the water flow, then run back and take the lift before a mischievous ghost shuts it off (retry the valve if the ghost wins).

atoms.label: Reach the crane-and-cart boss chamber
atoms.detail: From the flooded chamber (lit by the fungus), follow the east track past possessed pickaxes, down the stairs, into the loading-crane chamber. Do not take the innocent-looking key until ready for the fight.

atoms.label: Fight the ghost of Treus Dayth
atoms.detail: Taking the innocent-looking key summons the level-95 ghost. He teleports invisible between attacks (yellow minimap arrow marks his location) using mine carts (up to 9 dmg/tick on cart tracks -- run across instead of standing), possessed cranes (up to 10 dmg adjacent), thrown pickaxes (up to 15, Protect Missiles only reduces ~33%), and rare melee. Magic is recommended (weak to Wind/Crumble Undead); retreat through the east door any time to heal safely -- his HP doesn't reset.

hints.note: Boss keeps its current HP if you retreat and return.

atoms.label: Cut a salve shard from the crystal outcrop
atoms.detail: Climb back to level 5, take the second staircase down; the crystal-mine key opens the crystal room. Use a chisel on a crystal outcrop (Crafting 35) -- cut a couple extra as backup. Quest completes on returning to the surface.

checkpoints.label: Preparation + the mysteries of Mort Ridge
Into the depths + getting a light

steps.detail: Pick a method: Offer wyvern/dragon bones at a gilded altar / Offer dragon bones at the Chaos Temple altar / Reanimate ensouled dragon heads near the Dark Altar.

methods.method: Offer wyvern/dragon bones at a gilded altar
methods.location: player-owned house gilded altar (or a hosted altar, e.g. worlds 330/465/512 at Rimmington)
methods.notes: Page states 643,000 xp/hr for dragon bones with both burners lit; wyvern bones share the same 72-xp-per-bone bury value on the page's own offering table but no page-stated altar hourly rate.

methods.method: Offer dragon bones at the Chaos Temple altar
methods.location: Chaos Temple, level 38 Wilderness (multi-combat, player-killer risk)
methods.notes: Page states up to 860,000 xp/hr bringing noted dragon bones (500,000 xp/hr suiciding instead); cheaper than the gilded altar but carries PK risk.

methods.method: Reanimate ensouled dragon heads near the Dark Altar
methods.location: Arceuus, Dark Altar (fairy ring code CIS)
methods.notes: Page states ~343,000 xp/hr reanimating and killing ensouled dragon heads (220/hr); heads are gathered as monster drops rather than bought, and this is the only head-tier the page gives a concrete hourly rate for.

atoms.label: Bank: withdraw dragon bones + food
atoms.detail: Dragon bones (own-farmed from earlier dragon/wyvern kills, source ??, never bought) + food ??x for the Wilderness trip.

atoms.label: Go to the Chaos Temple altar (level 38 Wilderness)
atoms.detail: Multi-combat area, player-killer risk. Coordinates not pinned by the fetched section -- left ??.

hints.note: PK risk in the Wilderness; the gilded altar alt (player-owned house, Construction 75, 643,000 xp/h) avoids this entirely but is gated on a Construction level not assumed reached here.

atoms.label: Offer dragon bones at the Chaos Temple altar until Prayer 74
atoms.detail: 860,000 xp/h per Pay-to-play_Prayer_training.s14 -- the highest-rate altar option with no skill/quest gate, at the cost of Wilderness PK exposure.

methods.notes: Page calls this the fastest viable real-time method: Ice Burst ~250,000-310,000 xp/h, Ice Barrage ~320,000-400,000 xp/h depending on active vs AFK play.

methods.location: Level 10-11 Wilderness, near the Chaos altar

methods.method: Bursting/Barraging bandits at the Bandit Camp

methods.notes: Requires a Saradomin/Zamorak item plus an Ancient Magicks autocast weapon; page states ~150,000-235,000 xp/h bursting, ~230,000-305,000 xp/h barraging.

steps.detail: Grants Cooking gauntlets (stop burning food) and Goldsmith gauntlets (Smithing XP boost).

atoms.label: Talk to Dimintheis (start Family Crest)
atoms.detail: Fenced house above the clothes shop, south-eastern Varrock. Agree to help; his three sons split the family crest into pieces decades ago and scattered; his son Caleb now cooks in Catherby.

atoms.label: Travel to Catherby
Ask Caleb for his crest piece
atoms.detail: Inside or near the sink building south of the Farming shop. Confirm his identity, ask what happened to the crest (mandatory to unlock the other pieces), then agree to bring fish-salad ingredients.

atoms.label: Gather 5 cooked fish for Caleb
atoms.detail: One each of cooked shrimp, salmon, tuna, bass, and swordfish. Ironman note (named non-GE vendors, no substitution needed for a normal account): raw fish from Frankie's Fishing Emporium (Port Piscarilius), cooked salmon from the West Ardougne General Store, cooked swordfish from the Shrimp and Parrot in Brimhaven (also a Tribal Totem reward), cooked bass from the Warrior Guild Food Shop.

atoms.label: Deliver the fish to Caleb for his crest piece
atoms.detail: He hands over his crest piece and mentions brother Avan was last seen searching the desert for treasure.

atoms.label: Ask the Al Kharid gem trader about Avan
atoms.detail: North Al Kharid, by the gnome glider. He recalls Avan searching for 'perfect gold' in the sand dunes.

atoms.label: Find Avan at the Al Kharid mine
atoms.detail: Wandering the northern Al Kharid mine pit entrance, wearing a yellow cape. He wants a ring and necklace of 'perfect gold' to win a lady's affection and mentions a dwarf named Boot who may know a source.

atoms.label: Ask Boot about perfect gold
atoms.detail: Down the trapdoor behind the eastern building of the Dwarven Mine (west of Edgeville Monastery); Boot wanders south-west of the entrance by the rock columns. He points to the Witchaven Dungeon east of Ardougne. Must be spoken to before Avan will accept the finished jewellery, even though it can technically be mined/smithed beforehand.

atoms.label: Solve the Witchaven Dungeon lever puzzle
atoms.detail: Enter and head north-east past hobgoblin/ogre rooms (Protect from Melee negates all their damage; no kills required). Six-step sequence to permanently unlock the hellhound room: north-room outer lever up; south room via east door, inner lever up, exit west door; north room outer lever down then inner lever up; north room outer lever up again; south room via west door, lever down, exit east door.

atoms.label: Mine 2 perfect gold ore
atoms.detail: In the unlocked hellhound room, mine the gold rocks (Mining 40) while zigzagging the level-122 hellhounds' short aggro range; a safespot exists behind the rock column south of the entrance if aggro is drawn (world-hop to reset a mined rock).

atoms.label: Smelt and smith the perfect ring and necklace
atoms.detail: At any furnace (Al Kharid is convenient for the Avan hand-off): smelt the 2 perfect gold ore into bars (Smithing 40), then use the ring mould and necklace mould with 2 cut rubies to smith a perfect ring and perfect necklace (Crafting 40) -- do not pick the plain gold jewellery menu options.

atoms.label: Give Avan the jewellery for his crest piece
atoms.detail: He hands over his crest piece and directs you to Johnathon at the Jolly Boar Inn north-east of Varrock.

atoms.label: Cure Johnathon with an antipoison potion
atoms.detail: 1F of the Jolly Boar Inn, north-west room. He's delirious from a poisonous spider bite -- use any antipoison potion on him (fully consumed regardless of dose).

atoms.label: Weaken and kill Chronozon for the last crest piece
atoms.detail: Johnathon lost the crest fighting Chronozon (level 170) in the Wilderness section of Edgeville Dungeon, by the poison spiders near the Earth obelisk. Cast Wind, Water, Earth, and Fire Blast, landing one confirmed hit each ('Chronozon weakens...' in chat), in any order, then finish with any style. A safespot exists one tile in front of the eastern standing torch.

hints.note: This is a Wilderness fight -- other players can attack you.

atoms.label: Reassemble the crest and return it to Dimintheis
atoms.detail: Combine the three crest pieces, return to Varrock, and hand the crest to Dimintheis. Quest complete -- pick one of Caleb's/Avan's/Johnathon's gauntlet imbuements.

steps.detail: Pick a method: Cook swordfish (levels 68-80) then shark (80-84) at the Hosidius Kitchen or Rogues' Den, wearing cooking gauntlets to reduce the burn rate / Cook lobster up to level 68 before switching to swordfish, per the page's Levels 30-99 fish table / 1-tick cook cooked karambwan (after completing Tai Bwo Wannai Trio) for the fastest cooking xp through this band / Bake pies with the Bake Pie spell (after Lunar Diplomacy) as a lower-attention alternative.

methods.method: Cook swordfish (levels 68-80) then shark (80-84) at the Hosidius Kitchen or Rogues' Den, wearing cooking gauntlets to reduce the burn rate
methods.location: Hosidius Kitchen / Rogues' Den
methods.notes: Row's original ref pointed at s3 (the Levels 1-30 low-tier fish table), which has no swordfish/shark content; corrected the citation to s8, where these fish actually appear.

methods.method: Cook lobster up to level 68 before switching to swordfish, per the page's Levels 30-99 fish table
methods.location: Hosidius Kitchen
methods.notes: Lobster's own table row spans 40-68, overlapping the lower part of this band.

methods.method: 1-tick cook cooked karambwan (after completing Tai Bwo Wannai Trio) for the fastest cooking xp through this band
methods.location: Rogues' Den / Myths' Guild / Mor Ul Rek
methods.notes: Page's per-level table gives 742,000 xp/h (1-tick) at level 70, but that isn't an exact band-boundary figure so xp_hr is left ??.

methods.method: Bake pies with the Bake Pie spell (after Lunar Diplomacy) as a lower-attention alternative
methods.location: any location with spell access
methods.notes: Admiral pie (70) and dragonfruit pie (73) fall within this band per the page's pie xp table.

atoms.label: Continue cooking lobster (Catherby) to Cooking 68
atoms.detail: Reuses tck58-03's exact loop past its own 58 threshold (U8) -- Pay-to-play_Cooking_training.s8's own table keeps lobster the recommended method through level 68, not just 58.

atoms.label: Bank: withdraw swordfish-fishing loadout
atoms.detail: Harpoon, cooking gauntlets equipped (reduces burn rate for swordfish per Pay-to-play_Cooking_training.s8).

atoms.label: Harpoon-fish swordfish at the Hosidius Kitchen coast
atoms.detail: Own-caught, never bought. Exact fishing-spot tile not pinned by the fetched section -- left ??.

atoms.label: Cook swordfish at the Hosidius Kitchen until Cooking 74
atoms.detail: 165,000-200,000 xp/h per Pay-to-play_Cooking_training.s8's 68-80 table (this band trains 68-74, a sub-range). Hosidius Kitchen ranges give +5%/+10% success chance after the easy/elite Kourend & Kebos Diary.

atoms.label: Bank: deposit cooked swordfish
atoms.detail: Bank as a food supply.

checkpoints.label: Lobster continuation to 68, then swordfish at Hosidius Kitchen to 74

steps.detail: Unlocks Zanaris and cosmic rune altar. Grants access to dragon weaponry.

hints.note: start: ask about Zanaris

atoms.label: Ask the Warrior about Zanaris
atoms.detail: Speak to the Warrior camped north-west of Lumbridge Swamp and ask what he's guarding and who Zanaris is.

hints.note: What are you camped here for? -> Who's Zanaris? -> If it's hidden how are you planning to find it? -> Looks like you don't know either.

atoms.label: Chop (don't chop down) the nearby tree
atoms.detail: Go to the tree closest to the Warrior's encampment and right-click it, choosing the 'chop' option rather than 'chop down'. This makes Shamus appear.

atoms.label: Speak to Shamus
atoms.detail: Talk to Shamus about how the camp fits in a shed.

hints.note: How does it fit in a shed then?

atoms.label: Bank weapons and armour before Entrana
atoms.detail: Deposit all weapons and armour at a bank (jewellery such as a ring of dueling, amulet of glory, or combat bracelet is allowed) — Entrana's monks confiscate anything else. Optionally buy a chronicle from Diango and charge it with teleport cards if you lack a teleport to Entrana (not required, just convenient for repeat trips).

atoms.label: Travel to the Port Sarim docks
atoms.detail: Head to the Port Sarim docks, south of the Rusty Anchor Inn.

atoms.label: Sail to Entrana
atoms.detail: Talk to a Monk of Entrana at the docks to travel to the island.

atoms.label: Reach the cave on Entrana
atoms.detail: Cross the north-east bridge, go west to find the Cave monk, then go down the ladder. Do not craft a battlestaff or bow before entering the cave, or the monks will knock you out and send you back to Port Sarim.

atoms.label: Farm zombies for a bronze axe
atoms.detail: Kill zombies in the cave until one drops a bronze axe (roughly 40% drop chance per kill, so exact kill count is "??"). Two level-92 Greater Demons occupy the room before the Dramen tree — be careful.

atoms.label: Reach the Dramen tree
atoms.detail: Go south-east past the Greater Demons and attempt to chop the Dramen tree. Caution: the nearby magical door teleports you into level-32 Wilderness.

atoms.label: Defeat the Dramen Tree Spirit
atoms.detail: Chopping the tree summons the Dramen Tree Spirit; kill it (there's a safespot behind the southern fungus formation). Do not use the mushroom near the demons as a safespot — even after killing the spirit once, it respawns the next time you try to chop.

atoms.label: Chop dramen branches
atoms.detail: Chop the now-unguarded Dramen tree with the bronze axe. Cutting at least three branches is recommended — spares are useful later for the Freeing Sir Amik Varze RFD subquest and for smuggling into Thorvald's trial in the Fremennik Trials — but don't make them into staves yet.

atoms.label: Carve a dramen staff
atoms.detail: Use a knife on a dramen branch to make a dramen staff.

atoms.label: Return to the Lumbridge Swamp tool shed
atoms.detail: Teleport out of the cave, then travel to the tool shed in the centre of Lumbridge Swamp.

atoms.label: Enter Zanaris
atoms.detail: Wield the dramen staff and enter the tool shed — it opens onto Zanaris and completes the quest.

checkpoints.label: Cave trial: bronze axe and the Dramen Tree Spirit
Craft the dramen staff and enter Zanaris

steps.instruction: Complete In Aid of the Myreque
steps.detail: Myreque chain quest 2: rebuild Burgh de Rott (repair pub basement, general store, bank, furnace) to unlock its bank, kill Gadderanks + juvinates guarding the town, escort Ivan Strom through a Temple-Trekking-style route fighting vampyre juvinates, then craft the Rod of Ivandis (silver+mithril bar, sapphire, soft clay mould, enchant) and deliver it to Veliaf.

refs.title: In Aid of the Myreque/Quick guide

hints.note: Quest reward XP — counts toward your skills, replacing that much training.

atoms.label: Talk to Veliaf Hurtz (start In Aid of the Myreque)
atoms.detail: Myreque Hideout below Canifis (fairy ring dls, or the Canifis trapdoor + secret passage). He asks you to help establish a new base at Burgh de Rott now that the Hollows hideout is compromised.

refs.title: In Aid of the Myreque/Quick guide

atoms.label: Travel to Burgh de Rott
atoms.detail: South of Mort'ton. Carry 1 food item, hammer, pickaxe, spade, 1-5 buckets, 6 planks, and 44 nails -- there is no functioning bank here until it's repaired later.

refs.title: In Aid of the Myreque/Quick guide

atoms.label: Prove goodwill to Florin and enter Burgh de Rott
atoms.detail: Florin refuses entry, suspecting you're collecting food/blood for the vampyres. Use a food item on the open chest directly in front of the gate; he lets you in and the shades stop attacking. Ask about out-of-the-way places -- he suggests the inn cellar.

refs.title: In Aid of the Myreque/Quick guide

atoms.label: Clear the pub cellar rubble
atoms.detail: Climb over the broken wall into the inn (south-east of the gate), mine the trapdoor rubble, descend, then mine and spade every rubble pile into your buckets (3 loads/bucket) and empty them on the pile south-west outside the bar until the cellar is fully cleared. A cutscene reveals a wall plaque once done; leftover items dropped in the cellar vanish on exit.

hints.note: Bonus nails/rock/glass/scroll/fragment surface passively every few piles -- not quest-critical.

refs.title: In Aid of the Myreque/Quick guide

atoms.label: Offer to help Razvan and Aurel fix the town
atoms.detail: Talk to Razvan (usually just north of the bar) about helping, then to Aurel in the General Store (north-east) -- he asks for the roof and wall repaired.

refs.title: In Aid of the Myreque/Quick guide

atoms.label: Repair the General Store roof and wall
atoms.detail: Climb the ladder on the store's outside south wall; use 3 planks + 12 nails on the roof hole. Climb down and use 3 planks + 12 nails on the damaged wall east of the ladder.

refs.title: In Aid of the Myreque/Quick guide

atoms.label: Fill Aurel's stock crate
atoms.detail: Aurel always needs 10 bronze axes + 3 tinderboxes, plus either 10 mackerel OR 10 snail meat (randomly assigned per player -- reroll by exiting his dialogue before the crate handoff). Fill the crate with unnoted items and hand it back. While banking, also grab 5 planks, a hammer, swamp paste, and 20 nails for the next repair.

hints.note: Randomised per player; reroll available before accepting the crate.

refs.title: In Aid of the Myreque/Quick guide

atoms.label: Repair the bank and recruit Cornelius as banker
atoms.detail: South of the city. Inspect the bank booth, then the west wall, using 5 planks + 20 nails + swamp paste + a hammer. Talk to Cornelius, who agrees to become the banker.

refs.title: In Aid of the Myreque/Quick guide

atoms.label: Repair the furnace and fight Gadderanks' juvinates
atoms.detail: South-east corner. Repair the furnace with 2 steel bars + a hammer, add coal, light with a tinderbox -- a cutscene reveals Vanstrom's tithe collector Gadderanks demanding blood. Equip a silver weapon or Efaritay's aid; in the General Store, fight two level-54 Vampyre Juvinates (flinchable/safespottable behind the table) then Gadderanks himself (Veliaf assists).

refs.title: In Aid of the Myreque/Quick guide

atoms.label: Talk to the fallen Gadderanks, then Veliaf
atoms.detail: Gadderanks shares vampyre lore before succumbing; Veliaf asks you to return to the Hollows hideout to plan the move.

refs.title: In Aid of the Myreque/Quick guide

atoms.label: Return to the Myreque Hideout
atoms.detail: Bank any pets first (barred from the next instance). Veliaf asks you to escort Ivan Strom to Paterdomus Temple and ask Drezel about Ivandis's weapon.

refs.title: In Aid of the Myreque/Quick guide

atoms.label: Arm and feed Ivan before the escort
atoms.detail: Strongly recommended for lower-combat accounts: use a spare steel med helm, steel chainbody, steel platelegs, silver sickle, and up to 15 food items (stew/salmon/snails/slimy eel) on Ivan. None of these are returned afterward.

refs.title: In Aid of the Myreque/Quick guide

atoms.label: Escort Ivan through the swamp instance
atoms.detail: Talk to Radigad or Polmafi to signal departure, then Ivan to begin. Choose Route 1 (short: 2x level-75 Vampyre Juvinates) over Route 2 (long: 4x level-50s) -- easier to protect Ivan against fewer enemies. Keep Ivan behind you and tank the juvinate directly ahead; if he flees on low food/health, leave and retry with fresh food (he keeps any gear already given).

refs.title: In Aid of the Myreque/Quick guide

atoms.label: Press Drezel and read The sleeping seven
atoms.detail: West trapdoor at the escort's end. Press Drezel about Ivandis's weapon until he relents and gives a library key; use it on the keyholed wall east, descend, search the middle bookcase for 'The sleeping seven' and read it.

refs.title: In Aid of the Myreque/Quick guide

atoms.label: Make a rod mould from the coffin
atoms.detail: East of the Myreque hideout tunnel, use a hammer on the boarded 'X' entrance, enter, and use soft clay on the coffin inside.

refs.title: In Aid of the Myreque/Quick guide

atoms.label: Craft and enchant the Silvthrill rod
atoms.detail: At any furnace, use a silver bar + mithril bar + cut sapphire with the rod mould to craft a Silvthrill rod, then cast Lvl-1 Enchant on it (normal spellbook required; 1 cosmic + 1 water rune).

refs.title: In Aid of the Myreque/Quick guide

atoms.label: Charge the Rod of Ivandis at the Paterdomus well
atoms.detail: Take the enchanted rod and a rope to the Paterdomus Temple basement; use the rod on the well beside Drezel's room.

refs.title: In Aid of the Myreque/Quick guide

atoms.label: Deliver the Rod of Ivandis to Veliaf
atoms.detail: Burgh de Rott inn cellar. Quest complete.

refs.title: In Aid of the Myreque/Quick guide

checkpoints.label: Repairing the store, bank, and furnace

steps.detail: Unlocks blackjacking in Pollnivneach for fast Thieving XP.

hints.note: start: ask about his stock problems
Quest reward XP — counts toward your skills, replacing that much training.

atoms.label: Talk to Ali Morrisane about his stock problems
atoms.detail: Talk to Ali Morrisane next to the Silk Stall in northern Al Kharid; ask why he's still selling from a stall to trigger the quest start.

hints.note: start: ask about his stock problems

atoms.label: Obtain a kharidian headpiece and a fake beard
atoms.detail: Buy a kharidian headpiece and a fake beard (NPC clothing stock in Al Kharid, not the Grand Exchange).

atoms.label: Combine the headpiece and beard into a desert disguise
atoms.detail: Use the kharidian headpiece on the fake beard to combine them into a desert disguise for the Pollnivneach infiltration later.

atoms.label: Travel to Pollnivneach
atoms.detail: Head south to Pollnivneach to begin the local investigation.

atoms.label: Buy 3 beers from Ali the Barman
atoms.detail: Buy 3 beers from Ali the Barman at the Pollnivneach bar (NPC purchase).

atoms.label: Ply Drunken Ali with 3 beers
atoms.detail: Use one beer on Drunken Ali at the bar, talk through the full dialogue, then repeat with the second and third beers -- do not skip any dialogue between beers.

atoms.label: Question the bandits and the Menaphite Thugs
atoms.detail: Talk to the bandits by the general store, then head west of the bar and question the Menaphite Thugs.

atoms.label: Travel to the camel store
atoms.detail: Head to the camel store just north-west of the bar.

atoms.label: Buy 2 camels from Ali the Camel Man
atoms.detail: Talk to Ali the Camel Man and buy 2 camels for 500 coins (NPC purchase); keep 2 free inventory slots first.

hints.note: haggle to 500 gold for the pair

atoms.label: Deliver camel receipts
atoms.detail: Talk to a Menaphite and a bandit, handing each of them a camel receipt.

atoms.label: Join Ali the Operator's gang
atoms.detail: Go to the large purple tent south-west of the bar and ask Ali the Operator to join his gang.

atoms.label: Demonstrate a pickpocket attempt
atoms.detail: Attempt to pickpocket a villager once (as a demonstration), then return to Ali the Operator for advice.

atoms.label: Pay the street urchin for a tip
atoms.detail: Talk to the street urchin near the centre town well and pay him 10 coins for a tip on which villager to target.

atoms.label: Pickpocket the marked villager
atoms.detail: Pickpocket the villager with an arrow marker over their head (the urchin's tip-off), then report back to Ali the Operator.

atoms.label: Obtain an oak blackjack
atoms.detail: Obtain an oak blackjack before continuing -- the walkthrough does not state an explicit source here ("??"); it is most likely supplied on joining Ali the Operator's gang, otherwise buy one from a Pollnivneach blackjack seller.

atoms.label: Equip the oak blackjack
atoms.detail: Equip the oak blackjack before approaching a villager.

atoms.label: Blackjack and pickpocket a villager
atoms.detail: Lure a villager into a secluded area, knock them out with the equipped oak blackjack, then pickpocket them while they're unconscious.

atoms.label: Report success, move to the jewels task
atoms.detail: Talk to Ali the Operator to move on to the jewel-theft task.

atoms.label: Equip the desert disguise and gloves
atoms.detail: Put on the desert disguise (made earlier) and a pair of gloves before infiltrating the mayor's house.

atoms.label: Hide behind the cactus near the mayor's house
atoms.detail: Hide behind the large cactus near the mayor's house, the large house to the east by the fountain.

atoms.label: Obtain the mayor's house keys
atoms.detail: Obtain the keys to the mayor's house -- the walkthrough does not state exactly how they're acquired here ("??"); they appear to be picked up automatically during the hide-behind-the-cactus sequence.

atoms.label: Enter the house and find the hidden dial
atoms.detail: Use the keys on the door, go up the stairs in the north-eastern corner, then search the landscape picture near the bed to reveal a hidden dial.

atoms.label: Crack the dial and take the jewels
atoms.detail: Hit the button on the dial to reset it, then click 1, 1, 2, 3, 5, 8 in that exact clockwise order to open the safe and take the jewels.

atoms.label: Hand over the jewels
atoms.detail: Give the recovered jewels to Ali the Operator.

atoms.label: Chase down the traitor lead
atoms.detail: Talk to Ali the Operator, then a Menaphite Thug, then Ali the Operator again, then Ali the Barman about "Traitorous Ali" -- a fixed dialogue chase with no branching outcome.

atoms.label: Buy special kebab sauce
atoms.detail: Buy special sauce from the kebab seller north-west of the well in the middle of town (NPC purchase).

atoms.label: Sabotage the trough behind the camel shop
atoms.detail: Use the special sauce on the trough behind the camel shop.

atoms.label: Collect Ugthanki dung
atoms.detail: Use a bucket on the dung behind the camel shop once it has turned brown; scoop 3 extra buckets of dung if also planning My Arm's Big Adventure later.

atoms.label: Get a snake charm and basket
atoms.detail: Use a coin on the snake charmer's money pot south of the bar, with 2 free inventory slots, to receive a snake charm and a snake basket.

hints.note: ask for a go with the snake charm

atoms.label: Capture a desert snake
atoms.detail: Use the snake charm repeatedly on a desert snake north of the Menaphite tent until it goes into the snake basket.

atoms.label: Travel to Ali the Hag
atoms.detail: Head to Ali the Hag, north-west of the kebab seller.

atoms.label: Trade the snake and dung for hag's poison
atoms.detail: Talk to Ali the Hag twice, handing over the filled snake basket and the Ugthanki dung to receive the hag's poison.

atoms.label: Poison the beer table
atoms.detail: Use the hag's poison on the table with a beer in the bar.

atoms.label: Report the traitor
atoms.detail: Talk to Ali the Operator to report what was found.

atoms.label: Prepare for battle and confront the Menaphite Leader
atoms.detail: Gear up for combat, then talk to the Menaphite Leader just outside the tent.

atoms.label: Kill the Tough Guy for a willow blackjack
atoms.detail: Kill the level-75 Tough Guy from a safe-spot behind the bush; he drops a willow blackjack.

atoms.label: Find and question the Bandit Leader
atoms.detail: Talk to a villager, then find and talk to the Bandit Leader, who wanders near the northern magic carpet station.

atoms.label: Kill the bandit champion for an adamant scimitar
atoms.detail: Kill the level-70 bandit champion from a safe-spot behind the chair in the house to the east, while holding the willow blackjack; he drops an adamant scimitar.

atoms.label: Report to Ali the Mayor
atoms.detail: Talk to a villager, then talk to Ali the Mayor by the well in the village centre.

atoms.label: Return to Ali Morrisane to finish the quest
atoms.detail: Return to Ali Morrisane, who you started the quest with, to complete The Feud.

steps.detail: Pick a method: Steal from fruit stalls (Hosidius, Zeah) / Pickpocket Knights of Ardougne / Steal artefacts (Port Piscarilius).

methods.location: Hosidius market or coastal houses
methods.notes: Matches the row's own 'Fruit stalls on Zeah' continuity method; page states the full band as 25-50 (up to 42,750 xp/hr at the eastern coastal house, or 34,200 xp/hr from a single stall), sub-scoped here to 38-50.

methods.location: Ardougne marketplace or south-east bank
methods.notes: The row's 'Guards in Ardougne' phrasing most closely matches this section, but the page states Knights of Ardougne only becomes a viable method from level 55 onward -- the whole method sits at or above this row's 38-55 top edge rather than spanning it; flagged as a mismatch rather than silently rewritten or dropped.

methods.location: Port Piscarilius, via guard-lured bridges
methods.notes: Page states this is the fastest method from level 49-65; sub-scoped to this row's 49-55 slice, table spans multiple levels within that slice so xp_hr stays ??.

atoms.label: Go to the fruit stalls (Hosidius)
atoms.detail: Easternmost house near the beach has 2 stalls close together with no patrolling guard dogs, per Thieving_training.s20.

atoms.label: Steal from fruit stalls until Thieving 50
atoms.detail: Up to 42,750 xp/h from both stalls, 34,200 xp/h from one, per Thieving_training.s20. Eat strange fruits or use stamina potions for run energy; drop fruit while running between stalls unless banking. Section 20's own header covers levels 25-50 -- levels 1-25 are not documented by any cited section, left ??.

hints.note: Fastest rate is dropping fruit while running between the two stalls (Thieving_training.s20).
No method cited for pre-25 Thieving in this bundle's fetched sections; genuinely unsourced, not fabricated.

atoms.label: Go to the Ardougne market (Knights of Ardougne)
atoms.detail: South-eastern part of the Ardougne marketplace, per Thieving_training.s23.

atoms.label: Pickpocket Knights of Ardougne until Thieving 55
atoms.detail: 86,000 xp/h at level 55 assuming the medium Ardougne Diary + dodgy necklaces, per Thieving_training.s23's own table.

hints.note: Medium Ardougne Diary (-10% stun) + dodgy necklaces (25% resist) recommended per Thieving_training.s23; exact base fail rate at 55 not restated here.

steps.detail: Required for RFD Evil Dave. Requires Demon Slayer and The Golem.

hints.note: Quest reward XP — counts toward your skills, replacing that much training.

atoms.label: Talk to Father Reen (start Shadow of the Storm)
atoms.detail: South of Al Kharid bank. He gives a free uncoloured Silverlight if you don't already carry a regular one -- bank any spare dyed Silverlight first, since carrying both later blocks progress.

atoms.label: Travel to the Ruins of Uzer
atoms.detail: Shantay Pass + magic carpet, a necklace of passage to Eagles' Eyrie then south-east, or fairy ring dlq then north-east. Bring Silverlight -- it's needed to continue.

atoms.label: Talk to Father Badden and pick a black mushroom
atoms.detail: Ask through all of his dialogue options. Pick a black mushroom outside the dungeon if not already carried, then enter.

atoms.label: Dye Silverlight and 3 clothing items black
atoms.detail: Grind the black mushroom into black dye with a pestle & mortar + vial. Assemble any 3 quest-accepted black clothing items (own-words per the page's own list -- e.g. a dyed desert shirt + robe, a black priest gown, dark mystic robes, black dragonhide, or 3 black cosmetic slot items; several black-looking cosmetic items like the black mask do NOT count, per the page's own exclusion list). Also dye Silverlight itself black with the same dye -- never carry a normal and a dyed Silverlight together.

atoms.label: Convince Evil Dave to let you through the portal
atoms.detail: Wearing all 3 black clothing items, tell Evil Dave you want to join the group. He leads you to Denath, the group's leader, who explains the plan to summon Agrith-Naar and gives a player-specific incantation order to remember (also written, reversed, in a demonic tome found later).

hints.note: Randomised per player; the demonic tome carries the reverse order as a backup.

atoms.label: Cut gems from the demon's throne (optional)
atoms.detail: Use a chisel and hammer on the demon's throne for 2 sapphires, 2 rubies, 2 emeralds -- skip if already done during The Golem.

atoms.label: Get the sigil mould and the clay golem's account
atoms.detail: Talk to Jennifer for a demonic sigil mould, then Matthew about Josef -- he asks you to find Josef's dropped book. Talk to the clay golem: it reveals Denath killed Josef and hid the book in an outdoor kiln (must ask the golem before the kilns become searchable).

atoms.label: Search the outdoor kilns for the Demonic Tome
atoms.detail: Four kilns around Uzer (near the magic carpet and east of the temple) -- search until the tome turns up.

atoms.label: Craft the demonic sigil
atoms.detail: At any furnace (fairy ring dkr to Edgeville is fastest), use the silver bar with the demonic sigil mould.

atoms.label: Chant the incantation in Denath's order
atoms.detail: Read the Demonic Tome (its incantation is the reverse of Denath's), return through the portal, and hand Matthew the book. Join Denath's circle and chant the incantation in the order Denath gave using your sigil -- Denath walks into the portal and vanishes: he WAS Agrith-Naar, and the 'backwards' order banished rather than summoned him.

atoms.label: Recruit five allies and their sigils
atoms.detail: Pick up Denath's dropped sigil (or immediately chase Tanya back through the portal for a double sigil/bones drop). Chase Evil Dave, Eric, and Tanya through the portal -- Tanya and Eric die to hazards (loot their sigils), then convince Evil Dave to return and hand over his. Recruit Father Badden and Father Reen (give each a spare sigil) and the clay golem (use the strange implement found in the lair on it first, then ask again) as the final participants.

hints.note: Optional trick, not required to progress.

atoms.label: Summon and kill Agrith-Naar with Silverlight
atoms.detail: Re-enter the portal, talk to Matthew to gather everyone, chant the incantation in the book's (opposite) order. Agrith-Naar (level 100) appears, kills Matthew, then attacks you -- melee by default, switches to Fire Blast if you pray/step out of range, or Telekinetic Grabs you back in if you pray Magic from range. No cannon allowed. The final blow MUST land with Silverlight or his HP snaps back to 12; Silverlight merges into Darklight automatically on the kill.

hints.note: Ducking behind a pillar/torch right before the kill registers voids the final hit.

checkpoints.label: Starting Out (Al Kharid -> Uzer -> black outfit)

steps.detail: No formal quest prerequisites, but recreating King Alvis's battleaxe needs Thurgo (Mudskipper Point smith) which can be found either via The Knight's Sword or by asking the Keldagrim librarian then Reldo in Varrock library (no quest completion actually required). Introduces Keldagrim city. Flow: talk Dwarven Boatman, then Commander Veldaban, then Blasidar the sculptor (east Keldagrim) who needs exquisite clothes+boots+a repaired dwarven battleaxe for a statue. Clothes: get a costume book from a bookcase in the library (need <30kg weight to climb), buy coal/logs-spun cloth from Vermundi for 200gp. Boots: steal the left boot from Dromund when he's not looking, telegrab the right boot through his window. Axe: get it from Santiri's weapon shop, socket 3 sapphires, take to Thurgo at Mudskipper Point with an iron bar to repair (may need a redberry pie bribe). Deliver all 3 items to Riki (Blasidar's model) then talk Blasidar for a cutscene. Join the Consortium: pick one company (not Red Axe) upstairs in the market, run ore-delivery fetch-tasks for their secretary (hidden score, 20 points per success, need 100 to progress, wearing full H.A.M. robes gives Purple Pewter a +20 head start), then bar-delivery tasks for the director, then formally join the company and report back to Commander Veldaban to finish. Do not world-hop mid-consortium-grind or progress is lost.

req_items.name: Various ores/bars
req_items.note: for consortium delivery tasks; obtainable in-quest with Smithing 50 or roughly 5000gp/Mining 55

hints.value: mining +2500, smithing +2500, crafting +2500, magic +1500, thieving +1500, firemaking +1500
hints.note: Quest reward XP — counts toward your skills, replacing that much training.

atoms.label: Talk to the Dwarven Boatman to travel to Keldagrim
atoms.detail: Take fairy ring code DKS then head through the tunnel south-west and the Cave Entrance, or simply speak to the boatman to begin the trip.

hints.value: 1Yes, I'm ready and don't mind it taking a few minutes.

atoms.label: Finish the conversation with Commander Veldaban
atoms.detail: Commander Veldaban, near the West Keldagrim bank, briefs you on the sculptor's project.

atoms.label: Talk to Blasidar the sculptor
atoms.detail: Blasidar, on the east side of Keldagrim south of the kebab shop, explains he needs items for a statue of King Alvis.

atoms.label: Ask Vermundi about the exquisite clothes
atoms.detail: Vermundi the silk trader works the large eastern-market building in East Keldagrim.

hints.value: 2Yes, I'm looking for some special clothes.

atoms.label: Ask the Librarian about Dwarven costumes
atoms.detail: The Librarian sits in the library at the north-east corner of West Keldagrim.

hints.value: 2Do you know anything about King Alvis' clothes?

atoms.label: Climb a bookcase for the costume book
atoms.detail: Climbing any library bookcase yields the Scholars Guide to Dwarven Costumes; carrying 30kg or more of gear blocks the climb.

atoms.label: Source coal for the spinning machine
atoms.detail: Coal can be mined in the north-east corner of East Keldagrim, or bought from Ordan at the Blast Furnace if not already carried.

atoms.label: Tell Vermundi you're ready for the clothes
atoms.detail: Return to Vermundi once coal and logs are in hand.

atoms.label: Spin coal and logs into cloth
atoms.detail: Use coal and logs on the spinning machine next to Vermundi, then light the result with a tinderbox.

atoms.label: Buy the exquisite clothes from Vermundi for 200gp
atoms.detail: Pay Vermundi 200gp once the spun cloth is ready.

atoms.label: Buy 3 sapphires from Hervi if not already carried
atoms.detail: Hervi runs the gem stall just north of Vermundi.

atoms.label: Ask Saro about the special boots
atoms.detail: Saro works the anvil south-west of the West Keldagrim bank.

hints.value: 2Yes, I'm looking for a pair of special boots.

atoms.label: Speak to Dromund
atoms.detail: Dromund lives in a house just north of the West Keldagrim bank.

atoms.label: Take the left boot while Dromund isn't looking
atoms.detail: Slip the left boot away from Dromund's house while he's distracted.

atoms.label: Telegrab the right boot through the window
atoms.detail: Go outside behind Dromund's house and cast Telekinetic Grab on the right boot through the window while he isn't looking.

atoms.label: Ask Santiri about the battleaxe
atoms.detail: Santiri runs the weapon shop in north-western West Keldagrim and hands over the ancient dwarven battleaxe.

hints.value: 2Yes, I'm looking for a particular battleaxe.
2Blasidar the sculptor needs it for his statue.

atoms.label: Socket the 3 sapphires into the battleaxe
atoms.detail: Use the 3 sapphires on the ancient battleaxe now in your inventory.

atoms.label: Talk to Santiri again to confirm the axe
atoms.detail: Confirm the gem-set axe with Santiri before moving on.

hints.value: 2Yes, I'm looking for a particular battleaxe.

atoms.label: Ask the Librarian about the Imcando dwarves if needed
atoms.detail: Skip this and the next step entirely if Thurgo was already met via The Knight's Sword.

atoms.label: Ask Reldo about the Imcando dwarves if needed
atoms.detail: Reldo, in the Varrock Palace library, points toward Thurgo; skip if Thurgo has already been met.

atoms.label: Get Thurgo to repair the battleaxe
atoms.detail: Thurgo works at Mudskipper Point (fairy ring AIQ); give him an iron bar to repair the axe, with a redberry pie as a possible extra if he hasn't received one recently, then take the option to return to Keldagrim immediately.

hints.value: 3Can you help me with this ancient axe?

atoms.label: Give Riki the clothes, boots and axe
atoms.detail: Riki, Blasidar's model, receives the exquisite clothes, both boots, and the repaired battleaxe.

atoms.label: Talk to Blasidar and watch the statue cutscene
atoms.detail: Blasidar completes the statue once Riki has the items.

atoms.label: Choose a company and offer to help its secretary
atoms.detail: Pick any company except the Red Axe from the market's upper floor; progress only counts toward the one company chosen.

hints.value: 3Is there anything I can help you with?

atoms.label: Deliver requested ores until the hidden score allows bar tasks
atoms.detail: Each successful ore delivery (5 of a kind is a safe buffer, ores can be noted) gives 20 hidden points, refusals cost 2; ores can also be bought from Ordan at the Blast Furnace. Repeat until 75+ points unlocks director bar tasks.

atoms.label: Deliver bars for the director until membership is offered
atoms.detail: Bring unnoted metal bars requested by the director (12 points each); unlike the secretary, click the director again before advancing the dialogue. Continue until 100 points is reached.

hints.value: 3Do you have any more tasks for me?

atoms.label: Officially join the chosen company
atoms.detail: Accept membership when the director offers it, mentioning Blasidar sent you.

hints.value: 2I'd like to officially join your company.

atoms.label: Report to Commander Veldaban to finish
atoms.detail: Talk to Commander Veldaban west of the bank; you may decline the meeting invite offered afterward.

steps.instruction: Complete The Hand in the Sand
steps.detail: Talk to Bert in Yanille (house next to the POH portal) to get a sandy hand. Buy/bring a beer and give it to the Guard Captain at the Dragon Inn pub south of Bert's house. Ring the bell outside the Wizards' Guild (or enter with 66 Magic) and give the hand to Zavistic Rarve. Get Bert's rota from Bert, travel to Brimhaven, find Sandy south of the Shrimp and Parrot restaurant, search his desk for Sandy's rota, and pickpocket him for sand. Back in Yanille, get a magic scroll from Bert, ring the bell for a magical orb from Zavistic Rarve, who then offers to teleport you to Port Sarim. At Betty's magic shop get bottled water, mix in redberries then white berries (order matters) for pink dye, dye the lantern lens for a rose-tinted lens, then use the lens on the counter from the doorway for a truth serum, and hand over sand. In Brimhaven, distract Sandy with dialogue and use the truth serum on his coffee mug, then activate the magical orb and click through every dialogue option with him. Back in Yanille, ring the bell twice more at the Wizards' Guild (getting a cutscene on the second), sail to Entrana and talk to Mazion at the sandpit for a wizard's head, then return to Yanille and ring the bell/talk to Zavistic Rarve one last time to finish.

refs.title: The Hand in the Sand/Quick guide

req_items.name: Redberries
req_items.note: buyable in-quest from the Port Sarim food store

req_items.name: Bucket of sand
req_items.note: obtainable in-quest if you bring an empty bucket

hints.note: Quest reward XP — counts toward your skills, replacing that much training.

atoms.label: Talk to Bert (start The Hand in the Sand)
atoms.detail: Bert works the sandpit east of the Yanille POH portal; found a severed hand and is afraid to report it. Agree to help -> receive sandy hand.

refs.title: The Hand in the Sand/Quick guide

atoms.label: Buy a pint of beer
atoms.detail: Ye Olde Dragon Inn bartender, Yanille, 2 coins.

refs.title: The Hand in the Sand/Quick guide

atoms.label: Talk to the captain of the guards (give beer, hand)
atoms.detail: Ye Olde Dragon Inn; give the beer, he drops the sandy hand in it -> beer-soaked hand; suspects the wizards.

refs.title: The Hand in the Sand/Quick guide

atoms.label: Talk to Zavistic Rarve (Wizards' Guild)
atoms.detail: Ring the guild bell if under 66 Magic; show the hand -> identified as student wizard Clarence's; asks about Bert's recent working hours.

refs.title: The Hand in the Sand/Quick guide

atoms.label: Talk to Bert (ask about his schedule)
atoms.detail: He gives his copy of the sand-hauling rota (Sandy's Sand Corp, Brimhaven) -> compare against Sandy's original in Brimhaven (30 coins via Ardougne ferry, or teleport).

refs.title: The Hand in the Sand/Quick guide

atoms.label: Search Sandy's desk (Brimhaven office)
atoms.detail: Sandy's office, north-west of the Dead Man's Chest bar, Brimhaven; search the desk for his original rota to compare against Bert's copy.

refs.title: The Hand in the Sand/Quick guide

atoms.label: Pickpocket Sandy for sand
atoms.detail: Sandy's office, Brimhaven; keep the sand pinched from his pocket -- needed later as the personal item for the truth serum.

hints.note: May take multiple pickpocket attempts.

refs.title: The Hand in the Sand/Quick guide

atoms.label: Talk to Bert (hand over both rotas)
atoms.detail: Yanille; give Bert's and Sandy's rotas -- he doesn't remember the change, blames wizard magic leaking nearby -> exchanges a mind-altering magic scroll found in his house.

refs.title: The Hand in the Sand/Quick guide

atoms.label: Talk to Zavistic Rarve (give the magic scroll)
atoms.detail: Confirms it's a mind-altering scroll explaining Bert's forgetting; suspects Sandy -- tasks the player with getting a truth serum from Betty in Port Sarim and recording Sandy with a magical orb. Offers one free teleport to Betty's shop for an empty vial.

hints.note: Zavistic offers one free teleport to Betty's shop in exchange for an empty vial.

refs.title: The Hand in the Sand/Quick guide

atoms.label: Buy redberries (Food Store, Port Sarim)
atoms.detail: Port Sarim Food Store.

refs.title: The Hand in the Sand/Quick guide

atoms.label: Talk to Betty (about the quest)
atoms.detail: Betty's shop, Port Sarim; explain the quest -- she asks for another empty vial and gives bottled water in return.

refs.title: The Hand in the Sand/Quick guide

atoms.label: Make redberry juice
atoms.detail: Use redberries on the bottled water.

refs.title: The Hand in the Sand/Quick guide

atoms.label: Make pink dye
atoms.detail: Use white berries on the redberry juice. White berries are not sold by Betty; source per the quest's own alternative list (Farming 59 whiteberry seed, or a rare drop from cave crawlers / Yanille Agility Dungeon chaos druid warriors) -- gather/produce only, never GE.

refs.title: The Hand in the Sand/Quick guide

atoms.label: Make a rose-tinted lens
atoms.detail: Use pink dye on the lantern lens.

refs.title: The Hand in the Sand/Quick guide

atoms.label: Talk to Betty (focus the lens)
atoms.detail: Stand in the doorway while it's open; use the rose-tinted lens on the counter to focus light onto an empty vial while she pours the serum. The lens shatters; she says she still needs a personal item from Sandy.

refs.title: The Hand in the Sand/Quick guide

atoms.label: Talk to Betty (give Sandy's sand)
atoms.detail: Give the sand pickpocketed from Sandy earlier -- she finishes the truth serum and warns it must be diluted in tea or coffee.

refs.title: The Hand in the Sand/Quick guide

atoms.label: Buy 5 earth runes from Betty
atoms.detail: 20gp from Betty's shop, before leaving Port Sarim.

refs.title: The Hand in the Sand/Quick guide

atoms.label: Talk to Sandy (distract, dose his coffee)
atoms.detail: Sandy's office, Brimhaven; distract him with tall tales (try every dialogue option -- no single guaranteed one) until he looks out the window, then use the truth serum on his coffee. Activate the magical orb and talk to him again to record his confession.

hints.note: No single distraction option is guaranteed to work; cycle through them.

refs.title: The Hand in the Sand/Quick guide

atoms.label: Talk to Zavistic Rarve (show the recorded confession)
atoms.detail: Yanille; hand over the filled magical orb as proof of Sandy's confession. He asks for 5 earth runes and a bucket of sand to compensate Bert.

refs.title: The Hand in the Sand/Quick guide

atoms.label: Fill a bucket of sand at Bert's sandpit
atoms.detail: Bert's sandpit, Yanille.

refs.title: The Hand in the Sand/Quick guide

atoms.label: Talk to Zavistic Rarve (give runes + sand)
atoms.detail: Hand over the 5 earth runes and bucket of sand -- he casts a spell to permanently refill Bert's sandpit, then asks the player to check the Entranan sandpit for the rest of Clarence's remains.

refs.title: The Hand in the Sand/Quick guide

atoms.label: Deposit weapons/armour (Port Sarim bank deposit box)
atoms.detail: Entrana bans weapons and armour; use the deposit box at Port Sarim before crossing.

refs.title: The Hand in the Sand/Quick guide

atoms.label: Talk to Mazion (Entrana sandpit)
atoms.detail: Entrana; recovers the dead wizard's head.

refs.title: The Hand in the Sand/Quick guide

atoms.label: Talk to Zavistic Rarve (hand over the wizard's head)
atoms.detail: Yanille; confirms it's Clarence's head. Sandy is arrested and Zavistic rewards the player -- quest complete.

refs.title: The Hand in the Sand/Quick guide

checkpoints.label: Yanille: start -> beer -> captain -> Wizards' Guild -> Bert's schedule
Brimhaven: investigate Sandy's rota + pickpocket sand
Yanille: exchange rotas -> magic scroll -> Zavistic
Brimhaven: confront Sandy with the serum + orb
Yanille: turn in the head, quest complete

steps.detail: Part 2 of the Rise of the Red Axe series (after The Giant Dwarf). Investigate the Red Axe via an extremely drunk, kebab-obsessed dwarf: ply him with beer, fetch a random item requested by a rowdy dwarf, deliver a dwarven stout to Khorvak, then grow kelda seeds in the Kelda Hops Patch (15-20 min real-time wait) and brew them into kelda ale at the East Keldagrim pub vat (another 15-20 min wait) -- plan filler activities like High Alch around the waits. Explore a closed-off minecart tunnel through 6 rooms, including 3 sliding-block cart-track puzzles and a room requiring you to read 3 Red Axe documents. Finish by drinking a beer and eating a kebab back at the eastern pub after reporting to Veldaban.

req_items.name: Coins
req_items.note: approximate total coin cost across the quest

req_items.name: Random item from an NPC-specified list

hints.note: Quest reward XP — counts toward your skills, replacing that much training.

atoms.label: Talk to Commander Veldaban (start Forgettable Tale...)
atoms.detail: Dwarven Black Guard HQ, west of the Keldagrim bank. Agree to investigate the Red Axe's sudden departure -- auto-transported by cutscene to a drunk dwarf's house in east Keldagrim.

atoms.label: Buy a beer
atoms.detail: Laughing Miner Pub or King's Axe Inn, Keldagrim, 2 coins.

atoms.label: Talk to the drunk dwarf (give beer)
atoms.detail: He wants 'the REALLY good stuff' (Kelda stout) instead -- gives the first of 4 kelda seeds needed to grow it.

atoms.label: Talk to the Rowdy Dwarf (trade for a seed)
atoms.detail: Laughing Miner pub. He asks for one random item from a long list (e.g. cabbage, banana, ashes, broken glass, potato, king worm) in exchange for the second seed -- own-words: bring/gather/produce the requested item, re-ask if the current request is unobtainable.

hints.note: The requested item is randomised per player; wait and re-ask for a different request if the current one is impractical.

atoms.label: Talk to Khorvak (borrow/trade for a seed)
atoms.detail: White Wolf Mountain pub, reached via minecart. Convince him to lend the seed, or give him a dwarven stout from a nearby table -> third seed.

atoms.label: Talk to Gauss (toast for the last seed)
atoms.detail: King's Axe Inn, west Keldagrim. Toast with a full or empty beer glass -> fourth seed.

atoms.label: Plant the 4 kelda seeds
atoms.detail: Kelda hops patch in front of the West Keldagrim palace, east of the bank -- ask Rind the gardener for permission first, weed with the free rake. Kelda hops grow only underground and cannot be diseased.

atoms.label: Harvest the kelda hops
atoms.detail: Pick once grown (15-20 min).

atoms.label: Brew Kelda stout
atoms.detail: East Keldagrim fermenting vat (Port Phasmatys vat will NOT work). Add 2 buckets of water, 2 barley malt, the kelda hops, then ale yeast (or a free pot filled by Blandebir for 25gp). Ferments 15-20 min; turn the valve and use a beer glass on the barrel when ready.

atoms.label: Talk to the drunk dwarf (give Kelda stout)
atoms.detail: He drinks it and tells of a boarded-up tunnel (cutscene).

atoms.label: Talk to the mining company director
atoms.detail: Upstairs in either Keldagrim marketplace (the director from The Giant Dwarf). Ask for help with the boarded tunnel -- boards removed at once.

atoms.label: Ride the new tunnel cart and solve the track puzzles (Rooms 1-6)
atoms.detail: Southernmost cart, no ticket, empty hands required. Six connected rooms: Rooms 1/3/5 are cart-track junction puzzles (place green/yellow direction stones, ride to search a box, return); Room 2 is an eavesdropped cutscene revealing the Red Axe's bribery plot; Room 4 is an archive -- search all 3 crates and a bookcase for lore letters; Room 6 shows the Red Axe's Chaos Dwarf army before Grunsh the ogre shaman wipes the player's memory of the caves.

atoms.label: Talk to Commander Veldaban (memory wiped)
atoms.detail: No memory remains of the tunnel, but instinct pulls the player toward beer and a kebab in east Keldagrim.

atoms.label: Buy a kebab and a beer
atoms.detail: East Keldagrim: kebab from the store south-west of the drunk dwarf's house (1gp), beer from the pub (1-2gp). Do not consume before talking to Veldaban.

atoms.label: Eat the kebab and drink the beer at the east pub
atoms.detail: Triggers the final cutscene: the player tells a nonsensical drunken story -- quest complete.

checkpoints.label: Keldagrim: start -> beer -> four kelda seeds
Brewing: plant -> harvest -> ferment Kelda stout
Tunnel: boards removed -> minecart puzzle rooms 1-6

steps.detail: Unlocks herb patches worldwide. Critical prerequisite for the herb farming supply chain.

mapMarkers.label: Martin the Master Gardener, Draynor Village pig pen (start)

hints.note: start: ask about the failing farm patches
Quest reward XP — counts toward your skills, replacing that much training.

atoms.label: Talk to Martin the Master Gardener
atoms.detail: Talk to Martin the Master Gardener in Draynor Village to start the quest.

hints.note: start: ask about the failing farm patches

atoms.label: Obtain secateurs and a spade if missing
atoms.detail: If you don't already have secateurs or a spade, buy them from Sarah in the building next to the Draynor cabbage patch (NPC purchase).

atoms.label: Confirm membership with Elstan
atoms.detail: Run north-west and talk to Elstan at the allotment/flower/herb patch; confirm he's a member of the Group of Advanced Gardeners.

atoms.label: Confirm membership with Frizzy Skernip
atoms.detail: Run south and talk to Frizzy Skernip; confirm his Group of Advanced Gardeners membership.

atoms.label: Travel to the Gnome Stronghold
atoms.detail: Take the spirit tree network (the Grand Exchange spirit tree is the fastest hop) to the Gnome Stronghold, then run east.

atoms.label: Confirm membership with Bolongo
atoms.detail: Talk to Bolongo and confirm his Group of Advanced Gardeners membership.

atoms.label: Confirm membership with Prissy Scilla
atoms.detail: Run south-west to the tree patch and talk to Prissy Scilla; confirm her membership.

atoms.label: Travel to Falador Park
atoms.detail: Teleport to Falador (Ring of wealth's Falador option lands directly in the park) and run to the tree patch.

atoms.label: Confirm membership with Heskel
atoms.detail: Talk to Heskel at the Falador Park tree patch; confirm his membership -- this completes the 5-gardener tally.

atoms.label: Report back to Martin
atoms.detail: Return to the Draynor Village market and talk to Martin again to move the quest forward.

atoms.label: Equip a dramen staff or Lunar staff
atoms.detail: Equip a dramen staff or Lunar staff -- required to enter Zanaris; source of the staff itself is outside this quest's own walkthrough ("??" if not already owned from Lost City).

atoms.label: Travel to Zanaris
atoms.detail: Enter the small shack south of Lumbridge Castle in Lumbridge Swamp with the staff equipped to teleport to Zanaris; if the quest spade still needs collecting, enter once without the staff equipped first to grab it.

atoms.label: Ask the Fairy Godfather about the Fairy Queen
atoms.detail: Run to the throne room and talk to the Fairy Godfather; ask where the Fairy Queen is.

atoms.label: Get the symptoms list from Fairy Nuff
atoms.detail: Run north of the bank and talk to Fairy Nuff to receive the Fairy Queen's symptoms list.

atoms.label: Consult Zandar Horfyre
atoms.detail: Speak to Zandar Horfyre on the top floor of the Dark Wizards' Tower, just north of the Makeover Mage.

atoms.label: Fill a druid pouch (recommended)
atoms.detail: Fill a druid pouch before collecting the 3 random items -- it protects any of them that ghasts could otherwise turn to rotten food. Recommended, not strictly required.

atoms.label: Dig up a Draynor skull if needed
atoms.detail: If you don't already have a Draynor skull, travel to Draynor Manor and use a spade on the grave north of the building, within the fence, to dig one up.

atoms.label: Trade the skull for the collection list
atoms.detail: Talk to Malignius Mortifer, the necromancer north-west of Port Sarim's rune shop; give him the Draynor skull to receive the list of 3 required items. Buy secateurs/spade from the nearby farm shop if still missing.

atoms.label: Collect the 3 randomly-assigned items
atoms.detail: Collect the 3 randomly-picked items per your quest journal's list -- the exact items vary per playthrough ("??"); carry the filled druid pouch while gathering any that ghasts could rot.

atoms.label: Travel to the Nature Grotto
atoms.detail: Travel to the Nature Grotto in Mort Myre Swamp via the Shades of Mort'ton minigame teleport, go west, then follow the winding path north over the bridge.

atoms.label: Equip the Ghostspeak amulet
atoms.detail: Equip the Ghostspeak amulet before entering the grotto so the Nature Spirit can be understood.

atoms.label: Trade the items for the Magic secateurs
atoms.detail: Talk to the Nature Spirit inside the grotto and hand over the 3 collected items to receive the Magic secateurs.

atoms.label: Bring food and armour for the Tanglefoot fight
atoms.detail: Bring food and armour before returning to Zanaris to face the Tanglefoot.

atoms.label: Return to Zanaris with the Magic secateurs
atoms.detail: Travel to Zanaris with the Magic secateurs in your inventory.

atoms.label: Squeeze through the gap by the Cosmic Altar
atoms.detail: Run south of the wheat fields to the Cosmic Altar and squeeze through the gap in the western wall.

atoms.label: Equip the Magic secateurs
atoms.detail: Equip the Magic secateurs before entering the tunnel.

atoms.label: Defeat the Tanglefoot
atoms.detail: Run to the end of the tunnel and defeat Tanglefoot; toggle Protect from Melee if the level allows, or lure it around the mushrooms to the east to flinch it.

atoms.label: Pick up the Queen's secateurs
atoms.detail: Pick up the Queen's secateurs dropped by Tanglefoot.

atoms.label: Finish the quest with the Fairy Godfather
atoms.detail: Talk to the Fairy Godfather to complete Fairytale I - Growing Pains.

steps.detail: Earn ecto-tokens at the Ectofuntus, then chase down items for a runaway ghost bride's quest: brew nettle tea for an old crone, repair a toy ship and dye its flag to solve a mast puzzle for a hidden treasure map, dig up the Book of Haricanto after fighting a level-32 giant lobster, win a coin-flip game (Rune-Draw) for a translation manual, and collect 10 ghost signatures on a petition before performing a passing-on ceremony for Necrovarus.

req_items.name: Ecto-tokens
req_items.note: approximate; or bone/pot/bucket to earn them at the Ectofuntus

req_items.name: Nettle tea ingredients
req_items.note: tinderbox, log, closed-finger gloves, bowl of water

hints.note: Quest reward XP — counts toward your skills, replacing that much training.

atoms.label: Gather bones + buckets/pots for the Ectofuntus
atoms.detail: Kill level-1 undead chickens near the farm west of the Ectofuntus for bones; buy/carry 7 empty buckets and 7 empty pots (Port Phasmatys, entering via charter ship from Port Sarim costs 1,300gp before tokens are gathered).

atoms.label: Fill buckets with slime and grind bones to bonemeal
atoms.detail: Down the trapdoor west of the Ectofuntus fountain; use a bucket on the Pool of Slime to auto-fill all carried buckets, then use a bone on the loader by the bone grinder (interacting with the grinder speeds up the automated cycle).

atoms.label: Worship the Ectofuntus for ecto-tokens
atoms.detail: Click the Ectofuntus to consume each slime+bonemeal set, then talk to a ghost disciple while wearing the ghostspeak amulet. ~35 recommended (20 with an activated ring of charos(a)).

atoms.label: Talk to Velorina (start Ghosts Ahoy)
atoms.detail: Pay 2 ecto-tokens at the Energy Barrier north of Port Phasmatys; she explains the ghosts' plight and sends the player to Necrovarus at the Ectofuntus temple.

atoms.label: Talk to Necrovarus (first attempt)
atoms.detail: He refuses to discuss releasing the ghosts.

atoms.label: Talk to Velorina again
atoms.detail: She recalls an old friend who might help without Necrovarus -- a small wooden shack in Morytania near the sea, between two castles.

atoms.label: Make nettle tea
atoms.detail: Fill a bowl with water at the waterpump west of the farm patches; pick nettles east of Slayer Master Mazchna (closed-fingered gloves required); use nettles on the water bowl, then light a fire and use the bowl on it.

atoms.label: Talk to the Old Crone (tea, then milk)
atoms.detail: North-west of Mazchna, between the Slayer Tower and the Mausoleum. She only drinks from her own cup (gives a porcelain cup to pour the tea into); refuses again until a bucket of milk is added. Once satisfied, she recalls Velorina and explains that enchanting the Ghostspeak amulet needs Necrovarus's magical robes, his book of rituals (Haricanto), and a translation manual. She also gives a model ship for her sailor son.

atoms.label: Repair the model ship
atoms.detail: Canifis bank/general store for silk, needle and thread (or costume needle), and a knife -- use them on the model ship.

atoms.label: Read the wrecked ship's flag colours
atoms.detail: Wrecked ship on the north coast of the farm patch; climb to the quarterdeck, wait for low wind, then search the mast up to 3 times to identify the tattered flag's colours (own-words: mixing red+yellow=orange, red+blue=purple, blue+yellow=green as needed) before dyeing the ship to match.

hints.note: Colours are randomised per player; check the mast at least 3 times.

atoms.label: Dye the model ship to match the flag
atoms.detail: Mix the needed dyes and paint the model ship's pieces.

atoms.label: Talk to the Old Man (give the model ship)
atoms.detail: He recognises it as his own -- gives a chest key.

atoms.label: Open the two accessible chests for map scraps
atoms.detail: Chest 1 (captain's quarters, use the key): first scrap. Cross the rock-jump path north-west of the deck (Agility 25, boostable, no fall risk into water) to a second chest: second scrap.

atoms.label: Kill the Giant lobster guarding the third chest
atoms.detail: Level 32, appears when searching the chests near the ladder; must be killed within two minutes or it resets.

hints.note: Safespottable with Magic or Ranged from west of the nearest ladder.

atoms.label: Search the chest for the third map scrap
atoms.detail: After the Giant lobster is dead.

atoms.label: Combine the three map scraps
atoms.detail: Use one scrap on another twice to assemble the full treasure map.

atoms.label: Sail to Dragontooth Island and dig up the book
atoms.detail: Ghost captain on the Port Phasmatys dock; pay 25 ecto-tokens (10 with an activated ring of charos(a), or 500 for permanent access). Follow the treasure map's step-count directions from the Statue of Saradomin and dig with a spade.

atoms.label: Get the translation manual from Ak-Haranu (via Robin)
atoms.detail: Ak-Haranu on the Port Phasmatys docks wants Robin's signature on an oak longbow in trade for the manual. Beat Robin at Rune-Draw at the nearby pub (draw runes for points, avoid drawing a death rune, until he owes 100 coins) for his signature, then return it to Ak-Haranu.

hints.note: Rune-Draw is a dice-style minigame vs Robin; repeat until he owes 100 coins.

atoms.label: Talk to the Ghost innkeeper (get a bedsheet)
atoms.detail: He wants a bedsheet delivered to Robin -- keep it instead, to disguise as a ghost.

atoms.label: Colour the bedsheet with Ectofuntus slime
atoms.detail: Buy a bucket of slime from a Trader crewmember on the east docks (or fill one at the Ectofuntus slime pool), then dip the bedsheet.

atoms.label: Gather 10 petition signatures in disguise
atoms.detail: Wear the dyed bedsheet; talk to Gravingas near the north entrance for a petition form, then ask nearby ghost villagers for signatures (don't ask the same one twice in a row; skip any who demand ecto-tokens).

hints.note: Cycle between 2-3 willing ghosts, or switch worlds, until 10 signatures are collected.

atoms.label: Talk to Necrovarus (show the petition)
atoms.detail: He rages at the petition and drops a bone key -- pick it up.

atoms.label: Unlock Necrovarus's room and take his robes
atoms.detail: Use the bone key on the locked upstairs door; open and search the coffin.

atoms.label: Talk to the Old Crone (enchant the amulet)
atoms.detail: Give the robes, Book of Haricanto, translation manual, and ghostspeak amulet -- she performs a dancing ritual to empower the amulet.

atoms.label: Talk to Necrovarus (command him to release the ghosts)
atoms.detail: With the empowered ghostspeak amulet equipped, command him to free the ghosts he's holding.

atoms.label: Talk to Velorina (quest complete)
atoms.detail: She senses the barrier's removal and hands over a vial of ectoplasm -- the Ectophial.

checkpoints.label: Port Phasmatys: start -> Necrovarus refuses -> Velorina's hint
Ship + treasure map: repair, dye, lobster, dig

steps.detail: 43 QP gate makes this a mid-game unlock, not an early one. Tell Juna stories to earn a stone bowl recipe, then use a light creature (attracted by the sapphire lantern) to cross the chasm to a rock vein, mine a magic stone, chisel it into a stone bowl, and hand it to Juna to finish. The sapphire lantern doubles as the light source needed to safely navigate the caves and is reusable later for While Guthix Sleeps. Gates While Guthix Sleeps and the Hard Lumbridge & Draynor Diary. Note: 'Tears of Guthix' the quest and 'Tears of Guthix' the repeatable minigame it unlocks are the same wiki title-root but two distinct pages -- cited both above since the depth:04 brief's long-run-value framing refers to the minigame, not the quest itself.

req_items.name: Lit sapphire lantern
req_items.note: or the parts to make one: bullseye lantern/bullseye lantern (unf), cut sapphire, tinderbox, lamp oil from the Rimmington chemist or Dorgesh-Kaan lamp still

req_items.name: Rope
req_items.note: only needed if this is your first entry to the Lumbridge Swamp Caves and you lack The Lost Tribe progress

hints.note: Quest reward XP — counts toward your skills, replacing that much training.

atoms.label: Make a sapphire lantern (pre-quest)
atoms.detail: Add a cut sapphire to a bullseye lantern (unf), fill with lamp oil made from swamp tar (chemist's still, Rimmington, or the Dorgesh-Kaan lamp still), then light with a tinderbox. Bullseye lantern itself is gather/produce only per the quest's own list: Smithing 49, or pickpocket cave goblins at Thieving 36, or a Slayer 35 wall-beast kill -- never GE.

atoms.label: Enter the Lumbridge Swamp Caves
atoms.detail: Rope needed on first entry via the swamp entrance (dodge wall beasts by stopping one tile short of each hole, then running past; take the south path to avoid poison cave crawlers). Faster/safer via the Lumbridge cellar route if The Lost Tribe has been partially completed (pickaxe to clear rocks).

atoms.label: Talk to Juna (tell her stories)
atoms.detail: Chasm of Tears, deep in the caves. Tell her stories of the player's adventures -- she explains a stone bowl is needed to collect the tears, made from rock across the chasm, reached by attracting a light creature.

atoms.label: Attract a light creature across the chasm
atoms.detail: Climb the rocks back the way in; use 'attract' on a light creature with the lit sapphire lantern -- it carries the player across.

atoms.label: Mine a magic stone and chisel it into a bowl
atoms.detail: Pickaxe on the magic stone, then chisel into a stone bowl.

atoms.label: Talk to Juna (give the bowl)
atoms.detail: Climb down to Juna and hand over the stone bowl -- quest complete.

checkpoints.label: Prepare sapphire lantern, enter the caves
Juna: stories -> light creature -> bowl -> turn in

steps.detail: Pick a method: Mazchna tasks / Vannaka tasks.

methods.location: Canifis
methods.notes: Mazchna's assignments require Priest in Peril plus 20 Combat or 99 Slayer (page's own OR-gate) and are based out of Canifis in Morytania.

methods.location: Edgeville Dungeon
methods.notes: Vannaka requires 40 Combat or 99 Slayer (page-stated OR-gate) with no quest gate, based in the Edgeville Dungeon.

atoms.label: Go to Vannaka (Edgeville Dungeon)
atoms.detail: Requires 40 combat or 99 Slayer, per Slayer_training.s2's own master-access table -- already met by this route position (Attack/Strength/Defence all trained to 70 earlier in this segment).

atoms.label: Talk to Vannaka for a Slayer task
atoms.detail: 8 points/task per Slayer_training.s2's own table.

atoms.label: Complete Slayer tasks until Slayer 50
atoms.detail: Task monster varies per assignment -- genuinely randomised, not a fixed target.

hints.note: Vannaka's assignable-monster pool and per-task quantity not restated from Slayer_training.s2 here; left ?? rather than listing a guessed subset.

atoms.label: Alt: Mazchna (Canifis) tasks
atoms.detail: 6 points/task, requires Priest in Peril (already completed earlier in this route per the quests:quest-priest-in-peril ledger entry) or 20 combat / 99 Slayer.

steps.detail: Dialogue-free, environmental-storytelling 'Twisted Tale' quest.
