Translate a lost lizardman/Old Ones language by finding stone tablets, wood carvings and dirty notes across four hidden dungeons in sequence (Kebos campsite, Lake Molch Island, Xeric's Shrine, Ruins of Morra); each dungeon's translated words unlock the location clue for the next. Concludes revealing the Old Ones performed soul transference before the Citizens of Arceuus ever did. Wiki lists 'Required for completing: Desert Treasure II - The Fallen Empire' (Twisted Tale companion-quest cross-reference, not a normal prerequisite chain).

req_items.name: Secateurs
req_items.note: obtainable in-quest; magic secateurs also work

hints.note: Quest reward XP — counts toward your skills, replacing that much training.

atoms.label: Search the tent and camping equipment (start)
atoms.detail: Campsite south of the lizardman settlement, Kebos Lowlands (fairy ring BLS closest). Search the tent for Kasonde's journal (Old Ones lore) and the camping equipment for secateurs if not already carried, then climb down the hole.

atoms.label: Search the camp dungeon's tablets, carvings and vase
atoms.detail: Stone tables (1st stone tablet), two more stone tables (2 wood carvings), one vase (a dirty note hinting at translation), and the stone chest (phrase 'Miki Toka').

atoms.label: Translate the camp dungeon's words
atoms.detail: Own-words: input the discovered word-pairs for island/lake/time/vessel/garden/north per the carvings' illustrations -- directs the player north, under the island on Lake Molch.

atoms.label: Travel to Molch Island
atoms.detail: Fairy ring DJR then south-west to the east dock, boat across; or Kharedst's memoirs to Shayzien and run north-west.

atoms.label: Search the Molch Island dungeon's tablets, carvings and vase
atoms.detail: Climb down behind the hut; a dirty note on the vines hints Kasonde returned to camp. Cut the vines with secateurs; search tables (2nd stone tablet), one more table (3rd wood carving), the east vases (4th wood carving + phrase 'Tlane Kualt'), the chest (phrase 'Olkat'), and rubble by the farming patches (5th wood carving).

atoms.label: Translate the Molch Island words
atoms.detail: Own-words: input the 8 discovered word-pairs (west/poison/animal/body/food/earth/air/fire) -- directs the player west of the lake, to Xeric's Shrine.

atoms.label: Travel to Xeric's Shrine
atoms.detail: Board the boat back to Molch, then south-west to Xeric's Shrine.

atoms.label: Search Xeric's Shrine dungeon's tablets, carvings and compass
atoms.detail: Climb down at the shrine's east side. South-east stone table (3rd stone tablet), the adjacent open chest (a compass giving the cardinal-direction words), a north vase, two more stone tables, and the central mushroom (4 more wood carvings).

atoms.label: Translate Xeric's Shrine words
atoms.detail: Own-words: input the 7 discovered word-pairs (build/yes/no/move/arrive/east/south) -- directs the player to a structure south-east, in a forest: the Ruins of Morra.

atoms.label: Travel to the Ruins of Morra
atoms.detail: Boat to Shayzien then south-east past the Shayziens' Wall, or teleport to Shayzien via Kharedst's memoirs and run south.

atoms.label: Search the Ruins of Morra dungeon's final tablet and carvings
atoms.detail: Hole in front of the step pyramid. Southern stone table (final stone tablet), remaining tables/vase/chest/rubble for the last wood carvings and a warning note.

atoms.label: Translate the final words and read the warning
atoms.detail: Own-words: input the final 8 word-pairs (small/big/light/dark/life/death/knowledge/home). Read the completed tablet, then the warning note revealing Kasonde reached the same conclusion about the Old Ones and soul transference -- quest complete.

checkpoints.label: Kebos camp dungeon: journal, secateurs, first tablet
Xeric's Shrine dungeon: third tablet + compass
Ruins of Morra: final tablet + warning note

steps.detail: Plant ranarr seeds in herb patches with ultracompost; harvest ranarr weed. ~6.5 ranarr per run at 32 Farming with ultracompost. Loop every ~80 minutes.

mapMarkers.label: Falador herb patch (south of Falador, gardener Elstan)
Catherby herb patch (north of Catherby, gardener Dantaera)
Ardougne herb patch (north of Ardougne, gardener Kragen)
Hosidius herb patch (SW corner of Hosidius, gardener Marisi)

hints.value: min 6 w/ ultracompost; ~8.8 avg w/ ultracompost+secateurs+cape
hints.note: Herb_patch: 'using ultracompost...increase the minimum yield to 6 herbs per seed' (with 3 base harvest lives +1 per compost tier, max 6 w/ ultracompost, per the same yield mechanic documented on Guam_seed s2). Herb_patch/Seeds footnote: average-profit column 'Assumes average of 8.8 herbs per seed in a standard (non-protected) herb patch' premised on ultracompost+magic secateurs+farming cape (empirical sample).
RECURRING -- one atom per run, patch route ordered per pps-03-withdraw-herb-run (XREF: bg:pps-03-withdraw-herb-run).

steps.detail: Two-trip Entrana quest that unlocks the balloon transport network -- explicitly a hard prerequisite for Monkey Madness II's Gnome Stronghold route. Trip 1: gather papyrus/candle/dye/silk/sand-filled sacks around Entrana to help Auguste build a balloon frame. Trip 2 (after leaving to gather logs/willow branches, since axes can't be brought to Entrana): attach 12 willow branches and 10 regular logs to the balloon. Piloting is a 3-screen minigame of dropping sandbags, burning logs, pulling coloured ropes, and "relaxing" a set number of times per prompt to control altitude/direction -- crashing just costs 10 more logs and a restart from Auguste. Optionally stockpile extra noted logs (oak/willow/yew/magic) in log storage to unlock further balloon routes post-quest.

hints.note: Quest reward XP — counts toward your skills, replacing that much training.

atoms.label: Travel to Entrana (trip 1: papyrus, wool, potatoes, dyes, silk)
atoms.detail: Via Port Sarim boat; Entrana bans weapons/armour. Carry only papyrus, candle, ball of wool, sack of potatoes, dyes, silk, empty sacks for this leg.

atoms.label: Talk to Auguste (start Enlightened Journey)
atoms.detail: West Entrana, north of the Herblore shop. Agree to help test his balloon transport system.

atoms.label: Make an origami balloon
atoms.detail: Use papyrus on the ball of wool for a balloon structure, then the unlit candle on it -- do not light it, or the items must be regathered.

atoms.label: Talk to Auguste (first test launch)
atoms.detail: Cutscene: the origami balloon launches.

atoms.label: Talk to Auguste again (second launch)
atoms.detail: He takes the remaining papyrus and sack of potatoes -- second cutscene (mob attacks the balloon). Receives a basket of apples and Auguste's willow sapling.

atoms.label: Make 8 sandbags
atoms.detail: Use empty sacks on the sand pit south of Auguste.

atoms.label: Talk to Auguste (hand over all trip-1 items)
atoms.detail: Give every remaining item; cycle all dialogue options so nothing is missed.

atoms.label: Plant Auguste's willow sapling
atoms.detail: Any tree patch; give the local farmer the basket of apples to protect it. Gather/produce alternative to the wiki's own 'buy 12 unnoted willow branches from the GE' shortcut -- grown from the quest's own sapling instead.

atoms.label: Cut 12 willow branches
atoms.detail: Secateurs on the grown tree; 6 branches per cut, with a wait between cuts for more to regrow.

atoms.label: Gather 10 regular logs
atoms.detail: Axes cannot be brought to Entrana -- cut/bank the logs beforehand.

atoms.label: Travel to Entrana (trip 2: branches, logs, tinderbox)
atoms.detail: Return with the willow branches, regular logs, and a tinderbox.

atoms.label: Use a willow branch on the balloon basket
atoms.detail: Triggers a cutscene; the log storage interface appears.

atoms.label: Talk to Auguste (flight tips)
atoms.detail: Explains the balloon control panel before the flight interface opens.

atoms.label: Fly the balloon through all three screens
atoms.detail: Own-words: sandbag drop = up 2, log = up 1, relax = right, rope = down 1, red rope = down 2. Avoid every obstacle (birds/trees/houses/clouds) across 3 screens and land one space above the marked pad without overshooting.

atoms.label: Talk to Auguste (landed, quest complete)
atoms.detail: Quest complete; unlocks the balloon transport system.

steps.detail: Pick a method: Tree runs (maple) / Herb runs / Allotment runs (watermelon).

methods.location: tree patch circuit
methods.notes: Maple saplings (lvl45) replace willow in the tree run rotation for a larger per-check xp dump.

methods.location: herb patch circuit (3 patches free by default; Morytania/Harmony Island/Hosidius/Farming Guild/Troll Stronghold/Weiss/Civitas illa Fortis add more via quests/diary)
methods.notes: Herbs take 80 minutes to grow; treat patches with ultracompost to reduce disease and guarantee a 6-herb minimum yield with magic secateurs. Specific per-herb level gates live on a separate seed table page, out of this fetch's scope.

methods.location: allotment patch circuit, run alongside herb runs
methods.notes: At Farming 47 players add watermelon allotments alongside herb runs (54.5 xp per harvested watermelon); grow nasturtiums on the flower patch to prevent disease.

atoms.label: Bank: withdraw tree-run loadout
atoms.detail: Highest-tier tree saplings available (maple at 45+ per the page's own tree table) + payment coins for the gardener (own-farmed/self-funded, not a GE sapling purchase -- saplings can also be grown from seeds per Farming_training.s7).

atoms.label: Run the tree-patch circuit (check + replant) until Farming 50
atoms.detail: Tree runs are the single most effective Farming xp method per Farming_training.s7 -- pay the gardener to fell the mature tree, replant, check health of grown trees for xp. Passive: only ~5 minutes actively spent per run.

hints.note: RECURRING, ahead-of-time. XREF: farm-ranarr-patch and farm-herb-patch-guam (existing steps.jsonl rows, prayer-pot-supply chain) already run herb/ranarr patches on the same circuit shape and contribute passive Farming xp as a side effect of the same loadout/travel pattern -- reused as concurrent background contributors per U8 rather than re-authored here.

atoms.label: Alt: Allotment runs (watermelon) alongside herb runs
atoms.detail: Unlocks at Farming 47 per Farming_training.s16; 54.5 xp per harvested watermelon, run alongside the existing farm-ranarr-patch herb-run circuit rather than as a dedicated trip.

steps.detail: Prepare a Kelda stew using spiced stew with brown spice boosts. RNG: avg ~5 attempts. Rate: ??

mapMarkers.label: Rohak, tunnel under White Wolf Mountain ({{Map}}-sourced)

hints.note: inspect the frozen dwarf in the Lumbridge Castle dining room to start
Rohak sobers up if fed ales too slowly — bring 2 extra (6 total) as insurance, per the wiki walkthrough.
Quest reward XP — counts toward your skills, replacing that much training.

refs.title: Recipe for Disaster/Freeing the Mountain Dwarf
Recipe for Disaster/Freeing the Mountain Dwarf

steps.detail: Prepare a special stew using brown/orange/red/yellow spices in the Stronghold of Security dungeon. RNG: rate ??

hints.note: Quest reward XP — counts toward your skills, replacing that much training.

steps.detail: Long quest, mostly farming-timer-gated. Talk to Ellamaria then the Wise Old Man in Draynor (wearing ring of charos) to pass a quiz. Grow seeds for 5 NPCs to trade up to rarer seeds: Lyra (west of Port Phasmatys, fairy ring AJQ) grows onions for orchid seeds; Kragen (north Ardougne, fairy ring BJR) grows cabbages for snowdrop seeds; Elstan (south Falador) grows marigolds for delphinium seeds; Dantaera (Catherby) needs a cutting from the White Tree on Ice Mountain grown in a filled plant pot; Brother Althric (Edgeville monastery) needs the ring of charos(a) thrown down the well then retrieved with a fishing rod, plus rune dust used on a plant cure for diseased vines, for rose seeds; Bernald (behind Burthorpe pub) similarly needs a plant-cure/rune-dust vine cure via Alain at the Taverley tree patch, for vine seeds. Then move two statues via trolley (Lumbridge king statue east across the bridge to the garden's east plinth; Falador Saradomin statue north through the gate, cutscene, to the south plinth). Finally plant everything with compost/supercompost in the garden (10-15 min grow, cannot die), talk to Ellamaria, then King Roald (ring of charos(a) must be equipped or he won't follow) for the finishing cutscene.

req_items.name: Full leprechaun tool set
req_items.note: rake, seed dibber, spade, secateurs, watering can, gardening trowel

req_items.name: Rune dust
req_items.note: hammer/chisel rune essence, or pestle+mortar rune shards

hints.note: Quest reward XP — counts toward your skills, replacing that much training.

atoms.label: Talk to Queen Ellamaria (start Garden of Tranquillity)
atoms.detail: Fenced garden east of Varrock Palace. She hands over her wanted-plants list and sends the player to the Wise Old Man about diplomacy first.

atoms.label: Talk to the Wise Old Man (diplomacy quiz)
atoms.detail: Draynor Village, ring of charos in hand. Answer 6 required diplomacy prompts correctly (own-words: choosing compromise, generosity, enthusiasm for farming, humility, flattery, and patience over confrontation) -- the 7th accepts any answer. He enchants the ring.

atoms.label: Talk to Elstan (agree to grow marigolds)
atoms.detail: Farming patch south of Falador, ring of charos(a) worn. Ask about delphinium seeds; accept growing marigolds WITHOUT using the charm dialogue option (using charm gets refused first).

atoms.label: Plant the marigold seed
atoms.detail: Compost, water, plant cure as normal; ~20 minutes to grow.

atoms.label: Harvest and deliver the marigolds
atoms.detail: Give the harvested marigolds to Elstan.

atoms.label: Talk to Lyra (agree to grow onions)
atoms.detail: Allotment patch west of Port Phasmatys, ring of charos(a) worn. Ask about orchid seeds; accept growing onions WITHOUT charm.

atoms.label: Plant 3 onion seeds
atoms.detail: Flower patch must be empty first; ~40 minutes to grow.

atoms.label: Talk to Lyra (deliver the onions)
atoms.detail: Rewards 3 yellow + 3 pink orchid seeds.

atoms.label: Talk to Kragen (agree to grow cabbages)
atoms.detail: Allotment patch north of East Ardougne, ring of charos(a) worn. Ask about snowdrop seeds; accept growing cabbages WITHOUT charm.

atoms.label: Plant 3 cabbage seeds
atoms.detail: Flower patch must be empty first; ~40 minutes to grow.

atoms.label: Talk to Kragen (deliver the cabbages)
atoms.detail: Rewards 4 snowdrop seeds.

atoms.label: Talk to Dantaera (charm for the white tree)
atoms.detail: Catherby farming patch. Ask how to grow a White Tree, charm her -- she permits cutting a branch from the white tree atop Ice Mountain.

atoms.label: Cut and grow a white tree sapling
atoms.detail: Ice Mountain, west of Edgeville, near the Oracle. Secateurs on the white tree for a shoot; use it on a filled plant pot with the gardening trowel, then water it. Grows to a sapling in ~5 minutes.

atoms.label: Talk to Brother Althric (charm; told to discard the ring)
atoms.detail: Edgeville Monastery garden, ring of charos(a) worn. Charm him about the rosebushes -- he calls the ring an 'evil talisman' and demands it be thrown in the Edgeville well or destroyed.

atoms.label: Discard the ring of charos(a) as instructed
atoms.detail: Throw the ring into the Edgeville well (recoverable by fishing) or destroy it outright (recoverable by re-pickpocketing Dr Fenkenstrain).

atoms.label: Recover the ring of charos(a)
atoms.detail: If thrown in the well: fish it out with a fishing/fly fishing rod (several tries may be needed). If destroyed: pickpocket Dr Fenkenstrain again.

hints.note: Fishing the ring from the well can take several attempts.

atoms.label: Talk to Brother Althric again (no ring)
atoms.detail: Attempt to take the seeds again without the ring equipped -- he's now satisfied. Rewards all three rose seed colours.

atoms.label: Talk to Bernald (charm; treat the dying vines)
atoms.detail: The Toad and Chicken pub garden, Burthorpe, ring of charos(a) worn. Charm him about his dying vines; use one plant cure on them -- it doesn't work. Told to find Alain in Taverley.

atoms.label: Talk to Alain (learn to strengthen the cure)
atoms.detail: Taverley tree patch, near the members' gate. Do NOT use the charm dialogue option, or he refuses to help.

atoms.label: Make a strengthened plant cure
atoms.detail: Hammer a rune/pure essence into rune shards, then pestle and mortar into rune dust; use the dust on the remaining plant cure.

atoms.label: Talk to Bernald (cure the vines)
atoms.detail: Use the strengthened cure on the vines -- cured. Rewards Burthorpe vine seeds.

atoms.label: Talk to Queen Ellamaria (get the statue trolley)
atoms.detail: Ask about getting the statues -- she provides a trolley.

atoms.label: Push/pull the king's statue from Lumbridge to the garden
atoms.detail: Lumbridge Castle south exit; identify the 'king' statue, push/pull it across the bridge, then east and south into Ellamaria's garden; place on the north-east (east side) plinth.

hints.note: If the statue takes over 5 minutes to place it gets 'recaptured' and must be fetched again.

atoms.label: Push/pull the Saradomin statue from Falador to the garden
atoms.detail: Falador city square (not the park statue); a cutscene plays before the guards notice. Push/pull it out of Falador's north gate, then east and south into the garden; place on the central plinth.

hints.note: Guards discover the theft after 5 minutes; the statue must be re-fetched if so.

atoms.label: Plant every seed/sapling in Ellamaria's garden
atoms.detail: Rake the weeds first; no compost/watering needed except on the orchid pots (compost required there). Plant delphinium, orchids (both colours), snowdrop, all 3 rose colours, Burthorpe vine seed, and the white tree sapling; ~10-15 minutes to grow.

atoms.label: Fetch King Roald and give the garden tour
atoms.detail: South-east ground floor of Varrock Palace, ring of charos(a) worn. Charm him where possible; escort back without opening any interfaces or walking away -- cutscene tour, then the queen rewards the player.

checkpoints.label: Varrock: start -> Wise Old Man ring enchant
Catherby + Ice Mountain: Dantaera / white tree
Edgeville Monastery: Althric / roses / ring discard+recover
Burthorpe + Taverley: Bernald / Alain / vine seeds

steps.instruction: Pickpocket Master Farmers until ranarr seeds banked
steps.detail: Master Farmer at Draynor market. Keep herb seeds, drop junk seeds. Need one ranarr seed per patch per planned run (patches: Falador, Catherby, Ardougne, Hosidius + Farming Guild if unlocked). Seed rate: ??

mapMarkers.label: Master Farmer (Draynor Village) -- corrects existing marker (3088,3255), off by ~9 tiles; sourced from Master_Farmer's own {{LocLine|x:3080,y:3250}} pin

hints.note: Seed table is random; bank each ranarr immediately (HC habit).

hints.value: 1/268.75 (or 1/555.83 past Farming 85) inside the herb table, and the herb table itself is only 48/1000 of a successful pickpocket
hints.note: Master Farmer pickpocket chance table (Master_Farmer.s3): 90/240 (low/high out of 256) at level 1-99 normal, level requirement 38. Ranarr seed rate composite: chance-to-hit-herb-table (48/1000) x chance-of-ranarr-within-table (1/268.75) -- exact seeds-per-hour stays '??', not stated as a rate on this page.

media.caption: Pickpocket the Master Farmer at Draynor market (scenario capture)
Draynor market scene, animated (scenario capture, oracle PASS)

steps.instruction: Pickpocket Master Farmer at Draynor Village for guam seed
steps.detail: Pickpocket the Draynor Village Master Farmer until the herb-seed drop table rolls a guam seed -- the item's own page names monsters/seed-packs/master-farmers as its non-GE sources, and Master Farmer is the only one of those that's a repeatable, player-controlled action rather than a random drop.

hints.value: 485/1000 chance to roll the Allotment table is NOT this table -- guam is on the separate 48/1000 Herbs table, then 1/58.36 (or 1/67.2 below Farming 85) within it
hints.note: Master_Farmer Loot section, Herbs subtable; low overall hit rate, this is a background/opportunistic pickpocket target, not a dedicated farming loop.

steps.detail: Firemaking 45 is listed as a requirement but is not actually needed in practice (only used to identify brazier fuel by inspection; trial-and-error works without it). Build a statue for Lazim from 32kg sandstone base + 20kg sandstone body (chiseled down from bigger pieces), pick a head design, carve it from a 5kg granite piece, hand it over and fall into a buried temple. Bottom floor: chisel a fallen statue for 4 limbs, collect M/R/K/Z sigils by walking the outer hallway rooms (limbs auto-consumed to open each door), place all 4 sigils in the center room. Middle floor: mold soft clay + carved 5kg granite into a new stone head for the pedestal (triggers cutscene), then solve 4 corner puzzles - feed food to Pentyn (NW), cast a wind spell on the furnace (NE), light 6 braziers with correct fuel per item (SE), cast a fire spell on the fountain (SW) - to pass the magic barrier. Top floor: cast Crumble Undead on a boneguard, then Protect-from-Melee-tank while talking to a second boneguard, patch a wall with 3 sandstone pieces (chisel each into place) to finish. Region-opener quest, no known deeper dependency; unlocks quick desert-temple teleport infrastructure via Camulet.

req_items.name: food item (bread/pie/cake/pizza/baked potato)
req_items.note: must not be partial or burnt

req_items.name: logs (regular, oak, willow, and maple)
req_items.note: one of each tier needed for the brazier puzzle

req_items.name: soft clay, coal, 52kg sandstone, and two 5kg granite
runes for a Fire spell, a Wind spell, and Crumble Undead
req_items.note: any tier of Fire Bolt/Blast/Wave and Wind Bolt/Blast/Wave works

hints.note: Quest reward XP — counts toward your skills, replacing that much training.

atoms.label: Talk to Lazim (start Enakhra's Lament)
atoms.detail: South of the Bandit Camp, west of the Ancient Pyramid (free ferry via Ruins of Unkah + Shantay Pass, or Pharaoh's Sceptre to Jaldraocht). Agree to help build his statue -- asked for 32kg of sandstone.

atoms.label: Mine 32kg of sandstone and deliver it
atoms.detail: Nearby quarry; sandstone comes in 1/2/5/10kg blocks (chisel bigger blocks smaller as needed). Give pieces to Lazim one at a time until 32kg total.

atoms.label: Chisel the 32kg block into a statue base
atoms.detail: Chisel the fused 32kg block, then place it on the ground next to Lazim.

atoms.label: Mine 20kg more sandstone and deliver it
atoms.detail: Same quarry.

atoms.label: Chisel the 20kg block into a statue body
atoms.detail: Chisel and attach to the base.

atoms.label: Mine granite and chisel a statue head
atoms.detail: Mine two 5kg granite pieces (one for the head now, one spare for later) plus clay and coal while at the quarry. Chisel one 5kg piece into the chosen head (own head refused; choose Lazim, camel, or a god's head).

atoms.label: Place the head on the statue
atoms.detail: The statue falls through the ground into a hidden temple below -- Lazim pushes the player down after it.

atoms.label: Talk to Lazim (in the temple)
atoms.detail: He admits this was the plan all along and offers a treasure share -- explains the temple's doors need stone limbs, not keys.

atoms.label: Chisel/mine the 4 stone limbs off the fallen statue
atoms.detail: Left/right arm, left/right leg -- each opens one outer door.

atoms.label: Open the 4 outer doors and collect the Z/R/K sigils
atoms.detail: Travel anticlockwise so the 4 cutscenes play in order (own-words: Enakhra completing the temple for Zamorak; Avarrockian knights slain trying to stop her; Akthanakos failing to turn her from Zamorak; Enakhra animating a weak skeleton weapon for Zamorak). Each big room has a sigil (Z/R/K, plus the starting room's M).

atoms.label: Use a sigil to unlock the central door
atoms.detail: Climb the ladder up; a magic barrier blocks progress next to a recessed pedestal.

atoms.label: Make a camel-head mould and matching granite head
atoms.detail: Soft clay (from mined clay + water) on the recess pedestal makes a positive mould; chisel the spare 5kg granite to match.

atoms.label: Place the granite camel head into the pedestal
atoms.detail: Cutscene: Akthanakos is revealed standing confused by the pedestal before Enakhra freezes him.

atoms.label: Clear the Smoke room's furnace
atoms.detail: North-east corridor; cast a Wind Bolt or stronger to clear the blocked grate.

atoms.label: Light the Shadow room's braziers
atoms.detail: South-east corridor; light a candle before entering to avoid darkness damage. Own-words: guess-and-check which of logs/oak logs/willow logs/maple logs/a candle/coal lights each of the 6 braziers (Firemaking 45 only reveals the answer, it isn't required to light them).

atoms.label: Talk to Pentyn (Blood room) and give him food
atoms.detail: North-west corridor; the frozen knight is starving. Give a full (not half-eaten) bread/pie/cake/pizza/baked potato -- right-click use it on him. He shares advice on the other 3 rooms.

atoms.label: Thaw the Ice room's fountain
atoms.detail: South-west corridor; cast a Fire Bolt or stronger.

atoms.label: Cast Crumble Undead on the first Boneguard
atoms.detail: North of the barrier ladder. The spell must land; it collapses and a freed spirit asks the player to bury 5 big bones.

atoms.label: Talk to the second Boneguard with Protect from Melee active
atoms.detail: It attacks a couple of times then relents -- reveals it was enslaved by Enakhra and asks for help finishing a wall to block her line of sight, for 3 loads of sandstone.

atoms.label: Repair the Boneguard's wall (3 loads)
atoms.detail: Take sandstone from the nearby rubble pile, use on the wall, then chisel to trim; repeat 3 times.

atoms.label: Talk to the freed Boneguard (reveals Akthanakos)
atoms.detail: It crumbles and reveals itself as the Mahjarrat Akthanakos, freed after millennia -- gives the Camulet. Cutscene: Enakhra destroys the wall and both flee north as skeletons -- quest complete.

checkpoints.label: Desert quarry: build the sandstone/granite statue
Temple entry: statue limbs, sigils, camel-head puzzle

steps.detail: Pick a method: Blast Furnace — gold bars, wearing goldsmith gauntlets / Giants' Foundry — forge Steel/Mithril alloy swords for Kovac / Anvil smithing — steel platebodies (no goldsmith gauntlets needed) / Smithing steel cannonballs (ammo mould).

methods.method: Blast Furnace — gold bars, wearing goldsmith gauntlets
methods.location: Blast Furnace, Keldagrim

quests: The Giant Dwarf (started, for Keldagrim access via the Dwarven Boatman)

methods.notes: 380,000 xp/h is the guide's stated rate wearing goldsmith gauntlets (56.2 xp/ore vs 22.5 without). Ice gloves speed up banking further but are an optional accessory, not gated as required.

methods.method: Giants' Foundry — forge Steel/Mithril alloy swords for Kovac
methods.location: Giants' Foundry minigame
methods.notes: 164,640 xp/h is the guide's stated rate for the steel/mithril alloy tier, which unlocks at Smithing 50.

methods.method: Anvil smithing — steel platebodies (no goldsmith gauntlets needed)
methods.location: Any anvil (not location-specific in this section)
methods.notes: Guide frames this as the fallback for accounts that lack goldsmith gauntlets; 144,000 xp/h covers levels 48-68 on steel platebodies, so it only applies to the tail of this band.

methods.location: Any furnace with an ammo mould

items: Ammo mould (or double ammo mould for 27,648 xp/h)

methods.notes: Low-attention, usually profitable, but much slower xp than the other options; unlocks at Smithing 35. Membership status of the ammo mould source is not stated in this section, left ??.

atoms.label: Bank: withdraw pickaxe + hammer
atoms.detail: Pickaxe equipped for mining, hammer for the anvil.

atoms.label: Mine iron ore and coal
atoms.detail: Own-mined, never bought. Exact mining site not pinned -- Mining level reached by this route position (train-mining-45, earlier in the previous segment) may not meet the Mining Guild's 60 requirement, so left as a generic iron+coal deposit rather than assuming Guild access.

atoms.label: Smelt steel bars
atoms.detail: 1 iron ore + 2 coal -> 1 steel bar at a furnace (own-mined inputs).

atoms.label: Smith steel platebodies at an anvil until Smithing 60
atoms.detail: 144,000 xp/h per Pay-to-play_Smithing_training.s10's own table (48-68 band, this training band covers 40-60 as a sub-range); no goldsmith gauntlets needed, unlike the coarse row's own recommended Blast Furnace gold-bar method.

hints.note: Smithed platebodies can feed a later High Level Alchemy loop (train-magic-70's tmg70-02, own-produced fodder) instead of GE sale.

checkpoints.label: Self-sufficient anvil smithing (mine -> smelt -> smith), gather/produce only

steps.detail: Cook raw monkfish on a range. Stop burning at 92 (68 with cooking gauntlets). Terminal step of the monkfish food supply chain.

hints.note: 1 raw_monkfish -> 1 food_monkfish per action (ticks=1, facilities=Cooking range). Ref: Monkfish Creation.
Wearing cooking gauntlets lowers the stop-burning level; see notes for the full table.

steps.detail: Prepare a creme brulee supreme. Requires Cooking 70. Ice gloves needed during boss fight (from Ice Queen).

refs.title: Recipe for Disaster/Freeing Sir Amik Varze

hints.note: Quest reward XP — counts toward your skills, replacing that much training.

steps.detail: Requires Icthlarin's Little Helper and Gertrude's Cat complete, plus The Giant Dwarf started for Keldagrim access. Your cat catches rats through five vignettes across the map: sneak it past guards in an Ardougne mansion to nab 6 rats, poison cheese to lure rats from a Varrock warehouse's holes, smoke a rat hole in Keldagrim with a lit weed pot, meet Felkrash in Port Sarim's rat pits, then learn animal charming from Ali the Snake Charmer in Pollnivneach (an 8-note sequence: D G E F# B(+octave) C# A) to finish.

req_items.name: Rat poison
req_items.note: or ingredients to make it: empty vial, cleaned kwuarm, red spiders' eggs

req_items.name: Snake charm
req_items.note: from The Feud or obtained in-quest

hints.note: Quest reward XP — counts toward your skills, replacing that much training.

atoms.label: Talk to Gertrude (start Ratcatchers)
atoms.detail: West of Varrock. Directs the player to the Sisters Grime in Varrock Sewers.

atoms.label: Talk to the Sisters Grime (Phingspet + Grimesquit)
atoms.detail: East of the Palace exit, Varrock Sewers. They must sniff the cat before it starts counting caught rats -- then tasks the player with catching 8 rats.

atoms.label: Chase 8 rats in the Varrock Sewers
atoms.detail: Use the cat's 'Chase' option.

atoms.label: Talk to the Sisters Grime (turn in)
atoms.detail: Rewards a rat pole; directs the player to Jimmy Dazzler in East Ardougne.

atoms.label: Talk to Jimmy Dazzler
atoms.detail: House west of the Flying Horse Inn, East Ardougne. He needs a client's mansion cleared of rats unofficially -- gives Directions, then teleports the player to the mansion gardens.

atoms.label: Sneak through the mansion and catch 6 rats
atoms.detail: Own-words: three guard-patrol checkpoints must be crossed unseen (Run recommended, patience required -- being spotted resets to the last checkpoint, not the start). Catch 1 rat in the first upstairs room, 2 in the next, then the last 3 plus the kitchen once past the guards entirely.

hints.note: Guard patrol timing is scripted; wait for the correct guard position before each dash, per each room's own pattern.

atoms.label: Talk to Jimmy Dazzler (turn in)
atoms.detail: Rewards access to the Ardougne Rat Pits; directs the player to Hooknosed Jack in south-east Varrock.

atoms.label: Talk to Hooknosed Jack
atoms.detail: South-east Varrock. Warehouse rat infestation -- he can make rat poison from a vial, red spiders' eggs, and a kwuarm if not already carried.

atoms.label: Poison 4 cheese
atoms.detail: Use rat poison on 4 pieces of cheese.

atoms.label: Poison the warehouse's 4 rat holes
atoms.detail: Top of the warehouse south of the pub; use the poisoned cheese on each hole (don't eat it).

atoms.label: Talk to Hooknosed Jack (Pox got poisoned)
atoms.detail: His cat Pox ate a poisoned rat -- sends the player to the Apothecary for an antidote.

atoms.label: Make cat antipoison at the Apothecary
atoms.detail: West Varrock; give a marrentill herb, crushed unicorn horn, and a bucket of milk.

atoms.label: Talk to Hooknosed Jack (cure Pox)
atoms.detail: Give the antipoison -- Pox recovers; warns of the King rat.

atoms.label: Send the cat to fight the King rat
atoms.detail: Warehouse upstairs; 10 HP, max 1 damage per hit. Use the cat on the hole in the wall to start; heal with fish on the same hole (not the cat) as needed.

hints.note: Choose 'Be careful!' so the cat auto-retreats at 1 HP instead of risking death.

atoms.label: Talk to Hooknosed Jack (turn in)
atoms.detail: Rewards access to the Varrock Rat Pits; directs the player to Smokin' Joe in Keldagrim.

atoms.label: Talk to Smokin' Joe
atoms.detail: East Keldagrim, by the pickaxe shop. Agree to help smoke out his rats.

atoms.label: Smoke out Smokin' Joe's rat hole
atoms.detail: Light a pot of weeds with a tinderbox, use on the rat hole east of Smokin' Joe. Drop the cat on the ground, wear the catspeak amulet, then use the smouldering pot on the hole again -- the cat offers to ambush the rats; accept.

atoms.label: Talk to Smokin' Joe (turn in)
atoms.detail: Rewards access to the Keldagrim Rat Pits; directs the player to The Face in Port Sarim.

atoms.label: Talk to The Face
atoms.detail: Port Sarim, by the fishing shop. Directs the player down to Felkrash in the rat pits.

atoms.label: Talk to Felkrash (rat pits)
atoms.detail: Wants all of Port Sarim's vermin cleared at once.

atoms.label: Talk to The Face again (ask about the snake charmer)
atoms.detail: 3rd dialogue option; reveals a snake charmer in Pollnivneach.

atoms.label: Talk to Ali/Badir the Snake Charmer
atoms.detail: South of the bar, Pollnivneach. Use a coin on his money pot for attention; ask about charming other animals, offer money, then walk away until prompted to stop. Rewards a music scroll + snake charm for 100gp (50gp with ring of charos, and skips the walk-away step).

atoms.label: Play the charming tune at the Port Sarim docks
atoms.detail: Own-words: compose the notes shown on the music scroll in order, then play -- charms the vermin into following the player into the ocean (cutscene).

atoms.label: Talk to Felkrash (quest complete)
atoms.detail: Quest complete.

checkpoints.label: Varrock warehouse: Hooknosed Jack + King rat
Port Sarim + Pollnivneach: The Face, Felkrash, snake charm

steps.detail: Direct sequel to Dwarf Cannon. Cross the river to Dondakan via the Dwarven Ferryman, then collect 3 Dwarven lore book pages in the Dwarven Mine (kill scorpions, search mine carts, mine any non-Adamantite/Coal rock). Make a golden cannonball (gold bar smelted at a furnace) and fire it at Dondakan's rock to get a Schematic; combine it with base schematics from the lore book and further schematics from the Dwarf Engineer, then smith a gold helmet. Final battle: equip the gold helmet + best pickaxe, mine 6 or 15 gold ore inside the arena (15 lowers the boss from level 125 to 75), then fight one of three Arzinian Avatar variants (chosen by your highest combat stat) within an 8-minute time limit -- removing the helmet mid-fight aborts the attempt. Talk to Dondakan again to finish.

req_items.name: Ammo mould
req_items.note: buyable in-quest for 5 coins; a double ammo mould also works

hints.note: Quest reward XP — counts toward your skills, replacing that much training.

atoms.label: Talk to Dondakan (start Between a Rock...)
atoms.detail: Keldagrim SW mine, across the Dwarven Ferryman's river (2 coins or free with ring of charos(a)). Ask why he's firing a cannon at the wall, then ask again -- he wants information about the rock and sends the player to the Librarian.

atoms.label: Talk to the Engineer (Keldagrim palace anvil room)
atoms.detail: Western Trading Consortium, near the anvil (not the anvil itself, the room housing it). Sends the player to Rolad at the Dwarven Mine camp near Ice Mountain.

atoms.label: Talk to Rolad
atoms.detail: Eastern house, Dwarven Mine entrance camp. Asks the player to find 3 pages from a book about the rock.

atoms.label: Kill scorpions for page 1
atoms.detail: South-eastern Dwarven Mine.

hints.note: May take several kills; try switching worlds if unlucky.

atoms.label: Search the mine carts for page 2
atoms.detail: Along the mine's cart tracks.

atoms.label: Mine an ore rock for page 3
atoms.detail: Clay, copper, tin, or iron rocks inside the mine.

atoms.label: Talk to Rolad (deliver the pages, lie to keep the book)
atoms.detail: Give all 3 pages for the Dwarven lore book; when asked to return it, choose the lying dialogue option and keep it.

atoms.label: Buy an ammo mould from Nulodion
atoms.detail: Western house next to Rolad's, Dwarven Mine camp.

atoms.label: Talk to Dondakan (show a gold bar)
atoms.detail: Use a gold bar (or a gold ore, from the vein south of Dondakan's) on him -- he wants a golden cannonball made from it.

atoms.label: Smith a golden cannonball
atoms.detail: Any furnace (Falador, Edgeville, Zanaris after Lost City, Rellekka after Fremennik Trials) with the gold bar and the cannonball mould.

atoms.label: Talk to Dondakan (give the golden cannonball)
atoms.detail: He fires it through the wall, then wants to fire the player through too -- needs cannon-firing schematics and a gold helmet (Smithing 50) for safety.

atoms.label: Smith a gold helmet
atoms.detail: Any anvil, 3 gold bars.

atoms.label: Get the second schematic from the Engineer
atoms.detail: Western Keldagrim palace anvil room.

atoms.label: Read the last page of the Dwarven lore book
atoms.detail: Reveals the third schematic.

atoms.label: Talk to Khorvak (fourth schematic)
atoms.detail: White Wolf Tunnel bar, via Camelot Teleport or Burthorpe Games Room. Give him a dwarven stout from the table, or refuse -- either way he provides the final schematic.

atoms.label: Assemble all four schematics
atoms.detail: Move/rotate each of the 3 gathered pieces to fit the original schematic Dondakan gave.

atoms.label: Talk to Dondakan (assembled schematic)
atoms.detail: Return with the completed design.

atoms.label: Mine gold ore before entering the rock
atoms.detail: 6 minimum, 15 recommended (lowers the boss's combat level from 125 to 75). Must remain in the inventory -- equip the gold helmet first or any gold already carried disappears.

atoms.label: Fight the Arzinian Being of Bordanzan
atoms.detail: Equip the gold helmet, ask Dondakan to fire the player in, then talk to the second set of flames at the centre. 8-minute timer to mine gold AND defeat it; form (Magic/Ranged/Strength) depends on the player's highest combat stat.

hints.note: Removing the gold helmet at any point teleports the player back out to Dondakan -- an emergency escape.

atoms.label: Talk to Dondakan (quest complete)
atoms.detail: Quest complete.

checkpoints.label: Riddle of the Rock: Arzinian Avatar fight

steps.detail: Must beat 3 level-75 golems (white/grey/black), each weak to a different melee style (stab/slash/crush respectively) or a ranged/magic water-channel puzzle. Talk Awusah then Ghaslor the Elder for the ballad, find torn robe top+bottom in a cupboard, repair with needle+thread and equip (Robes of Elidinis), telegrab an ancestral key. Follow the river north to a waterfall cave, rope the overhanging root, use the ancestral key wearing the robes to open the door. Kill white golem (stab) then clear its water channel via Thieving; kill grey golem (slash) then clear via pickaxe; kill black golem (crush) then clear via Ranged/Magic on a target. Talk to a spirit through the north door, return to Nardah. Separately: take a genie's shoes by Awusah's door, knife them for a sole, find a crevice west of the general store, rope it, talk to and strike a deal with the Genie for a statuette, then place the statuette on the shrine plinth north of the fountain to finish. Region-opener (Nardah/desert), no known deeper dependency; useful all-purpose restoration shrine unlock.

req_items.name: Crush/stab/slash weapons
req_items.note: one weapon of each combat style, or a spear/hasta/bladed staff that covers all 3

req_items.name: Ranged or Magic attack method
req_items.note: 37 Ranged is needed even for the magic option

hints.note: Quest reward XP — counts toward your skills, replacing that much training.

atoms.label: Talk to Awusah the Mayor (start Spirits of the Elid)
atoms.detail: Nardah. Learns of the town's curse and dried-up water supply.

atoms.label: Talk to Ghaslor the Elder (get the ballad)
atoms.detail: House just north of the mayor's. Do not bank or drop the ballad -- it's needed later.

atoms.label: Search the cupboards for torn robes
atoms.detail: Building housing Shiratti the Custodian, west of the mayor's house.

atoms.label: Repair the robes of Elidinis
atoms.detail: Needle and thread on both torn robe pieces.

atoms.label: Cast Telekinetic Grab on the ancestral key
atoms.detail: Steals it from its enclosed display area.

atoms.label: Travel to the River Elid waterfall and enter
atoms.detail: North-west of Nardah, following the river bank to its source (passes a bronze pickaxe/shortbow/bronze arrow respawn and a pluckable Desert Phoenix feather). Use a rope on the root above the waterfall to enter.

atoms.label: Open the temple door wearing the robes
atoms.detail: Robes of Elidinis worn, ballad and ancestral key carried.

atoms.label: Kill the Black golem (crush attacks)
atoms.detail: North-east room. Level 75; vulnerable to crush.

atoms.label: Clear the north-east water channel
atoms.detail: Attack the target across the channel with Ranged or Magic.

atoms.label: Kill the Grey golem (slash attacks)
atoms.detail: East room. Level 75; vulnerable to slash.

atoms.label: Clear the east water channel
atoms.detail: Use a pickaxe on the channel.

atoms.label: Kill the White golem (stab attacks)
atoms.detail: South room. Level 75; vulnerable to stab.

atoms.label: Clear the south water channel
atoms.detail: Requires Thieving 37 to clear.

atoms.label: Talk to the spirits Nirrie, Tirrie and Hallak
atoms.detail: Through the remaining north door, around the lake. Told to recover the Statue of Elidinis from a crevice west of Nardah.

atoms.label: Remove the soles from the mayor's shoes
atoms.detail: Nardah; knife on the shoes left by his door.

atoms.label: Travel to the crevice and enter
atoms.detail: West of the Nardah general store; rope on the crevice, light source required to avoid bug damage.

atoms.label: Talk to the genie (trade soles for the statue)
atoms.detail: Give the mayor's soles to receive the Statue of Elidinis.

atoms.label: Place the Statue of Elidinis on the shrine plinth
atoms.detail: Nardah shrine (same building the ancestral key was stolen from) -- quest complete.

checkpoints.label: Nardah: start, ballad, robes, ancestral key

steps.detail: Must be able to defeat a level 84 Fire Warrior of Lesarkus with Ranged. Choice quest with a good path (side with Guardians of Armadyl, kill Lucien level 14) or evil path (steal the Staff of Armadyl for Lucien, may need to kill a safespottable level 43 Guardian of Armadyl). Enter the temple dungeon south of the Ranging Guild; get boots of lightness from behind a web (needs light source+knife), equip Pendant of Lucien to pass the north gate, cross a lava bridge at -1kg or less, take a lever, cross back and attach the lever to a bracket then pull it, loot ice arrows from chests along an icy path (16 arrows enough with Ava's + 60 Ranged). Go back through the north gate, search-and-pull another lever (needs 42 Thieving), fight through to the Fire Warrior of Lesarkus (level 84, kill with ice arrows, Protect from Magic negates damage), then hand Winelda 20 unnoted limpwurt roots at once to be teleported across the lava (one-way, no going back - caution for ironmen). Optionally grab a shiny key for a dungeon shortcut. Push through to the Guardians of Armadyl room and pick a side to finish.

hints.note: Quest reward XP — counts toward your skills, replacing that much training.

atoms.label: Talk to Lucien (start Temple of Ikov)
atoms.detail: Flying Horse Inn, north-western East Ardougne. Agree to retrieve the Staff of Armadyl from the Temple of Ikov -- given the Pendant of Lucien to enter the Chamber of Fear.

atoms.label: Enter the Temple of Ikov dungeon
atoms.detail: South of the Ranging Guild, west of the Sorcerer's Tower. Climb down the ladder.

atoms.label: Get the boots of lightness
atoms.detail: West to a set of stairs down (light source needed); slash the web, take and equip the boots -- the cheapest way to reach -1kg for the bridge.

atoms.label: Cross the unsteady bridge at -1kg or lighter
atoms.detail: Pendant of Lucien worn to pass the north gate. Drop any items needed to reach -1kg or lower (failing costs 20 damage) before crossing; take the lever on the far side.

atoms.label: Pull the lever to open the southern room
atoms.detail: Place the retrieved lever on the wall bracket south-west of the entrance, then pull it.

atoms.label: Gather ice arrows from the ice chamber chests
atoms.detail: 6 chests, only one holding arrows (1-5) at a time -- keep re-searching. Only 1 ice arrow is needed if using throwing weapons instead of a bow.

hints.note: Arrow spawn chest is reselected randomly after each loot, including in succession.

atoms.label: Search then pull the trapped lever
atoms.detail: Small alcove north of the ice chamber. Search for traps first (Thieving 42) or take 20 spike damage, then pull to unlock the western passage.

atoms.label: Defeat the Fire Warrior of Lesarkus
atoms.detail: Level 84; only takes damage from ice arrows (or a throwing weapon with at least 1 ice arrow equipped, which bypasses the Ranged 40 requirement). Uses only Magic -- Protect from Magic recommended.

atoms.label: Talk to Winelda (pay the lava crossing)
atoms.detail: Give all 20 unnoted limpwurt roots at once -- she teleports the player across the lava.

atoms.label: Push the brick wall to reveal the hidden room
atoms.detail: Past the skeletons -- opens into the room where the choice is made.

atoms.label: Side with the Guardians of Armadyl
atoms.detail: Unequip the Pendant of Lucien first. Tell them Lucien wants the staff for a reward, accept their cleansing, then agree to help defeat Lucien -- given the Armadyl pendant (must be worn to fight him).

atoms.label: Side with Lucien
atoms.detail: Take the Staff of Armadyl from the north-west table -- a level 43 Guardian attacks; defeat it and take the staff. (Killing rather than talking to the Guardians preserves the option to still obtain the Armadyl pendant later.)

atoms.label: Defeat Lucien (Guardians' side)
atoms.detail: His house between Edgeville and the Grand Exchange, Armadyl pendant equipped -- level 14 -- quest complete.

atoms.label: Give the staff to Lucien (Lucien's side)
atoms.detail: His house between Edgeville and the Grand Exchange -- quest complete.

checkpoints.label: Temple dungeon: boots, bridge, southern room
Ice chamber + Fire Warrior of Lesarkus
Picking a side: Guardians vs Lucien

steps.detail: Required for RFD Pirate Pete. Moderate quest on Braindeath Island.

hints.note: Quest reward XP — counts toward your skills, replacing that much training.

atoms.label: Talk to Pirate Pete at the dock to start
atoms.detail: Pirate Pete waits at the dock north-east of the Ectofuntus; agree to help him, agree past his Barrelor warning, then refuse the money he offers before he knocks you out and rows you off.

atoms.label: Wake up and talk to Captain Braindeath
atoms.detail: A cutscene reveals Pete's story was fabricated; you wake in the rum brewery on Braindeath Island and Captain Braindeath explains the zombie-pirate siege and the rum plan.

atoms.label: Take the rake and seed dibber from the basement cupboard
atoms.detail: If not already held, go down the north-west ladder to the basement and head south-east past the spiders to a cupboard.

atoms.label: Intimidate zombie swabs blocking the farming patches
atoms.detail: Leave via the southernmost stairway; if attacked by zombie swabs, walk out of combat and right-click Intimidate to permanently stop them attacking.

atoms.label: Rake and plant the blindweed seed
atoms.detail: Use the rake on the only usable (south-eastern) patch to clear weeds, then plant Braindeath's seed with the dibber.

atoms.label: Harvest the grown blindweed
atoms.detail: Wait for the "I wonder how my blindweed is coming along..." notification, then harvest. If lost afterward, Braindeath supplies a backup.

atoms.label: Add blindweed to the hopper upstairs
atoms.detail: Climb the south-eastern ladder and use the blindweed on the north-western hopper.

atoms.label: Ask Braindeath for the next ingredient (stagnant water)
atoms.detail: He hands over a bucket if not already held and sends you to a nearby volcano.

atoms.label: Fill the bucket with stagnant water at the volcano
atoms.detail: Exit south then west past 50% Luke's gate (Ring of charos (a) or a tinderbox on him for optional dialogue) and up the volcano.

atoms.label: Pour the stagnant water into the hopper
atoms.detail: Return to the house and add the water to the hopper, then talk to Braindeath.

atoms.label: Catch 5 sluglings (or karamthulhu) at the nearby fishing spot
atoms.detail: Braindeath hands over a fishbowl tangled in a net (use them on each other if untangled). Fish at the spot by the farming patch.

atoms.label: Add the sluglings to the pressure barrel and pull the lever
atoms.detail: Upstairs next to the hopper; pulling the lever sets the brewing apparatus spinning.

atoms.label: Get the wrench blessed by Davey
atoms.detail: Former priest Davey, west side of the house, only blesses the wrench with 47+ available Prayer points (does not drain Prayer).

atoms.label: Beat the possessed controls and kill the Evil spirit
atoms.detail: Hit the controls south of Braindeath with the blessed wrench; a level-150 Evil spirit attacks — negate with Protect from Melee or a Ranged/Magic/halberd safespot.

atoms.label: Learn the final ingredient is a fever spider carcass
atoms.detail: Complete the full dialogue with Braindeath or the carcass will not drop from the kill.

atoms.label: Kill a fever spider in the basement for its carcass
atoms.detail: Fever spiders inflict disease even through Protect from Melee; negate with a safespot, Slayer gloves, or a cure such as Relicym's balm.

hints.value: Killing the fever spider also completes a medium Morytania Diary task.

atoms.label: Add the fever spider carcass to the hopper
atoms.detail: Finishes the rum recipe.

atoms.label: Collect the finished 'rum' from the output tap
atoms.detail: South end of the machinery; Braindeath supplies a bucket if not already held.

atoms.label: Give the 'rum' to Captain Donnie
atoms.detail: Found near the farming patches; he downs it and accidentally names his boss, Rabid Jack.

atoms.label: Report Rabid Jack's name to Braindeath to finish
atoms.detail: He is shocked, then thanks you and confirms the brewery stays put.

checkpoints.label: Setting out and reaching Braindeath Island
Evil spirits and the fever spider

steps.detail: Unlocks Piscatoris Fishing Colony monkfish spot. Required for the monkfish food supply chain.

hints.note: start: agree to fight the sea trolls
Quest reward XP — counts toward your skills, replacing that much training.

atoms.label: Talk to Herman Caranos
atoms.detail: Talk to Herman Caranos at the Piscatoris Fishing Colony, north of fairy ring code AKQ; the offered cutscene is optional.

hints.note: start: agree to fight the sea trolls

atoms.label: Gather blood, mist, and lava runes
atoms.detail: Gather 5 blood runes, 10 mist runes, and 10 lava runes before visiting the Wise Old Man.

atoms.label: Talk to the Wise Old Man
atoms.detail: Talk to the Wise Old Man in Draynor Village, handing over the gathered runes.

atoms.label: Bring combat supplies for the Sea Trolls
atoms.detail: Bring food, armour, a melee or ranged weapon, and prayer potions to fight the Sea Trolls guarding the colony.

atoms.label: Return to the Colony with the Wise Old Man
atoms.detail: Return to the Fishing Colony and talk to the Wise Old Man.

atoms.label: Fight through the Sea Trolls into the Colony
atoms.detail: Kill the level-79 Sea Trolls blocking the entrance and collect 7 of their bones if needed for later; note that after 1-3 kills the trolls switch to dropping only big bones, which don't count toward that requirement.

atoms.label: Talk to Herman in the east building
atoms.detail: Talk to Herman inside the east building -- click inside the building itself, not directly on Herman, or your character will run back outside.

atoms.label: Gather repair materials
atoms.detail: Bring logs, a tinderbox (or get one from Franklin), 5 iron bars, a hammer (or get one from Franklin), a small fishing net (or get one from Arnold), and level-boosting items if below Fishing 62 or Smithing 45.

atoms.label: Talk to Franklin Caranos
atoms.detail: Talk to Franklin Caranos near the colony entrance to begin repairs.

atoms.label: Light the firebox
atoms.detail: Use a log on the firebox -- not the furnace -- and light it, inside the building marked with the furnace symbol; Franklin supplies a tinderbox if asked again.

atoms.label: Press iron sheets
atoms.detail: Use each of the 5 iron bars on the Metal Press to produce iron sheets.

atoms.label: Repair the western perimeter wall
atoms.detail: Use the iron sheets to repair the western colony perimeter's broken walls; Franklin supplies a hammer if asked.

atoms.label: Talk to Arnold Lydspor
atoms.detail: Talk to Arnold Lydspor in the bank; he supplies a small fishing net if you don't already have one.

atoms.label: Fish 5 fresh monkfish
atoms.detail: Fish 5 fresh monkfish at the spot to the north-west, catching a few extra in case some burn while cooking.

atoms.label: Optionally fight spawning Sea Trolls
atoms.detail: Optionally kill Sea Trolls as they spawn nearby while fishing; after 1-3 kills they only drop big bones, which no longer count toward the earlier bones requirement.

atoms.label: Cook the monkfish
atoms.detail: Cook the monkfish in the kitchen south of the fishing spot; note that Arnold's bank cannot be used to access cooking gauntlets here.

atoms.label: Deliver the cooked monkfish to Arnold
atoms.detail: Talk to Arnold and hand over the cooked monkfish.

atoms.label: Report back to Franklin
atoms.detail: Talk to Franklin again.

atoms.label: Report to the Wise Old Man and Herman
atoms.detail: Talk to the Wise Old Man and Herman in the far eastern building.

atoms.label: Gather bones, an airtight pot, and a brown apron
atoms.detail: Gather 7 bones (from the earlier Sea Troll kills), an airtight pot OR a pot with a pot lid, and a brown apron (or ask Malignius for one); if not banking afterward also bring food, armour, a weapon, and prayer potions.

atoms.label: Travel to the Wizards' Guild basement
atoms.detail: Travel to the basement of the Wizards' Guild in Yanille; the Nightmare Zone minigame teleport is needed to leave the colony first.

atoms.label: Talk to Wizard Frumscone
atoms.detail: Talk to Wizard Frumscone and agree to help the necromancer.

atoms.label: Portal to the Dark Wizards' Tower
atoms.detail: Use the southern portal on the guild's 2nd floor to teleport to the Dark Wizards' Tower, near Malignius Mortifer.

atoms.label: Get a brown apron from Malignius Mortifer
atoms.detail: Talk to Malignius Mortifer, south of Falador, about saving the fishing colony; receive a brown apron for Crafting Guild entry.

atoms.label: Talk to the Master Crafter
atoms.detail: Talk to the Master Crafter with dreadlocks on the east side of the Crafting Guild.

atoms.label: Make a pot and pot lid
atoms.detail: If carrying soft clay, use it on the potter's wheel then the potter's oven to produce a pot and pot lid; if carrying a pickaxe instead, mine clay first then follow the same steps.

atoms.label: Assemble the airtight pot
atoms.detail: Combine the pot and pot lid into an airtight pot.

atoms.label: Remove Saradomin-affiliated gear
atoms.detail: Remove any Saradomin-affiliated gear before continuing -- Malignius refuses to hand over bone seeds while it's worn or held, and dropping gear here isn't advisable since you'll be teleported away shortly.

atoms.label: Collect bone seeds and teleport back
atoms.detail: Talk to Malignius Mortifer to receive the bone seeds and teleport back to the Fishing Colony.

atoms.label: Bring supplies for the Final Battle
atoms.detail: Bring food, armour, a melee or ranged weapon, prayer potions, and the bone seeds to the final fight.

atoms.label: Begin the fight with Herman
atoms.detail: Talk to Herman to begin the final battle.

atoms.label: Defeat the Sea Troll Queen
atoms.detail: Fight the Sea Troll Queen; use Protect from Magic while in melee range, and Ranged or Melee to deal damage.

atoms.label: Finish the quest with Herman
atoms.detail: Talk to Herman to complete Swan Song.

atoms.label: Optionally cook a diary monkfish
atoms.detail: Optionally catch and cook another monkfish afterward -- satisfies a hard Western Provinces Achievement Diary task.

steps.detail: Sub-quest completion grants access to Barrows gloves and NMZ bosses.

mapMarkers.label: The Cook, Lumbridge Castle kitchen (RFD start)

hints.note: start: agree to help gather feast ingredients
Quest reward XP — counts toward your skills, replacing that much training.

steps.detail: Unlocks 1-tick Karambwan cooking for fast Cooking XP.

hints.note: Quest reward XP — counts toward your skills, replacing that much training.

atoms.label: Slice a banana into Karamjan rum
atoms.detail: Pick a banana at the Musa Point plantation, buy Karamjan rum at the Karamja Spirits Bar, slice the banana with a knife/spear, then add the slice to the rum before leaving the island (leaving unslied breaks it).

atoms.label: Talk to Timfraku to start the quest
atoms.detail: Upstairs in the north-west house of Tai Bwo Wannai (fairy ring CKR); mention Trufitus sent you, then ask "So far??" to receive the task of reuniting his three sons.

atoms.label: Ask Tamayu about the Shaikahan
atoms.detail: South-east of the village at the mine; talk twice, asking when he'll succeed and offering to join his next hunt. A cutscene shows him failing against The Shaikahan.

atoms.label: Net-fish 20+ raw karambwanji at the Holy Lake
atoms.detail: South-west of Tamayu; keep a few spares in case of a low Cooking level burning the karambwan later.

atoms.label: Become Lubufu's karambwan apprentice
atoms.detail: By the south-eastern Brimhaven shore; ask his age, offer to help collect bait, catch and hand over 20 karambwanji, then ask about his catching method and become his apprentice to unlock the karambwan vessel and 65-Fishing raw karambwan catching (1500 Fishing xp).

hints.value: Collect extra vessels here (drop and re-ask Lubufu) — one each for Tiadeche, Tinsay, and yourself.

atoms.label: Give Tiadeche a full karambwan vessel
atoms.detail: North-east corner of the Karamja jungle (fairy ring DKP); fill a vessel with karambwanji first, then hand it over for a raw karambwan (vessel is not returned).

atoms.label: Grab seaweed on the beach near Tiadeche
atoms.detail: Spawns on the beach by Tiadeche; needed later for Tinsay's seaweed sandwich.

atoms.label: Cook the karambwan and grind it into paste
atoms.detail: Cook the raw karambwan into a poison karambwan, then grind it with a pestle and mortar into karambwan paste (use the "use" option, not eat, to avoid damage).

atoms.label: Poison the spear with karambwan paste
atoms.detail: Any of iron/steel/mithril/adamant/rune/dragon spear works; do NOT give it to Tamayu before poisoning it.

atoms.label: Get jogre bones on the way back to Tamayu
atoms.detail: Kill a Jogre en route back south (also a fallback source for an iron spear if none carried).

atoms.label: Give Tamayu the poisoned spear and 4-dose agility potion
atoms.detail: Cross the agility shortcut back to the mine; use the poisoned spear then a full 4-dose agility potion on him (can be topped up over multiple potions), then join his hunt for a successful cutscene.

atoms.label: Kill a monkey and have Tamayu skin it
atoms.detail: Ranged/Magic/halberd only (melee does 0 damage); use the corpse on Tamayu to skin it and keep the monkey skin (saves a Tinsay trip later).

atoms.label: Climb to Cairn Isle and talk to Tinsay
atoms.detail: Up the rockslide (Agility 15) and across the bridge; he asks for three items to regain his sanity and repair the Tribal Statue.

atoms.label: Give Tinsay the banana rum
atoms.detail: First of his three requests.

atoms.label: Make and deliver a seaweed sandwich
atoms.detail: Combine the seaweed and monkey skin into a seaweed sandwich (do not combine before skinning, or it becomes a joke item), then give it to Tinsay.

atoms.label: Give Tinsay a spare karambwan vessel
atoms.detail: Unlocks the Crafting manual for Tiadeche (he won't hand it over until the sandwich is delivered).

atoms.label: Burn, grind, paste, and cook jogre bones into marinated bones
atoms.detail: Burn jogre bones on a tinderbox (Firemaking 30+) or a furnace/Superheat Item if lower; grind a raw karambwanji into paste and add it to the burnt bones; cook the result on a range or fire until green (white means it was done in the wrong order).

atoms.label: Give Tinsay the marinated jogre bones
atoms.detail: His third request; he regains his sanity and agrees to return to the village.

atoms.label: Bring the Crafting manual back to Tiadeche
atoms.detail: Both brothers then head back to Tai Bwo Wannai.

atoms.label: Talk to Timfraku to finish the quest
atoms.detail: Same north-west house; completes the quest. Afterward, talk to each brother in their village house to claim their individual xp rewards.

checkpoints.label: Introduction: Timfraku and the banana rum
Tamayu: karambwanji, Lubufu's apprenticeship, poisoned spear
Tinsay: three requests on Cairn Isle
Wrapping up with Tiadeche and Timfraku

steps.detail: Required for RFD Skrach. Learn to hunt chompy birds with ogre bows.

hints.note: Quest reward XP — counts toward your skills, replacing that much training.

atoms.label: Talk to Rantz to start the quest
atoms.detail: Rantz the ogre is south-east of Gu'Tanoth (Fairy ring AKS, Feldip Hills teleport, or gnome glider). The quest must be started by talking to him first, and he only accepts arrows you make yourself.

atoms.label: Kill 4 level-64 wolves for wolf bones
atoms.detail: In the crater south-west of Rantz; safespottable near the north-east swamp roots.

atoms.label: Chisel the wolf bones into wolfbone arrowtips
atoms.detail: Each bone yields 2-6 tips at random.

atoms.label: Chop 4 achey trees for logs
atoms.detail: Growing near Rantz.

atoms.label: Knife the achey logs into ogre arrow shafts
Feather the shafts into flighted ogre arrows
Attach wolfbone arrowtips to the flighted arrows
atoms.detail: Finishes at least 6 usable ogre arrows for the hand-in.

atoms.label: Hand at least 6 ogre arrows to Rantz
atoms.detail: He explains the swamp toads his children play with; ask him every listed question or the chest cannot be opened later.

hints.value: Ask every dialogue option offered, not just the minimum — required to open the chest later.

atoms.label: Enter the cave and talk to Fycie and Bugs
atoms.detail: North of Rantz; they explain their ogre bellows are locked in a rock-weighted chest.

atoms.label: Unlock the chest and search it for the bellows
atoms.detail: Failed unlock attempts reduce Strength by 1; search immediately after opening or it re-locks.

hints.value: Keep the bellows afterward if planning Mourning's End Part I and/or Recipe for Disaster.

atoms.label: Inflate 3 swamp toads into bloated toads
atoms.detail: South-west of Rantz at the swamp (also findable near poison spiders in the Yanille Agility dungeon); the bellows hold 3 charges before needing a refill at the swamp bubbles.

hints.value: Carrying capacity for bloated toads is 3 — inflating more replaces one already held.

atoms.label: Return to Rantz to learn the lure spot
atoms.detail: He shows the flashing arrow tile where toads should be dropped to lure a chompy bird.

atoms.label: Offer to shoot for Rantz and receive the ogre bow
atoms.detail: After his first miss (he blames the arrows), offer to help; he hands over his ogre bow.

atoms.label: Lure and kill a chompy bird with the ogre bow
atoms.detail: Drop a bloated toad on the marked tile and stand back but in view; range the bird once it appears (re-bait if the lure fails). You must land the kill yourself — a bought/traded raw chompy will not progress the quest.

hints.value: Purchasing a raw chompy bird instead of killing one yourself will NOT progress the quest — confirmed on the quest's own page, not a real GE-alternative.

atoms.label: Pluck the chompy and bring it back to Rantz
atoms.detail: He asks for it cooked with a seasoning of his children's choosing.

atoms.label: Ask Fycie and Bugs what seasoning they want
atoms.detail: Two of three needed ingredients (onion, doogle leaves, equa leaves, tomato, potato, cabbage) are randomised per player; only one bird is cooked.

atoms.label: Gather the 3 requested seasoning ingredients around the area
atoms.detail: Onion/tomato near the fire west-south-west of Rantz; doogle leaves to the west by the glider; equa leaves on the south-east peninsula; potato south-east near the equa spawns; cabbage scattered south-west/south-east — pick another plant if a seed drops instead.

atoms.label: Cook the chompy with all 3 seasonings on the spit
atoms.detail: North of Rantz; hold all three ingredients plus the raw chompy.

atoms.label: Present the seasoned chompy to Rantz to finish
atoms.detail: Completes the quest.

steps.detail: Unlocks Ancient Magicks spellbook. Required for many late-game routes.

hints.note: start: ask about the treasure rumours
Quest reward XP — counts toward your skills, replacing that much training.

atoms.label: Talk to Asgarnia Smith at Bedabin Camp (start Desert Treasure)
atoms.detail: Asgarnia Smith stands by the magic carpet at Bedabin Camp; bring at least one free inventory slot and agree to help him.

atoms.label: Gather the starting materials Eblis needs
atoms.detail: Assemble 650 coins, ashes, a blood rune, bones, 6 molten glass, 12 magic logs, charcoal, and 6 steel bars via non-GE routes: bones from any kill, molten glass crafted from bucket-of-sand + soda-ash in a furnace, steel bars smithed from iron ore + coal, ashes from burning any logs. Blood rune sourcing (Runecrafting at the Blood Altar, or a monster drop) and magic-log sourcing (Woodcutting 75 on magic trees) and charcoal sourcing are not detailed in this quest's own Quick guide -- flagged "??", genuine gaps for Lane 5 rather than a GE substitution.

atoms.label: Get the book translated at the Digsite Exam Centre
atoms.detail: Go to the Digsite Exam Centre and talk to Terry Balando about the Desert Treasure quest, then talk to him again for a translation.

atoms.label: Show the translated book to Asgarnia Smith
atoms.detail: Return to Asgarnia Smith in the desert; tell him not to read the book, then talk to him again to have him help you.

atoms.label: Buy a drink at the Bandit Camp bar and ask about the diamonds
atoms.detail: Run south to the Bandit Camp and buy a drink in the pub for 650 coins (remove any Saradomin/Zamorak items first so the bandits don't attack). Talk to the bartender again and ask about the four diamonds.

atoms.label: Talk to Eblis about the four diamonds
atoms.detail: Find Eblis in or just outside the small rectangular building east of the bar; ask about the four diamonds of Azzanadra and agree to fetch them.

atoms.label: Deliver the gathered supplies to Eblis
atoms.detail: Use each required item (ashes, blood rune, bones, molten glass, magic logs, charcoal, steel bars) on Eblis, then talk to him again. Items can remain noted for this delivery.

atoms.label: Follow Eblis to the mirrors and begin the diamond hunt
atoms.detail: Go south-east to the mirrors and talk to Eblis there. The four diamonds (Smoke, Shadow, Ice, Blood) can be collected in any order; watch for a level 95 stranger who may randomly ambush you with a poisoned dragon dagger while carrying a diamond -- bank or place diamonds in the pyramid to avoid it.

atoms.label: Equip a facemask or gas mask
atoms.detail: Equip a facemask, gas mask, or Slayer helmet before entering the Smoke Dungeon.

atoms.label: Light the four torches and grab the warm key
atoms.detail: Enter the Smoke Dungeon (west of Pollnivneach, east of the mirrors). Light all four standing torches, one per corner, and open the centre chest for the warm key before any torch burns out. Starting NE then SE, NW, SW with 100% run avoids needing stamina potions.

atoms.label: Unlock the gate and kill Fareed for the Smoke diamond
atoms.detail: Use the warm key to open the gate east, then kill Fareed. Ice gloves are needed to wield melee gear (ranged works unarmoured but ash-es arrows), and only water spells damage him with Magic.

hints.note: Protect from Melee strongly advised; attack with a water spell or any ranged ammo.

atoms.label: Talk to Rasolo south of Baxtorian Falls
atoms.detail: Rasolo is outside his house south of Baxtorian Falls; ask about the Diamonds of Azzanadra.

atoms.label: Gather 20+ lockpicks and antipoison
atoms.detail: Gather-not-GE alternative to the wiki's own coin-exchange shortcut (flagged GE-violation): pickpocket bandits in the Bandit Camp vicinity for lockpicks and antipoison instead of exchanging noted coins with Tiles' general store.

atoms.label: Pick the secure chest and give the gilded cross to Rasolo
atoms.detail: In the southernmost Bandit Camp tent, pick all 3 locks on the secure chest consecutively (can take many tries, faster at higher Thieving) to get the gilded cross. Bring it back to Rasolo, who swaps it for a visibility ring even with a full inventory.

atoms.label: Equip the visibility ring and climb down
atoms.detail: Equip the visibility ring, then climb down the ladder east of Rasolo in the fenced area.

atoms.label: Kill Damis (both forms) for the Shadow diamond
atoms.detail: Run through the dungeon and kill Damis in both of his forms, then pick up the shadow diamond. His second form drains Prayer rapidly.

hints.note: Safespot by hitting a bat or rat and stacking NPCs behind you; don't run too far out of his range or he resets.

atoms.label: Gather sweet food and spiked boots
atoms.detail: Bring any sweet food from the Troll child's list, plus fire-spell runes. Get spiked boots from Dunstan by giving him a pair of climbing boots and an iron bar.

atoms.label: Give the troll child sweet food and enter the ice gate
atoms.detail: North-west of Trollheim, use the sweet food on the troll child, talk to it, then enter the ice gate.

atoms.label: Kill 5 ice trolls
atoms.detail: Kill 5 ice trolls guarding the gate; you won't need to re-kill them if you teleport out and return.

atoms.label: Follow the path and kill Kamil
atoms.detail: Enter the cave, follow the path, then fight Kamil. Only fire spells damage him with Magic (Iban Blast, Flames of Zamorak, and the trident's built-in spell do not work); your stats are constantly drained during the fight.

hints.note: Approach with Protect from Magic to force him to teleport into range, then switch to Protect from Melee.

atoms.label: Wear spiked boots, cross the ice ledge, and free the frozen trolls
atoms.detail: Continue west along the long icy path. Wear spiked boots to climb the ice ledge, follow the new path, go through the gate, then use a fire spell on each troll frozen in ice. Talk to them for the Ice diamond.

atoms.label: Talk to Malak in the Canifis pub
atoms.detail: Talk to Malak in the Canifis pub about the special diamond; ask how to kill Dessous.

atoms.label: Gather a silver bar, spice, and garlic powder
atoms.detail: Smelt a silver bar (silver ore in a furnace). Garlic can be searched from the cupboard upstairs in Morgan's house in Draynor; grind it with a pestle and mortar for garlic powder.

atoms.label: Get a silver pot made and enchanted
atoms.detail: Travel to the Draynor Sewer and give Ruantun the silver bar for a silver pot. Take the pot to the High Priest in the Entrana church (Entrana bans combat equipment) and he enchants it.

atoms.label: Talk to Malak again
atoms.detail: Return to Malak in the Canifis pub. He deals 5 damage during this conversation but cannot kill you.

atoms.label: Add spice and garlic powder to the pot of blood
atoms.detail: Add the spice and garlic powder to the pot Malak gives you to create a pot of blood. Prepare combat gear and prayer/healing supplies before the boss fight ahead.

atoms.label: Pour the blood on the tomb and kill Dessous
atoms.detail: Go to the Morytania Graveyard north of Castle Drakan, pour the pot of blood on the tomb, and defeat Dessous. He has 99 Defence and strong slash resistance -- range or mage him, alternating Protect from Melee/Missiles each tick to avoid damage.

atoms.label: Return to Malak and claim the Blood diamond
atoms.detail: Go back to Malak in the Canifis pub and claim the blood diamond. You keep the blessed pot even after leaving the fight (a new pot of blood is only needed if you leave mid-fight).

atoms.label: Place a diamond in each of the pyramid's obelisks
atoms.detail: Go south-east of Eblis and place the smoke, shadow, ice, and blood diamonds in the pyramid's obelisks.

atoms.label: Enter the pyramid and run each floor without stopping
atoms.detail: Enter the pyramid from the top and run through each floor without stopping -- traps may still trigger and can send you back to the start regardless. Mummies and Scarabs can hit over 20.

atoms.label: Talk to Azzanadra to finish the quest
atoms.detail: Talk to Azzanadra at the end of the pyramid to complete Desert Treasure and unlock the Ancient Magicks spellbook. Praying at his altar twice afterward unlocks a hard Desert-area task.

checkpoints.label: Starting out (Bedabin Camp -> Digsite -> Bandit Camp -> Eblis)

steps.detail: Fish and cook a fishcake INSIDE the Mogre Camp minigame area. No ahead-of-time staging — all gathering is minigame-locked.

hints.note: Quest reward XP — counts toward your skills, replacing that much training.

steps.detail: Hunt and cook a jubbly bird near Rantz in Feldip Hills. Hunter 41 + Cooking 41 required.

hints.note: Quest reward XP — counts toward your skills, replacing that much training.

steps.detail: Fish monkfish at the Piscatoris Fishing Colony. Requires Swan Song and Fishing 62. Cook for Barrows food supply.

mapMarkers.label: Fishing spot (Piscatoris Fishing Colony, north coast)
Fishing spot (Piscatoris Fishing Colony, north coast)
Fishing spot (Piscatoris Fishing Colony, north coast)
Fishing spot (Piscatoris Fishing Colony, north coast)
Fishing spot (Piscatoris Fishing Colony, north coast)

hints.note: Raw_monkfish s1 Fishing info: tool=Small fishing net, bait=No. Fishing_spot page confirms 'Always' rarity (guaranteed catch on success roll, no drop-chance variance beyond the standard skilling success curve).

Piscatoris_Fishing_Colony s1, ranked shortest-run-to-spot first: Western banner 3/4 (centre of colony) > Piscatoris teleport (entrance) > Fairy ring AKQ (Hunter area, south of entrance) > Necklace of passage (Outpost, well south). Kathy Corkat ferries from west of Tree Gnome Stronghold for free once Swan Song is complete (50gp before); 75 Sailing + full Swan Song also unlocks mooring a boat on the NW side.

steps.detail: Defeat 6 Culinaromancer minions with boosted combat stats. Rewards: Barrows gloves (best-in-slot). Attack/Strength/Defence 65 required.

hints.note: Quest reward XP — counts toward your skills, replacing that much training.

steps.detail: Grish asks you to investigate zombified ogres (zogres) infesting the ogre ceremonial grounds. Head into the cave below Jiggig, being careful of disease from zogre/skogre attacks if under 89 combat (carry super restores). Loot a ruined backpack and a torn page from a skeleton/lectern, then pry open a coffin with a knife for a black prism. Head to Yanille, use the recovered Dragon Inn tankard on the bartender there, then visit Zavistic Rarve at the Wizards' Guild. Investigate the ogres' bedridden neighbor Sithik Ints: search his room for a portraiture book, necromancy book, papyrus/charcoal and a Book of 'H.A.M.', read and use all three on him, then sketch a portrait that reads as an honest "classic realist charcoal portrait" (higher Crafting speeds this up) and get it signed by the Dragon Inn bartender. Bring the necromancy book, H.A.M. book, tankard and signed portrait to Zavistic Rarve for a strange potion; spike Sithik's tea with it, then question him for the secrets to Relicym's balm, curing the disease, and removing the undead ogres. Return to Grish for an ogre gate key and to learn comp ogre bow use, then fight the level-111 Slash Bash (uses Ranged+Melee — safespot with Protect from Missiles, or use Crumble Undead) in the ceremonial chamber to finish.

hints.note: Quest reward XP — counts toward your skills, replacing that much training.

atoms.label: Ask Grish about the sick ogres
atoms.detail: Speak with Grish in Jiggig and offer to help investigate the zombified ogres.

hints.value: What do you mean sickies? -> Can I help in any way? -> Yes.

atoms.label: Get the ogre guard to remove the barricade
atoms.detail: Speak to the Ogre guard east of Grish so he clears the way into the Zogre-infested area.

atoms.label: Climb the barricade and descend into the cave
atoms.detail: Climb over the crushed barricade, run east to the stairs, and go down them.

atoms.label: Search the skeleton and defeat the zombie it spawns
atoms.detail: Search the skeleton next to the broken lecturn; a zombie appears and must be killed to get the ruined backpack.

hints.value: Under 89 combat, Zogre/Skogre attacks from here on can cause disease that lowers a random skill 10 levels roughly every minute -- carry super restore potions.

atoms.label: Open the ruined backpack
atoms.detail: Open the backpack to obtain a Dragon inn tankard, rotten food, and a knife.

atoms.label: Search the broken lecturn for the torn page
atoms.detail: Search the broken lecturn and keep the torn page it holds.

atoms.label: Cut open the coffin and search it for the black prism
atoms.detail: Use the knife on the coffin west of the skeleton, then search it (may take a few tries) for the black prism.

atoms.label: Show the tankard to the Yanille bartender
atoms.detail: Go to the Dragon Inn in Yanille and use the Dragon inn tankard on the bartender to begin identifying its owner.

atoms.label: Speak to Zavistic Rarve at the Wizards' Guild
atoms.detail: Find Zavistic Rarve inside the Wizards' Guild in Yanille (ring the bell out front if you lack the level to enter).

hints.value: I'm here about the sicks...err Zogres (only if Hand in the Sand already started)

atoms.label: Speak to the bedridden Sithik Ints
atoms.detail: Sithik is bedridden in the upstairs bedroom of the guest house north of the Wizards' Guild; ask to look around his room.

hints.value: Do you mind if I look around?

atoms.label: Search Sithik's drawers, cupboard, and wardrobe
atoms.detail: Search all three pieces of furniture in the room for a portraiture book, necromancy book, papyrus, charcoal, and a Book of H.A.M.
