hints.value: More papyrus can be found here if a re-sketch is needed later.

atoms.label: Read all three found books
atoms.detail: Read the portraiture book, necromancy book, and Book of H.A.M before acting on them.

atoms.label: Use all three books on Sithik
atoms.detail: Use the portraiture book, necromancy book, and Book of H.A.M on Sithik in turn.

atoms.label: Use papyrus on Sithik to sketch his portrait
atoms.detail: Use papyrus on Sithik to sketch a portrait whose examine text must read a classic realist charcoal portrait of Sithik.

hints.value: A low Crafting level (1-10) reduces the odds of sketching a correct portrait on the first try; 20+ Crafting is recommended to speed this up -- soft speed factor, not a hard requirement.

atoms.label: Show the sketched portrait to Sithik
atoms.detail: Use the portrait on Sithik; he must appreciate its honesty, not just its truth.

atoms.label: Return to the Dragon Inn
atoms.detail: Head back to the Dragon Inn in Yanille to get the portrait signed.

atoms.label: Have the bartender sign the portrait
atoms.detail: Use the tankard then the portrait on the bartender; he signs the portrait as an affidavit.

atoms.label: Return to the Wizards' Guild
atoms.detail: Head back to Zavistic Rarve at the Wizards' Guild with the evidence in hand.

atoms.label: Present the evidence to Zavistic Rarve
atoms.detail: Speak to Zavistic Rarve while holding the necromancy book, Book of H.A.M, the tankard, and the signed portrait to receive a strange potion.

hints.value: I have some items that I'd like you to look at.
Text doesn't explicitly say whether the 4 items are truly consumed here vs merely checked -- modeled as consumed.

atoms.label: Spike Sithik's tea
atoms.detail: Use the strange potion on the cup of tea on top of Sithik's drawers.

atoms.label: Reset Sithik's dialogue by leaving and returning
atoms.detail: Go downstairs then back upstairs so Sithik has drunk the spiked tea before you talk to him.

atoms.label: Get the three secrets out of Sithik
atoms.detail: Question Sithik for the cures to the disease, the removal of the undead ogres, and the effects of the spell -- needed for Relicym's balm and Brutal arrows.

hints.value: How do I remove the effects of the spell from the area? / How do I get rid of the undead ogres / How do I get rid of the disease / Sorry, I have to go.

atoms.label: Report the culprit to Grish
atoms.detail: Tell Grish you found who's responsible for the Zogres; he gives you an ogre gate key for the ceremonial chamber.

hints.value: I found who's responsible for the Zogres being here.

atoms.label: Learn to equip a composite ogre bow
atoms.detail: Ask Grish about an easier way to kill Zogres to learn how to equip composite ogre bows.

atoms.label: Chop an achey tree for logs
atoms.detail: Optional: cut an achey tree for logs to make a composite ogre bow instead of relying on Crumble Undead.

hints.value: Optional side-path; not required to finish the quest.

atoms.label: Make an unstrung comp bow
atoms.detail: Use a knife on the achey tree logs with wolf bones in your inventory and select box 2 to create an unstrung comp bow.

atoms.label: String the composite ogre bow
atoms.detail: String the unstrung bow with a bow string to finish it.

atoms.label: Brew Relicym's balm
atoms.detail: Optional: add a Rogue's purse to a vial of water then add snake weed to brew Relicym's balm; not needed for the quest itself but unlocks purchasing more from Uglug Nar.

hints.value: ge_violation: page also lists 'buy one from the Grand Exchange' as an alternative -- excluded per the never-GE-buy hard rule; only the gather/produce path is modeled.

atoms.label: Cut achey trees for arrow logs
atoms.detail: Optional: cut achey trees for logs to fletch brutal arrows instead of buying them.

hints.value: ge_violation: page also says 'if you have access to the Grand Exchange, just buy the arrows and skip this section' -- excluded per the never-GE-buy hard rule.

atoms.label: Fletch the logs into ogre arrow shafts
atoms.detail: Fletch the achey tree logs with a knife into ogre arrow shafts.

atoms.label: Add feathers to the arrow shafts
atoms.detail: Add feathers to the ogre arrow shafts to make flighted ogre arrows.

atoms.label: Nail the flighted arrows into brutal arrows
atoms.detail: With a hammer in your inventory, use nails on the flighted ogre arrows to finish them.

atoms.label: Head to the ceremonial chamber
atoms.detail: Return to Jiggig, travel west through both sets of doors, then go down the stairs.

atoms.label: Search the stand at the end of the chamber
atoms.detail: Follow the chamber to its end and search the stand to approach Slash Bash.

hints.value: No item result is stated for this search -- treated as a pure trigger.

atoms.label: Kill Slash Bash
atoms.detail: Fight the level-111 Slash Bash, who uses both Ranged and Melee; safe-spot with Protect from Missiles or use Crumble Undead.

atoms.label: Return to Grish to finish
atoms.detail: Report Slash Bash's defeat to Grish to complete the quest.

Search the cave for the backpack, torn page, and black prism
Identify the tankard's owner in Yanille
Relocate the ceremonial grounds with Grish
Optional: craft a composite ogre bow

steps.detail: Pick a method: Make attack potions / Make strength potions / Make restore potions.

methods.location: anywhere with bank access
methods.notes: Guam potion (unf) + eye of newt, 62,500 xp/hour per the page's table; low-level recipe still valid for players already past level 10.

methods.location: anywhere with bank access
methods.notes: Tarromin potion (unf) + limpwurt root, 125,000 xp/hour per the page's table.

methods.location: anywhere with bank access
methods.notes: Harralander potion (unf) + red spiders' eggs (the page's stat-restore option), 156,250 xp/hour per the page's table.

atoms.label: Bank: withdraw vials of water + limpwurt root
atoms.detail: Limpwurt root source not confirmed by a fetched non-GE page -- left ?? per the coarse row's own hint, not fabricated.

atoms.label: Gather tarromin weed from herb patches
atoms.detail: Same herb-patch circuit as the existing farm-herb-patch-guam row (steps.jsonl), planting tarromin seeds instead of guam -- reused per U8 rather than re-describing the patch locations.

atoms.label: Combine tarromin + vial of water into unfinished potion
atoms.detail: Clean tarromin weed, then combine with a vial of water.

atoms.label: Combine unf. tarromin potion + limpwurt root until Herblore 38
atoms.detail: Herblore 12 required, 50xp/dose (125,000xp/h at ~2,500 potions/h), per Strength_potion.s3's own {{Recipe}} infobox and Herblore_training.s3's rate table -- both confirm the exact recipe and xp figure independently.

atoms.label: Bank: deposit strength potions
atoms.detail: Bank as a combat-training supply (str60/70 bands earlier could have used these, but this band trains Herblore after those bands in route order).

steps.detail: Search the shelf in the ruined SW house of Mort'ton and read the diary found there to start (this also unlocks making Serum 207). Make 2 doses of Serum 207 (clean tarromin + vial of water, then add ashes), use one on Razmire (afflicted) in the general store, kill 5 loar shades for their remains, return the remains to Razmire. Buy an olive oil from his general store and 5 timber beams/5 limestone bricks/25 swamp paste (+ optional Flamtaer hammer) from his builders' store. Serum the sick Ulsquire Shauncy east of the store and talk to him twice about the remains/temple. Head to the temple NE of Mort'ton and repair it to 100% with at least 20 sanctity (minigame, safer with other players present), light the sacred altar (or wait for someone with 5+ Firemaking), pour olive oil on the flame for sacred oil, and dip Serum 207 in the flame for permanent-cure Serum 208. Make a pyre log with the sacred oil, take it plus loar remains to one of the stone funeral pyre groups west of the general store, light the pyre (25 Prayer xp), collect the reward, then cure both Razmire and Ulsquire with Serum 208 to finish.

req_items.name: Tarromin potion (unf)
req_items.note: or 2 vials of water + 2 grimy tarromin, both obtainable in-quest

req_items.name: Logs
req_items.note: or an axe to cut some

req_items.name: Hammer
req_items.note: a Flamtaer hammer (buyable from Razmire, ~13,000 coins) is highly recommended since a regular hammer alone can't finish the temple repair if the minigame world is empty

hints.note: Quest reward XP — counts toward your skills, replacing that much training.

atoms.label: Search the shelf in the SW ruined house to start
atoms.detail: Also search the smashed table in the same building for 2 free tarromin + a Rogue's purse (keep the purse for Zogre Flesh Eaters); a spare vial spawn is here too.

atoms.label: Brew 2 doses of Serum 207
atoms.detail: Use tarromin on a vial of water to make tarromin potion (unf) if not already carried, then add ashes to finish. Make two doses.

hints.value: Serum 207 can be bought on the GE, but at least one dose must be player-made for this quest step to register — gather/produce path modeled, GE not used.

atoms.label: Use Serum 207 on Razmire Keelgan and learn about the shades
atoms.detail: In the general store; he explains the shades are restless spirits and asks for 5 Loar Shade remains.

atoms.label: Kill 5 level-40 Loar Shades for their remains
atoms.detail: Kills only count toward the task once Razmire has asked for them; remains come from the kill itself.

atoms.label: Give Razmire 2 shade remains
atoms.detail: Use Serum 207 on him again, then he takes 2 remains for experiments and mentions Ulsquire Shauncy.

atoms.label: Buy olive oil and temple building materials from Razmire's stores
atoms.detail: General store: olive oil. Builders' store (Razmire opens it): timber beam, limestone brick, swamp paste (Flamtaer hammer optional, ~13,000gp, highly recommended if the minigame is unpopulated).

atoms.label: Cure Ulsquire Shauncy and learn about the temple
atoms.detail: House south-east of Razmire's; give a Serum 207 dose then a shade remain, then ask both "What did you find out about the remains?" and "What can you tell me about that temple?" (both required or the temple can't be interacted with).

atoms.label: Repair the temple to full and light the sacred flame
atoms.detail: Minigame on the island NE of the general store: use a hammer/Flamtaer hammer and building materials to repair the walls (Crafting 20); sanctity accrues from repairing/reinforcing or killing Loar Shades. World 377 is the dedicated minigame world if solo repair is too slow.

atoms.label: Pour olive oil on the sacred flame for sacred oil
atoms.detail: Requires at least 10% Sanctity from the temple repair.

atoms.label: Dip the remaining Serum 207 in the flame for Serum 208
atoms.detail: Optional but highly recommended (permanently cures Razmire/Ulsquire); needs 20%+ Sanctity.

atoms.label: Cut a dead tree for logs if none carried
atoms.detail: Near the funeral pyres, west of the general store.

atoms.label: Combine sacred oil with logs into a pyre log
Light the pyre log with the shade remains on a funeral pyre
atoms.detail: Use the pyre log then the remaining loar shade remains on one of the stone-pillar funeral pyres, then light it (25 Prayer xp) and collect the reward from the pillar.

atoms.label: Talk to Ulsquire to finish (re-serum him if needed)
atoms.detail: Use a Serum 207/208 dose first if he has reverted to being afflicted, then speak to him to complete the quest.

checkpoints.label: Repairing the temple and making Serum 208
Burning a shade at the pyre and finishing

steps.detail: Talk to an examiner to attempt (and auto-fail) a first exam, then get a sealed letter from Curator Haig Halen at Varrock Museum. North of the Exam Centre near the blue urn hilltop, search bushes for a teddy bear, take a panning tray, use a cup of tea on the panning guide, pan for a Special cup (and an opal if needed), and pickpocket the nearby workman for an animal skull and specimen brush. Deliver the teddy/cup/skull to the three named students around the dig (NW, E, S respectively, talk twice each). Retake all 3 exams at the Exam Centre picking the correct dialogue options (fail is not possible once you know the answers) to get Level 1/2/3 certificates, re-visiting the students between exams (the female student demands an opal for the 2nd). Save the certificates for the museum curator. Back at the Exam Centre's western room, get a rock pick and specimen jar from cupboards, use the trowel on soil in a level-3 dig site until you find an ancient talisman (can take a while), then talk to Terry Balando and use his invitation on any digsite workman except the one by the western winch. Rope down the western winch to grab arcenia root and search bricks, then rope down the northern winch to talk to Doug Deeping about the rocks. South of the site, unlock a chest for chemical powder, get an unidentified liquid from a barrel (careful — it deals 25 damage and breaks the vial if dropped), grind charcoal, then give the powder/liquid to Terry Balando and mix nitroglycerin+ammonium nitrate, then charcoal, then arcenia root into a chemical compound. Use the compound then a tinderbox on the bricks down the western winch, enter the chamber (watch for level-22 skeletons), grab the stone tablet, and hand it to Terry Balando to finish.

req_items.name: Cup of tea
req_items.note: stealable from Varrock tea stall; or nettle tea

req_items.name: Opal or uncut opal
req_items.note: small chance while panning for a quest item

req_items.name: Specimen brush, specimen jar, panning tray, trowel

hints.note: Quest reward XP — counts toward your skills, replacing that much training.

atoms.label: Talk to an Examiner and fail the first exam
atoms.detail: At the Exam Centre south of the Digsite; ask about taking an exam for an unstamped letter, then get the letter sealed by Curator Haig Halen at Varrock Museum before retrying — any answer fails the first attempt, prompting you to consult the students.

atoms.label: Get the letter sealed by Curator Haig Halen
atoms.detail: Varrock Museum, east side of the city.

atoms.label: Search the hilltop bush for the missing teddy bear
atoms.detail: North of the Exam Centre, east walkway, easternmost bush by the large blue urn.

atoms.label: Pan the river for the special cup
atoms.detail: Take a panning tray from the tent table, use a cup of tea on the panning guide, then pan the river east of the tent.

hints.value: Panning has a small chance to also yield an uncut opal, needed later for the level-3 exam — keep it if received here.

atoms.label: Pickpocket Digsite workmen for the animal skull
atoms.detail: Repeat until the skull drops.

hints.value: A specimen brush needed later can also drop from these pickpockets — keep it if received here.

atoms.label: Deliver the teddy, cup, and skull to the three lost-item students
atoms.detail: Blonde/green-shirt student (animal skull) north of the tent; orange-shirt student (special cup) further north-east; purple-clothed female student (teddy bear) north-west — talk to each twice.

atoms.label: Retake the exam for the Level 1 certificate
atoms.detail: Re-ask each student for their answer, then answer the Examiner's 3 questions correctly.

atoms.label: Retake the exam for the Level 2 certificate
atoms.detail: Re-consult all three students for the new round of answers first.

atoms.label: Give the female student an opal for the Level 3 answer
atoms.detail: She additionally demands an opal/uncut opal this round; pan the river again if none is held, hand it over across two conversations.

atoms.label: Retake the exam for the Level 3 certificate
atoms.detail: Consult all three students once more, then answer correctly for full digging permission.

hints.value: Certificates can later be exchanged with the Museum Curator for a chocolate cake (Desert Treasure I) or fruit blast (Recipe for Disaster) — keep at least the Level 3 certificate for that.

atoms.label: Take a specimen jar from the Exam Centre cupboard
atoms.detail: South wall inside the Exam Centre; speak to Terry Balando about the tools first if there's no search option.

atoms.label: Dig a level-3 site with the trowel for the ancient talisman
atoms.detail: South-westernmost or northernmost level-3 dig site; can take several minutes of repeated attempts.

atoms.label: Bring the talisman to Terry Balando
atoms.detail: He identifies it as a talisman of Zaros and grants an invitation letter for the private dig shafts.

atoms.label: Show the invitation letter to a workman by the west winch
atoms.detail: Must be the pickpocketable 'Digsite workman' near a winch, not the plain 'Dig site workman'.

atoms.label: Rope down the west winch into the sublevels
atoms.detail: Requires Agility 15 to operate; grab an arcenia root just north of the rope landing and search the bricks blocking the south-east path.

atoms.label: Rope down the north-east winch and talk to Doug Deeping
atoms.detail: Ask how to move the rock pile blocking the way; he hands over a chest key.

atoms.label: Unlock the chest in the panning tent for chemical powder
Open the centre barrel with the trowel and fill a vial
atoms.detail: Deals 25 non-fatal damage and breaks the vial if dropped after filling — do not drop it.

atoms.label: Get charcoal if not already carried
atoms.detail: Search the specimen tray north of the tent with a specimen jar held, if charcoal was not brought.

atoms.label: Have Terry Balando identify the powder and liquid
atoms.detail: Use the chemical powder on him (ammonium nitrate), then the unidentified liquid (nitroglycerin) without dropping/emptying it; read the Book on chemicals on a nearby bookshelf first if he won't identify it.

atoms.label: Combine powder, liquid, charcoal, and root into a chemical compound
atoms.detail: Ammonium nitrate + nitroglycerin -> mixed chemicals (Herblore 6); grind charcoal with pestle and mortar -> ground charcoal; add ground charcoal to mixed chemicals (Herblore 8); add arcenia root to finish (Herblore 10). Dropping the finished compound deals 65 non-fatal damage.

atoms.label: Blast the bricks open and enter the chamber
atoms.detail: Down the western winch: use the chemical compound on the bricks, then a tinderbox to detonate; watch for level-22 skeletons if under 45 Combat.

atoms.label: Pick up the stone tablet in the exposed chamber
Hand the stone tablet to Terry Balando to finish
atoms.detail: He remarks on the Saradomin cover-up of the Zaros altar and rewards 2 gold bars.

checkpoints.label: Failing the first exam and gathering student favors
The ancient talisman and the Digsite Dungeon winches
Brewing the explosive compound and the hidden chamber

steps.detail: Synthetic step — no matching step found in bank.

methods.location: anywhere with bank access
methods.notes: Snapdragon potion (unf) + red spiders' eggs, 356,000 xp/hour per the page's table; page states this recipe needs Herblore 63, above this band's stated top of 55 -- flagging the mismatch rather than re-banding.

methods.location: anywhere with bank access
methods.notes: Ranarr potion (unf) + snape grass, 218,750 xp/hour per the page's table; this is the band's own opening recipe (level 38).

methods.location: anywhere with bank access
methods.notes: Avantoe potion (unf) + snape grass, 281,250 xp/hour per the page's table.

methods.location: anywhere with bank access
methods.notes: Avantoe potion (unf) + mort myre fungus, 293,750 xp/hour per the page's table.

steps.detail: Barrows — a repeatable brothers run for Barrows gear and steady mid-game money.

mapMarkers.label: Barrows entrance (six burial mounds, east of Mort'ton)

steps.phase: Toward Quest spine (existing P2P-chain load-bearing quests)
steps.detail: Combine ranarr weed + snape grass → prayer potion (4). Requires Druidic Ritual and Herblore 52. Terminal step of the prayer-pot supply chain.

hints.note: Base recipe output is Prayer potion(3) — the target stays prayer_potion_4 for chain-slug consistency, but reaching an actual 4-dose potion needs this amulet chance (or combining leftover doses). Ref: Prayer potion Creation section.

steps.phase: Toward Quest spine (existing P2P-chain load-bearing quests)
steps.detail: Must be able to beat level-68 Gorad (safespottable) and run past level-111 blue dragons. Flow: talk to Wizard in tower, get fingernails from bush below, talk to Og NW of Yanille for Toban's key, rope across to Jangerberry island (talk Grew), enter Tunnel to Toban south of Gu'Tanoth, kill Gorad for tooth, give Toban dragon bones for relic part 3, loot chest, return relics to Wizard for ogre relic. Enter Gu'Tanoth, steal rock cake from market, pay 20 coins/talk guards to reach Skavid caves, get skavid map (death rune), solve 4-cave skavid word-repeat puzzle, gold bar unlocks east gate, second nightshade in Mad Skavid cave, use nightshade on Enclave guard to trigger cutscene. Brew magic ogre potion (guam unf + jangerberries + ground bat bones, in that order) with Wizard. Return to Enclave, potion 6 ogre shamans for crystal 3, mine Rock of Dalgroth for crystal 4, return all 4 crystals to correct pillar colors (NE magenta/SE grey/SW yellow/NW cyan), pull lever. Key spine value: unlocks Ogre Enclave blue dragons + Watchtower teleport infrastructure.

req_items.name: Coins
req_items.note: paid to guards to reach the Skavid caves

req_items.name: Pickaxe
req_items.note: used to mine the Rock of Dalgroth for a crystal

req_items.name: Dragon bones
req_items.note: given to Toban for a relic part

req_items.name: Guam potion (unf)
req_items.note: used in the magic ogre potion

req_items.name: Bat bones
req_items.note: ground for the magic ogre potion

req_items.name: Jangerberries
req_items.note: used in the magic ogre potion

req_items.name: Death rune
req_items.note: obtainable in-quest; used for the skavid map

hints.note: Quest reward XP — counts toward your skills, replacing that much training.

atoms.label: Climb the Watchtower trellis and talk to the wizard
atoms.detail: Climb the trellis (Agility 18) on the north side of the Watchtower, north-west of Yanille, then the ladder. The wizard explains the tower's ogre-repelling spell has failed because its power crystals were stolen.

atoms.label: Search the north-west bush for Skavid fingernails
atoms.detail: Other bushes yield red-herring items only (old robe, unusual armour, damaged dagger, tattered eye patch).

atoms.label: Show the wizard the fingernails to learn about the relic
atoms.detail: He identifies them as Skavid and explains the ogres stole 4 power crystals; you'll need pieces of an ogre relic from three tribe chieftains to enter the ogre city.

atoms.label: Talk to Og at the north-west ogre tribe
atoms.detail: Through Yanille's west gate or the agility shortcut, bank first for armour/food/2 ropes/1 dragon bones. Og's nemesis Toban stole his gold bar; he gives you a key to Toban's chest.

atoms.label: Rope-swing to Grew's island south of Og
atoms.detail: Long-branched tree on the west shore; the rope is lost on the swing. Grab jangerberries on the island for later.

atoms.label: Talk to Grew about his enemy Gorad
atoms.detail: He asks you to knock a tooth out of Gorad on the third island.

atoms.label: Kill Gorad for a tooth
atoms.detail: Level-68 chieftain, south of the ladder on Toban's island (reached via the Skavid caves x4 without a map, or around Gu'Tanoth's south edge, then west through a rock hole past a death rune spawn). Safespottable in the island centre for Ranged/Magic.

atoms.label: Give Toban dragon bones for the third relic piece
atoms.detail: Baby dragon bones do not work; do not bury them.

atoms.label: Open Toban's chest for Og's stolen gold bar
atoms.detail: A second rope spawns near the roots south-west of the island's ladder if needed for the swing back.

atoms.label: Give Grew the tooth for the second relic piece and the yellow crystal
atoms.detail: Rope-swing back to Grew's island; pick jangerberries first if not already held.

atoms.label: Give Og his gold bar for the final relic piece
Return the 3 relic pieces to the wizard to assemble the Ogre relic
atoms.detail: Pick up a candle from the ground-floor spawn if a light source is still needed.

atoms.label: Show the assembled relic to the Ogre guards for entry
atoms.detail: North-west trail split into Gu'Tanoth; the relic must be shown via dialogue, not used directly on them.

atoms.label: Steal a rock cake from the market food stall
atoms.detail: Southern stall in the ogre market; do not left-click (eats it, forcing a re-steal).

atoms.label: Buy a pestle and mortar and vial from Grud if needed
atoms.detail: Non-aggressive ogre merchant in the market; ~7 coins total.

atoms.label: Say you're a friend and hand over the rock cake at the second gate
atoms.detail: First dialogue option only, or the guard knocks you out of the area; use (not eat) the rock cake on him.

atoms.label: Jump the broken bridge gap and pay the toll
atoms.detail: Agility 25 to jump; the guards then ask for 20 coins to let you cross. Grab the knife spawn here for cutting webs later.

atoms.label: Solve the city guards' word puzzle with the death rune
atoms.detail: The answer is 'death rune'; hand over the death rune picked up earlier south of the rock hole.

atoms.label: Learn the Skavid language from the Scared skavid (cave 1)
atoms.detail: East of Gu'Tanoth along the south-east branch; promise not to hurt it.

atoms.label: Give the correct response to each of the 4 regular Skavids
atoms.detail: Cave 2 (NE, main path): "Bidith tanath." -> "Cur." Cave 3 (N, path opening): "Gor cur..." -> "Ar." Cave 4 (N, south of west Yanille gate): "Cur Bidith." -> "Ig." (take 2 Cave nightshade here). Cave 5 (E, east side of the mountain): "Tanath gor." -> "Nod."

atoms.label: Return to the Scared skavid to be declared ready for the Mad skavid
Use the gold bar on a guard to reach the Mad skavid's cave
atoms.detail: South of the Scared skavid cave along the south-east entrance path; go south and west across a bridge into cave 6.

atoms.label: Answer the Mad skavid's randomised word-repeat challenge
atoms.detail: One randomised opening line from a fixed 8-line/8-response table (e.g. 'Ar cur'->'Gor', 'Bidith ig'->'Cur', 'Gor nod'->'Tanath', 'Cur tanath'->'Bidith', 'Bidith tanath'->'Cur', 'Tanath gor'->'Nod', 'Cur bidith'->'Ig', 'Gor cur'->'Ar') read directly off the source page's own table; answering correctly grants the magenta crystal. If short on cave nightshade, 2 more spawn just inside.

hints.value: Do not eat the cave nightshade — it damages you; the hole in the corner is a shortcut back to Yanille.

atoms.label: Use a nightshade on an Ogre Enclave guard to enter
atoms.detail: West cave entrance in the Gu'Tanoth market; talking to the guards directly triggers an attack instead. 'Use'/'eat' options are swapped for nightshade here — do not eat it, and complete the full dialogue or the nightshade is wasted.

atoms.label: Run past the shamans and blue dragons to the north-east exit
atoms.detail: A cutscene shows an Ogre shaman and Blue dragon; do not talk to or attack shamans (20-30 damage instantly). Exits near a northern Skavid cave facing Yanille.

atoms.label: Kill a giant bat behind the webbed house for bat bones
atoms.detail: House east of the Watchtower with a web-covered entrance; cut through with a slashing weapon/knife.

atoms.label: Brew and enchant the magic ogre potion with the wizard
atoms.detail: Order matters: guam leaf + vial of water -> guam potion (unf); add jangerberries (do not left-click-eat them; they respawn on Grew's island if lost); grind bat bones with pestle and mortar then add; hand the finished potion to the wizard to enchant it.

atoms.label: Use the second nightshade on a guard to re-enter the Enclave
atoms.detail: Bring pickaxe, anti-dragon/dragonfire shield, food. Same use/eat-swapped, dialogue-must-complete rule as the first entry.

atoms.label: Use the magic ogre potion on all 6 ogre shamans
atoms.detail: Instantly kills each shaman with no damage taken; the last one drops the cyan crystal automatically into your inventory. If lost, a Shaman robe in the SE corner can be searched for a replacement.

atoms.label: Mine the Rock of Dalgroth for the last crystal
atoms.detail: Centre of the Enclave; only mineable after the shamans are dead. Mine (not prospect) before leaving, or fresh nightshades are needed to return.

atoms.label: Place all 4 crystals and pull the lever to finish
atoms.detail: Leave via the north-east exit (or a Nightmare Zone teleport); yellow crystal in the south-west pillar, grey in the south-east, cyan in the north-west, magenta in the north-east, then pull the west-side lever. Do not drop anything before pulling the lever or it is lost permanently in the instance.

mapMarkers.label: Chambers of Xeric (Mount Quidamortem, Kebos Lowlands)
